For decades, I have preached the gospel thousands of times. Yet no matter how much I think about it, I am preaching the same content. 1. Rely on the blood of the covenant 2. Look only to the Lord 3. Seek the Holy Spirit. In the end, the conclusion is the Cross.

If you have lived by God's grace until now, you must continue to rely on the Lord's grace. A life of quickly abandoning the Lord when things go well is truly cooking rice for the dog. Since you will believe anyway, believe well. There is one God, but there are both luxury and counterfeit versions of faith.

Even today, Israeli education teaches the fundamentals by repetition. Beyond repetition, they memorize until it becomes second nature. An Israeli elementary student who cannot memorize the Pentateuch is considered quite a problem student. Therefore, the most frequently used word in Deuteronomy is 'remember.' It is remarkable that God's grace you thought you would remember for a thousand years disappears within a month of returning to Korea from England. You must remember. Therefore, we repeat.

Have you recently made a disadvantageous choice for the Lord's sake? Faith is not following 'benefit' but following 'righteousness.' So sometimes it may be 'disadvantageous.' Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness.
We bless our friends with faith. I believe I have such blessing. Because God loves us and the young people need it. If needed, He will pour it out.

Wisdom is listening to the Lord's voice and having a discerning heart. Therefore, a person who has received the Lord's heart is the wisest person. God's perspective on this situation is wisdom. 'The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.' - Proverbs 9:10

It is not easy to be victorious in the workplace and at school. Especially when your boss or professor seems to hold your life in their hands. No matter how large people and problems appear, you must acknowledge that God is almighty. Then the issue becomes merely a speck of dust.

Truth stands on truth alone and is sufficient. Any attempt to adopt worldly values and worldly energy is evil. The Lord gave us sufficient gospel, sufficient Jesus. If you have been zealous about anything other than truth, repent and live with Jesus alone being sufficient.
You shall know the truth, and the truth shall set you free - John 8:32
True love covers all sins and demolishes all the schemes of darkness.

Without sincerity, you cannot speak even what you know, and even if you have ability, you cannot step forward. Because you always worry about what others think, you miss the parts of life you should live and live another's life. So you are always digging into 'What does others think of me?' It is not that you lack the ability and conditions to act, but that you lack sincerity. Shabby truth is better than brilliant falsehood. This is why the tax collector, not the Pharisee, was considered righteous. Luke 18:11-14
If you are a true Christian, you will discover that holiness like the Lord's is more pleasant than 'your own happiness.' Faith is not complicated. Whom do you love more?
If our language did not have the word 'love,' we would have to use a simile like this: 'I truly think of you with Jesus' heart.'
True faith is an incessant prayer that does not fade or cool even after decades of weathering. If you have prayed, believe as you have prayed. It will come to pass.

True worship is to keep only the glorious Lord in your heart regardless of your emotional state and surroundings. Become a worshiper through worship. It is the way to fulfill the purpose of life and the secret to breaking through difficulties. 'By faith Jacob, when he was dying, blessed each of Joseph's sons, and worshiped as he leaned on the top of his staff.' - Hebrews 11:21
True courage comes not from personality but from devotion to truth.
Sincere confessions of love become jokes to some. As below... Phil Kyung-Pil Park chatting Today

Everyone longs to walk on a glamorous red carpet with photo zones rather than muddy roads. But the Lord told us not to take the easy way, the way that receives recognition. Rather, go on the difficult and narrow way. You will feel that those who find this way are significantly few. More important than the quality of the road is who waits at the end of that road.
While organizing at home, found old artifacts - Willy Wonka & Chocolate Factory - People express their desires through heaven.
Making a mess of the house and cheering
Faith is a battle of response. It is responding actively to God's Word, not to environment and emotion.
If you cling, it will be taken from you; if you give it up, you will receive it back abundantly. It is a truly simple truth. Jacob took 125 years to live according to this truth.
Jjajang rice, tray noodles, fruit, and green hot sauce, a place of rest.
How fortunate I am that only the Lord is my strength and my shield. Though it is a fierce battlefield, in the Lord's presence I feel warmth and peace.

When first speaking of love, there are many hopes. But ultimately, the person you come to love is far from those hopes. Because love is transcending the conditions you dislike. You come to love even the weaknesses, even the shortcomings.

When first evangelizing, I speak like this: Believe in Jesus! To one who has fought the fight of faith and finished the race, I say: Believe in Jesus. Looking to Jesus is both the beginning and completion of faith. Let us look to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith.
When grace comes to barren places and the brokenhearted are healed, it means there was someone faithful. God seeks the faithful and grants them power.
God is not deceived by results. Rather, He examines our motives. That is why when we die, we live.

Everything is a matter of life. If there is life, we live like a flame; if there is none, we fade away. Jesus declared that He is life. However, it is difficult to meet Him without seeking. We must 'seek and keep seeking.' I have never seen life overflow to those who do not repeatedly seek the Lord. Faith is simply the power of the repeated cross.
God did not call me to become outstanding. He desires that I become complete—united in belief and knowledge. Ephesians 4:13
God knows me and knows my circumstances. When I pray, I can feel this. Because He has heard, I become confident that He will also accomplish it.

God loved me with His life at stake even when I did not love Him so much. Therefore, we too ought to love this way. Do not look for a response; look to what the Lord sees. In His eyes, all are love. Romans 5:8

God is love. When I follow God, I transcend my sticky limitations. Loving believers is 'fellowship.' Loving unbelievers is 'mission.' And loving God is 'worship.' And when we became sinners, Christ confirmed God's love by dying for us. Therefore, love is Jesus. So fellowship is in Jesus. Mission proclaims Jesus. Worship is possible only through Jesus. Jesus is the center of all truth.

God sought out Saul, prepared him, and arranged a somewhat unpleasant event to anoint him as king—the loss of precious donkeys. The grace prepared by the Lord may not be visible until we experience some loss.
God does not make mistakes nor does He give up. We call that hope.
God told Abraham to look toward the north, south, east, and west and said He would give him that land. It means God will give as much as Abraham sees. Therefore, seeing is power.

God breathes courage into us (encourage), and God's people encourage one another. Because God is self-sufficient, but we must be supplied to live. To restart something we have given up requires greater strength than when we first began. One of the important sources of that strength is encouragement.

God has predetermined when and where we will live. We are in the Lord's care and love. From one man He made all the nations, that they should inhabit the whole earth; and He marked out their appointed times in history and the boundaries of their lands. Acts 17:26

When God gives us good things, He always gives them in the form of 'seeds.' When we embrace them and are transformed, we bear good fruit. We instinctively want finished products, but ultimately we see that many who possess finished products are destroyed by them instead. Seeds bear fruit through labor and suffering.
God knows what is best for our lives. He also knows better than I do how to accomplish it.
God looks only at faith when He responds. Even when everything crumbles, we must not retreat with faith in God's omnipotence and faithfulness. May you overcome through faith.
God does not call those who work well. He calls those who can obey. When we obey His calling, transformation occurs, and for the transformed person, the way opens.
Seek the Lord so that the dry place becomes holy. Fill my weaknesses and gaps with Jesus, and I become spiritually strong.

There is a reason why we do not meet God. It is because of wrong premises. The hypothesis that 'God will be glorified through my success.' The thought that He is glorified only through gold medals, prestigious universities, good jobs, and social status—this is wrong thinking. The Bible says that believing is glory. Not standing with evil is already a blessing. Crying out in pain amid suffering is the glory of saints. May we become believers who hold onto the One who not only is with us but also grieves and weeps with our pain and difficulty, yet does not give up through the absolute solution of the cross.
A tent housing God, an earthen vessel housing Jesus—these are strong.

A person who does not look to God is attached to something. Attachment blinds the eyes and deafens the ears. We cannot see the obvious as obvious. Attachment is idolatry, so God certainly commands us to let go. Let it go. You must release it until you can say that even if you lose everything, you are satisfied with the Lord alone.
If a group that loves God, loves the church, and truly loves one another can put their heads together for an appropriate amount of time concerning any problem, there is no mountain we cannot move.
If you truly love God as the highest, then you truly love my people. To love that person more than God is truly to hate that person the most. —From a connected cell meeting—
God's kingdom is not shaken by such things. Believe in the power of the blood and keep going. Faith is another word for paying no attention.
Those who believe in God's will and forgive receive the ability to start again—including themselves, not just others.
No trial is easy. Each time we must risk our lives and be prepared for death, but because of Jesus, we are not afraid. I have decided to win. Because I must win.
We must listen to God's Word because we are existentially sinners and foolish in our deeds. Those who listen to my words alone will live safely and will not fear disaster. Proverbs 1:33
To hope in what cannot be hoped is faith, but to hope in what should not be hoped is greed.
Deal with problems God's way. That means responding through obedience and gentleness. Then you will see the Lord's intervention.

If you know God's love, God's story will never be boring. Unfortunately, many find it boring. If you can hear such words regardless of your emotional state, speak honestly, and a small motivation for change arises, I assure you that you are someone who knows God's love toward you. 'We know and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and whoever abides in love abides in God, and God in them.' 1 John 4:16
God's Son said nothing to those who criticized Him. Though worthy of praise more than anyone, He was silent. He spoke instead through the cross. You did not love me, but I love you.
God's Son came to oppose the works of the devil. Let us resist through faith and be victorious.

A person who feels God's pain will never go astray. Jonah did not know God's heart toward Nineveh, and the elder son did not know his father's heart. Ultimately, God's love conquers all, yet love without that pain cannot exist.
God's grace—the grace of God that upholds me.
God's voice. Hearing God's voice begins with believing that the faithful and loving God surely desires to speak to me.

Those who know God's character will understand that God never speaks through condemnation. God does not threaten or coerce. The devil tries to deceive us with guilt, but we are under the Lord's blood.
When we acknowledge God's sovereignty, we experience the Lord's rule. Then the kingdom of God that we go to after death becomes reality before me. Deny yourself and acknowledge Jesus.
There is no word that brings as much peace and relief as 'God's sovereignty.' Since the Lord Himself rules, there is nothing to worry about.
God called me not to cling but to focus. Being anxious about what He has not given and focusing on that becomes clinging, but coming to Jesus Christ becomes focus.
If God were only to grant my desires and wishes, I would be disappointed. Moreover, I would even come to hate Him. God gave Himself and became everything to us.
God so loved the world. With the father's heart that embraces impossible sinners and covers our shame, we run to Christ and break our lives.

Even with much, we are only anxious, as if living in someone else's house. It is because it is greed, not what was given to me. Believe in Jesus and hope, and heavenly peace comes. Jesus is the supreme good given to me in full. The person who seeks only the Lord is most peaceful and strong.
Not knowing is stress, but understanding brings blessing.

God said, 'Because he loves me, I will rescue him; I will protect him, for he acknowledges my name. He will call on me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble, I will deliver him and honor him.' Psalm 91:14-15. Confess wholeheartedly that you know the Lord's name. Confess fervently that you love the Lord. Then the Lord will deliver you.

If God does not give, we have received nothing. (John 3:27) The Lord always gives the very best good things. Because He is good. Therefore, the people and things that belong to me are undoubtedly the highest option from heaven.
Hold the heart that God seeks. It is a broken heart. The Lord seeks those who know their spiritual poverty and know how to mourn.
I hope we become a beautiful relationship that God blesses. And even more, may it become a beautiful parting greater than that. For a Christian, the place of departure is also beautiful.
God shows signs and wonders not to fulfill our greed. He does so to make us believe and follow the Lord. Greeks seek wisdom, Jews seek signs, but both are mere greed; we hold to the cross.
How to do God's work ignorantly. When they asked, 'What must we do to do the works God requires?' Jesus answered, 'The work of God is this: to believe in the one he has sent.' John 6:28-29
It's someone's birthday! Please leave a message in the month ^^ absolutely not forced lol

Even if the heavens collapse and I have worries that gnaw at my head, if tonight I believe and trust in God, I have already won. The Bible says that what is believed is already reality. 'Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.' Hebrews 11:1

A rich young man ran away from Jesus. The reason was not because of his shortcomings but rather because of his strengths. 'When the young man heard this, he went away sad, because he had great wealth.' Matthew 19:22
To love one soul unconditionally, to love them as they are without conditions, is sublime. In a world of many conditions, the Lord becomes our only condition.
Limitations are not overcome by clenching our teeth, but by loving the Lord and being governed by His grace.
We are having a mini retreat starting tomorrow in Korea. It would be good if members in Korea who can attend would join. Sister Misun Hong and Dookyo Chung are arranging it.

In Korea, they divide liberal arts from science. If you're good at English, you go to liberal arts; if you're good at math, you go to science. Go to college or enter society and see. In economics and business, if you can't do advanced math, they won't even consider you. Engineers must read all new technologies in English. I hope you are not trapped by the limits that people have created. A life where age, language, family, academics, and appearance do not define your limits is blessed.
Please continue to pray for Brother Han Suk. He is currently in the intensive care unit. We cover him with the blood of Jesus and intercede for him.
I am an insufficiently lacking person, one who needs more forgiveness, a person who desperately needs Jesus.
When I cannot see even one step ahead, I simply close my eyes and see Him within me. When I see again through His eyes, I become a flame without any regret.

The Lord's principle is that when we seek together with one heart, He will surely accomplish it. That is why being one God is important. It is far better to keep unity, gaze at one another steadily, and rejoice together than to do a few more tasks and fight.

Activists believe that if they don't work, everything falls apart. God works even when we are in a slump. It is not you who works; it is grace that works. That is why my daughter's name is Grace. Soon, 'Kim Grace' will do much work. ^^

Faith without works is dead faith. The Bible has a monistic way of thinking that when it says you have faith, you also have obedience together. Along with the confession that you believe, please also proclaim the confession that you are transformed. This is only possible by the power of the Holy Spirit.
It is the Lord who fills an empty soul. You can feel lonely even if you don't believe in the Lord. That is because it is the process of coming out from darkness and moving toward light.
If I walk alongside a strong police officer rather than a vicious gangster, I do not fear. Because power overwhelms fear. The greatest fear is myself, and the greatest power is Jesus.

To find rest in a harsh world, you need skill. Without skill, you are always being chased. You hang gold for vain things and spend silver on futile things. That skill does not mean influence in the world. Intimacy with the Lord, that eternal power, is true skill.

Fear comes even to those with faith. Especially to pastors, there is no exception. Even to missionaries who have risked their lives in remote mission work, fear suddenly visits. Fear cannot be overcome by human strength alone. Only the presence of the Lord overwhelms fear. Only then can we have peace. Walk with Him. You will not only have peace but boldness. Jesus immediately said to them, 'Take courage! It is I. Don't be afraid.' -Matthew 14:27 'I have told you these things, so that in me you may have peace. In this world you will have trouble. But take heart! I have overcome the world.' -John 16:33
It is a blessing to walk on barren ground, unable to take even one step without the Lord's grace, rather than strutting about on luxurious carpets.

In chemistry, there is chain reaction. The previous reaction triggers the subsequent reaction. People typically call this an explosion. Iron sharpens iron. When people of faith and those who have answered through Jesus are placed together, a chain reaction of revival occurs and it becomes even hotter. What kind of trigger do the people around me give to me?
Choose the Lord over probability.
Act with conviction. If your conviction is small, act accordingly. If there is much to be done, kneel down more and pray to abide in much conviction.

What you cling to in times of tribulation reveals your faith. To be afraid is evidence of having no life. A person with life does not fear but is at peace. Psalm 27:3 'Though an army besiege me, my heart will not fear; though war break out against me, even then I will be confident.'

Repent and believe the gospel. -Mark 1:15 The gospel is a promise and a covenant, but the prerequisite for believing it is repentance. Here, repentance is not a detailed enumeration of specific sins or lamentation of one's plight. It is turning around, changing direction, and returning. Above all, it is abandoning self-reliance. You must abandon self-trust to believe the gospel. The prerequisite for the merits of Jesus' blood is nailing down my merits.

A repentant heart is not a shameful heart but a good conscience seeking God. Therefore, we call upon the Lord's name, are baptized, and receive forgiveness of sins. It is a night when I feel deeply that I am a sinner.
Any grace I realize and any love I receive is given within God's permission alone. Therefore, I am grateful and thankful every day.
The first step of recovery is humility. Because the first step of the fall is pride. 'If my people...humble themselves...'

The assurance of recovery—even wrong choices and mistakes, even wounds difficult to let go of—will surely be recovered and healed by God's love. Though you walk a barren path now, I am confident that God will work to ensure that the intercessors for you and the gospel of the cross are not in vain. The sign of that assurance is the cross. 'For I am convinced that neither death nor life, neither angels nor demons, neither the present nor the future, nor any powers, neither height nor depth, nor anything else in all creation, will be able to separate us from the love of God that is in Christ Jesus our Lord.' -Romans 8:38-39

The fatal challenge to a company is not aggressive advertising from competitors but the lack of conviction among its employees. The most effective way to deny the Lord is not atheists who say there is no God, but believers in God who are anxious.

The best of humanists is 'I will take responsibility and go on.' God did not call us to take responsibility. He called us to come to Jesus, who will forever take responsibility for us, depend on Him, and give others the position to fully depend on Him. We cannot be responsible even for ourselves, let alone for others. I hope you entrust everything only to the Lord.

Rather than succeeding in what people commonly call success, enduring and waiting becomes glory. When my faith does not weaken and I hold onto God's promise, I give glory to God. Glory is given through faith, not through the fulfillment of wishes. 'Yet he did not waver through unbelief regarding the promise of God, but was strengthened in his faith and gave glory to God.' -Romans 4:20

People commonly say they give glory to the Lord when they receive a spotlight that others envy. That is why the Lord does not exalt them. He exalts because they give glory. The Lord's lowering means I was not prepared. Succeeding and being envied, or speaking of God's glory in an interview, is not glory. Glory can be given when long without an answer I did not weaken in faith and held onto the promise without doubt. Glory is not given by just anyone. -Romans 4:19 'Without weakening in his faith, he faced the fact that his body was as good as dead—since he was about to father a child—and that Sarah's womb was also dead. Yet he did not waver through unbelief regarding the promise of God, but was strengthened in his faith and gave glory to God.'

Have hope. No one can take it from you. Have ease and humor. If faith is a luxury brand, life becomes a luxury brand too. Even if you set aside the work you are being chased by for a while, the great work you think of will not happen. Believe in the Almighty God and entrust everything to Him.

There is a saying, 'Do not casually walk on a snow-covered mountain path.' It is because those behind you might step wrong. To be a leader of an era and a guide who saves a generation, you must have 'the heart of a father.' You must first have the experience of meeting God, the experience of God's heart being poured out, and the ability to convey that heart.
Faith is to turn away from greed standing before me and hold onto the true reality and evidence. That is Jesus.

They say they cannot give thanks because there are too many difficult things. No. It is because you cannot give thanks that there are many difficult things. I desire you to present your requests and deficiencies with thanksgiving. The most powerful prayer is thanksgiving that turns reality into reality.
In difficult and seemingly impossible situations, place faith on an egg to break a rock. The situation we face may seem difficult, but it is a situation allowed by the Lord.

Before saying you're dying because it's hard, please pray. Don't drag your feet on the stairs without even stepping on the stage, and settle the match with your knees and faith. You will truly feel that it is worth doing.

Giving up when it's hard is the easiest and most convenient choice, but it is also the most verified worst choice. The Lord did not give up on the cross but accomplished it. Saying 'It is finished' means He endured well. When you have faith in difficulty, you win, and most faith manifests as endurance.

That my faith is continually challenged means I must respond with faith. That this moment has become a sharp and critical battlefield where we cannot retreat from each other is because it is truly a critical moment. Please respond with faith.

* Sunday Leaders Meeting 1. Life is a matter of fullness. 2. Those who know the future are peaceful and more than courageous. 3. If you know the ending beforehand, you can enjoy it pleasantly. 4. The darker the situation, the more interesting it becomes. 5. Seeing what has not yet come to pass is faith. 6. If there is faith, you are bold and focused. 7. It is not a matter of good character or willpower, but whether there is faith. 8. When you see and accept the conclusion with faith, not forced, you have no choice but to live that way. 9. A person with reliable and certain information will see the result and change their behavior. 10. Focus on Jesus. Always think of Him. 11. Are you lonely? Pray like this. Make me even lonelier. 12. This is the appearance of a spiritual strong one and the path of one who mocks fate and walks the Lord's way.
Challenge is coming out of the safety zone and facing fear. It is allowing yourself to fail, and you discover that the more you attempt it, the easier it becomes.

It is fully understandable to curse me as someone who doesn't know anything and is a fanatic. It is natural criticism. It is because they do not know the passage below. The resurrection of Christ resets and renews all values. 'If only for this life we have hope in Christ, we are of all people most to be pitied.' -1 Corinthians 15:19
There is no reason to hesitate or waver. If the Lord has established it.

* Reject evil elements and be with good ones. After Abraham's victory in war, two kings come to greet him. He accepts the greeting of Melchizedek, who serves the same God he serves, but rejects and refuses Sodom's king and Sodom's culture, which distort the truth. Discern and accept some things while rejecting others.

A person of faith does not ignore common sense and reality. He simply transcends with faith. I gave up the world's pleasures and the world gave me up, but the work of transforming the world within the world does not stop. I illuminate the world with excellent wisdom and faithfulness.

There is a saying 'a kite with a broken string.' The person or force behind you who looked after you has fallen from power, so they can no longer provide convenience. It simply means separation has occurred. Such strings should be broken, and it is actually a blessing when they break. You must not be separated from Jesus, the vine. Become a kite with a broken string, come down, and become a branch attached to the Lord.
Simply cast it. Cast it to the Lord. And believe in the Lord and just go. The Lord is alive.

* I see you. There is nothing to gain from a dry well, but people continue to peek around, return empty-handed, and then suffer and feel lonely. Life is not happy because there are things that should not be and things that should be. What should be is Jesus, and what should not be are many things trying to fill the void—garbage. I am not garbage. The Lord never created garbage.

* God will never let you down. When you believe in Jesus, you will experience tribulation in the world. But there is no need to fear. Because Jesus has overcome the world. He has never failed me once and never will. All His victories have already been accomplished on the cross. That is the conclusion. My conclusion. The conclusion Jesus foresaw on the cross. This is my destiny.
Wherever you go, whenever you are always with You
When I believe in the Lord's almightiness, peace comes. Because miracles happen then. Peace is a great grace given to believers. The Lord is greater than the problem.

In fear and anxiety, what is needed is not logic and persuasion. Even with understanding, uneasiness does not disappear. What is truly necessary is intimacy. Ah, Father is with me! Then that is enough.

'Lord, my strength, I love You'—this is not a learned statement. It is a confession that bursts forth uncontrollably from a soul that has experienced God at the critical moment of life. 'I love you, Lord, my strength.' -Psalm 18:1

*God's Voice In the past, God spoke through the prophets, but in these last days He speaks through His Son. Jesus is God's love and His Word. To those who look to Jesus, God speaks through His Son. In the past God spoke to our ancestors through the prophets at many times and in various ways, but in these last days He has spoken to us by His Son, whom He appointed heir of all things, and through whom also He made the universe. -Hebrews 1:1
Many people are satisfied with claiming truth and agreeing with it. To not pay the price and not pray is to deny the truth. In the end, your life will deny it. A tree is known by its fruit.

The Most Powerful Faith Manual Simple power messages by topic Indexing tens of thousands of insights that pierce through worries and difficulties in the world will arm you strongly. - Faithbook by LFGC Youth
Lord, give me young people who love You, then I will turn this world back to You.

*Living by Faith Do not cling to what benefits yourself, but quietly do what is right. Rather than seeking work suited to your abilities, seek abilities suited to your calling. Worldly work is about investing little and keeping much, but the work of heaven is pouring everything out and looking only to the Lord. (John 1:48) Nathanael asked, 'How do you know me?' Jesus answered, 'I saw you under the fig tree before Philip called you.'

*Preserving the Precious It is not because you have the strength and power to preserve what is precious that you preserve it. It is preserved because it is precious. You go to the end because you love it. Guard what you hold dear with love.

*The Most Pitiful in the World If our lives only seek the things of this world, we are truly pitiful people. Because of the resurrection, our lives become most glorious. But if we do not become pitiful even without the hope of resurrection, there is a problem. That means we are Christian only in name. Without resurrection, our lives should become ruined. If in Christ our hope is only for this life, we are of all people most to be pitied. But Christ has indeed been raised from the dead, the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep. -1 Corinthians 15:19-20

*The Foundation of Inner Healing Defense mechanisms like projection, suppression, rationalization, denial, and reaction formation heard in early morning prayer services are protective devices for the self. These are typical narcissism. Knowing this helps, but Scripture speaks with more fundamental truth. Pay attention to the following words. These are the basis of our healing. The law of the Spirit of life in Christ Jesus has set you free from the law of sin and death. -Romans 8:2 (in=presence, law=power, set free=freedom) Trust in Him at all times, you people; pour out your hearts to Him, for God is our refuge. -Psalm 62:8 (pour out=confront and confess, refuge=healing and restoration)

*Faith is Like Dominoes Faith is like dominoes. When one falls, others fall in succession. Conversely, when one succeeds, revival happens in the others. Add the whip to the running horse. Continuing~~~

You need not demand devotion from someone whose heart is downcast. Rather, they should experience the cross. To love means to become a debtor, and from there devotion flows, and from that affection intensity is born.

*The Power to Rise Again The power to rise again from brokenness and weakness comes only from seeking Jesus. It is relying on the power of the blood and receiving the filling of the Holy Spirit. Continuously pursuing that is what those who will rise again must persistently pursue. They collapsed because they took their eyes off that.
*Prayer When Facing Difficulties Lord, humble me even more. Let me live by Your word, not by my own strength and ability.

*Prayers Answered, Problems Solved Despite much faith life and prayer, the work of God may not appear in our daily lives. Miracles begin to happen when we receive Jesus as Lord. Without fail, when all disciples acknowledged, believed, and confessed that Jesus is Lord, they experienced miracles and power. Powerless Christianity happens when we dilute the Lordship of Jesus. Remarkably, all of Jesus's questions in the four Gospels compress into this: 'Who is your Lord?' The wine running out, the five loaves and two fish, the boat in the storm, the sick daughter, the demon-possessed child, the thirsty life—truly, who is the Lord? Therefore, do not focus on the problem, but examine who is the master of the problem. That is how you can have peace. His mother said to the servants, 'Do whatever he tells you.' -John 2:5
When I completely surrender everything to the Lord because I cannot possibly live, the Kingdom of God begins to flourish. My problem is no longer mine; this battle belongs to God.

*Faith is Vision The majesty of a sunrise by the sea causes other surrounding things to fade from sight. Good faith means the frequency, absolute time, and depth of looking to the Lord are unique. We were told to look at the bronze serpent (not to touch it) to live. Looking only to the Lord makes everything else fade from sight. That is why we gain victory. All human problems arise from where we focus our vision. Turning away from the cross is already sin. Let us fix our eyes on Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith. -Hebrews 12:2

*How to Overcome Fear The opposite of fear is not courage. It is companionship. When you walk with the Lord, fear transforms into song. To Joshua, who trembled without charisma, the Lord said to 'meditate on His word (faith)' and 'observe it carefully (holiness).' Follow peace and holiness with all people, without which no one will see the Lord. -Hebrews 12:14 By faith Enoch was taken from this life, so that he did not experience death; he could not be found, because God had taken him away. For before he was taken, he was commended as one who pleased God. -Hebrews 11:5

When we see people at church faithfully serving and praising, it seems as if they are living well without problems, but when they return to their places, they face various struggles and live in anxiety and unease. This is because they have not been assured of God's love. Those God foreknew He also predestined to be conformed to the image of His Son, that He might be the firstborn among many brothers and sisters. -Romans 8:29 God is a God of impartiality. That means God loves us, His younger siblings, exactly as He loves His Son, Jesus Christ. God cannot be unfair.

Paul called legalists and those with self-righteousness 'dogs.' (Philippians 3:2) The easiest way to say this is, 'Where there's a will, there's a way.' No matter how sincere, you cannot move God. Without faith it is impossible to please God, because anyone who comes to Him must believe that He exists and that He rewards those who earnestly seek Him. -Hebrews 11:6

The reason believers keep away from sin is not because their ethics are strong or their will is powerful, but because the glory and love of God they have experienced is so great. Under the blazing sun, candlelight must go out. When you love the Lord more, you keep away from sin. Because sinning becomes too difficult.

Lifting yourself up does not gain recognition, nor does lowering yourself bring humility. Actually, how I see myself is not that important. What matters is how God sees me and what plans He has for me.

The 600,000 Israelites who saw the ten plagues and great miracles complained and died in the wilderness. But their descendants who heard God's word at Mount Gerizim and Mount Ebal and believed entered Canaan.

The dark clouds before me are frustrating before I go through them, but after I pass through, they become my testimony. A risky challenge with the Lord is much more gratifying than safe surrender without Him. At life's final station, we always have more regrets about the things we 'didn't do' than about the things we 'did.'
I am endlessly lacking. I am lacking to the point there is no excuse. That is why I need Jesus even more. Without Him, I cannot take a single step. That is also my greatest blessing.

Living by faith means roaring at a reality that contradicts and opposes my vision and continuing to move forward. The reality is what it is; I am moved by the heart the Lord has poured into me and persevere.
If you fall into sin despite your determination, you still do not know the truth. When you know the truth, you are set free from slavery to sin.
I am not an excellent person. But I walk this road with people I respect and admire.

Do not try to give solutions to everyone else's problems. There is more possibility that pain will deepen than be solved. Entrust them to the Lord and try to share the same heart. Then precious things you could not see when you stopped will begin to appear.
Faith is not pursuing your own plans but following in response to the Lord's calling.
The secret to belonging in God and God belonging in me is because of the blood of the cross. That impossible thing became possible through that precious blood. Hallelujah
A long time with grown-up Sharon in the evening, just the two of us.

When facing problems, what I need most is not skilled backing or luck. It is His voice that transforms my fear into peace and makes me know that the Lord is God. He said to me, 'My grace is sufficient for you.' -2 Corinthians 12:9 If the Lord is sufficient, then it is sufficient.
Why do you worry when you can pray?
Do not be afraid; just believe. It means to commit everything to Him. Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you. -1 Peter 5:7

When you see only results and parts, you despair. But the Lord makes you see the whole. Before the world's request to be content and maintain the status quo, I hope you have the perspective of faith that sees glory in suffering. The Lord moves us to where He has established by methods we do not know. Joseph → Egypt <Low cost, high efficiency, shortest route move>
I pray once more that the life of the least would be offered up and burned.

When Abraham was asked for his only son Isaac, he fell into a paradoxical dilemma. The actions he took were twofold: 1. To obey, and 2. To believe that even in death, God would raise him up. That reckless obedience toppled idols and brought unimaginable blessings beyond calculation.

After prayer, there should be no anxiety on your face. If you fear even after praying, you must intercede further for faith and confidence. Believe in the Lord who rules all entangled circumstances. Use faith. And declare what you believe will come to pass and be at peace.

Most people go with high probability. Chasing probability means delaying the time of ruin a bit. Rather, blessed is the one who awakens early. That person realizes that he does not live by bread alone but must live by God's word.
Do not be afraid; just believe. Do not be overwhelmed by the problem; break through with prayer. Jesus heard this and said to Jairus, 'Don't be afraid; just believe.' -Luke 8:50

What holds me is not my eloquent speech and decent reputation. Nor is it because I managed my image well. It is only the blood of the Lord. That is why I am loved despite my weakness and forgiven despite my lack.
Realizing my weakness is the grace of the Lord. From that weakness, the Lord begins to work. The evidence of the Lord's work is when my weakness becomes my boast.

In the wilderness, there is nothing extra. One garment, one pair of shoes, and even provisions—I must look to the manna that falls daily in faith. That the basic survival of one day is not granted without God's help is grace. Do only those things that would fail without the Lord.

That is why the Lord tells us not to remember what is past and not to think of all that was done before. What the Lord does is bring rivers to the desert of life and water to the wilderness of the heart. Only the Lord can do a new work within me. That is why we must look only to Him. Do not remember the former things, or consider the things of old. I am about to do a new thing; now it springs forth, do you not perceive it? I will make a way in the wilderness and rivers in the desert. Those who trust in His guidance are not alarmed even when storms arise and there are reports of war. Boldness is not about one's character but about 'what' you believe in.

Pharaoh increased forced labor for the people and oppressed them. King Nebuchadnezzar with his absolute power enforces an unattainable standard—idol worship. But those who hold to 'faith in the Lord's help' and 'surrender of rights and the cross that says, "but even if He does not"' are not affected. The world misjudged people. (Daniel 3:17) O king, if we are thrown into the blazing furnace, the God we serve is able to deliver us from it, and He will deliver us from Your Majesty's hand. Someone asks like this, 'How do you live like that?' It is love, the love the Lord gives. Will you follow? Just as before, not stopping for a single moment, making every moment as if it were the last.

Wherever I am, my heart is always at peace. The peace Jesus gives is always abundant. My heart is always peaceful, my heart is always at ease. That is faith, acknowledging the Lord's sovereignty, and doing very well in this situation. Opportunities will surely come. Like Jesus, like Joseph, we prepare a lifetime for a moment.

And the Lord said to Gideon, 'You have too many people for me to deliver Midian into their hands, or Israel would boast against me that my own strength has saved me.' Judges 7:2

If you hold onto something of greater value, other values become dung. It is not training to regard dung as precious and discard it; it happens naturally. When I die and live through Jesus, I live a victorious life.

1. In sports, the ace is one who dominates the flow and situation. 2. When pressed into defense, switch to offense and change defeat into victory. 3. The Lord wants us to become aces who dominate situations where He has called us. 4. This is not done through strength but through 'the power of gratitude.' To raise your hands and give thanks in a fallen place requires faith, and such a person dominates the situation and wins. 5. In the expression of a grateful person, there is the composure of victory regardless of circumstances.

What I want to give to young people is not the convenient achievement of life, but the immeasurable cross love of Jesus. Before that cross, all incorrect config is reset. Everything becomes possible and we obey. God is faithful; what we said to you is not yes and no. Jesus Christ is not yes and no; to him is always yes. - 2 Corinthians 1:18
To be bold means trying to remove what you fear. Such things rarely happen in life. When you discover a greater object of awe, small fears disappear. Fear the Lord.

There are times when despite your efforts, despite working hard, the results are not good. What you need then is to hold onto one thing: the fact that God loves me. Though all heaven and earth change, this truth does not change.
I have relied only on Your love; my heart rejoices in Your salvation. - David, Psalm 13:5

So the little thing I have is truly precious. Chasing only what is flashy and great means not knowing who you are. If you do not know Him, you do not know yourself, and a person who does not know himself can never be happy.

Even when saying I cannot do it, that I am insufficient, turning away with a dismissive gesture, when I hear 'This is the Lord's will,' I unhesitatingly go a long way saying 'I will serve and obey.' Faith is not from me but from the Lord.

If I do not let go of the swing I am holding, I cannot grasp the next swing. If I let go of both hands, there may be a brief moment when I cannot depend on any swing. But soon my partner will catch me. It is a circus with the Lord.

It is not because letting go of the world is truly difficult or because grasping the mission is so hard, but because I have not discovered the real. They are children whose parents promised to come pick them up. A person who looks upon God's promise with good faith occupies high ground in spiritual warfare. They never lose. Hold onto the promise. (Hebrews 11:33) By faith they conquered kingdoms, performed acts of righteousness, obtained promises, shut the mouths of lions.
Moses's request was to see God's glory. The reason we easily crumble and become enslaved to sin is that we do not know glory. A person who has seen God's glory cannot live that way.

I make a bet. Cups are turned over and a marble is in one. We found it is not on the right. Where could it be? Of course on the left. Since it is not on the right... If you attend church but are not happy, then the treasure Christ does not abundantly fill my vessel. Is there tribulation yet you are still happy? Of course you are still happy, and even more so. Because of Jesus... Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. - Matthew 5:3

Some want the fastest path to their destination. Others want the most beautiful path to their destination. But the Lord says He becomes 'that path.' And He says there is no way to reach the destination except through that path. If Jesus is the path, it is the most beautiful and right path. Jesus said to him, 'I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.' - John 14:6
I also love. Jesus...

You must fight the good fight of faith. Saints cannot avoid fighting and must engage until entering the kingdom of heaven. This fight can only be won by faith and is a 'good fight' because it is not an evil struggle of pursuing a perishable self. The 'good fight' is dying in faith and the Lord living instead. Fight the good fight of the faith. Take hold of the eternal life to which you were called and about which you made the good confession in the presence of many witnesses. - 1 Timothy 6:12

The Pharisees hated Jesus and wanted to kill Him. They love themselves more than God. Failing to recognize Jesus is not an intellectual problem but a matter of the heart. 'How can you believe since you accept glory from one another, but do not seek the glory that comes from the only God?' John 5:44 A self-centered person can never reach the truth.

It is not because I have something left that I can help others. That is absolutely not possible. Those who have more share more. Because I make the intention to give, the Lord gives the blessing to share.

The Holy Spirit sent in My name... When the Holy Spirit comes, He causes you to call on the name of Jesus, and through the power of that name, works are accomplished. Whoever calls upon that name will be saved. If there is a problem, I hope you call upon the name of Jesus. John 14:26 But the Counselor, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you all things and will remind you of everything I have said to you.
Do not wander seeking the way; seek Jesus. Jesus is the way. He is our purpose, our all, and our destination.
When faith dwells within and overflows, it is expressed as joy. Romans 5:2. Therefore, worship contains the joy of heaven.

When the Word is proclaimed, believe and obey immediately. Simple obedience brings progress in life. After advancing a little, you will see the next path a little more. A thousand-mile journey is traveled this way, one step at a time.

Faith is not insurance that increases my value and expands my happiness. Seeing my reaction to not being recognized and facing failure, I clearly understand what I have truly been pursuing the mission for.
The tortoise may eagerly await the rabbit's sleep, but a rabbit faithful in concentration and absolute time is an impregnable strong rabbit. Infinite loyalty, absolute faith.

When I throw myself into the path the Lord leads and entrust it to Him, I receive it back as refined gold of faith. (Job 23:10) Then one who formerly only theoretically knew the testimony and experience of others directly encounters the living God and becomes a glorious person. Simply stepping away from the values and paths the world speaks of is suffering. Yet suffering is beneficial for me. (Psalm 119:67) 'I had heard of you by hearing of the ear, but now my eye sees you.' - Job 42:5. Because suffering is another revelation of God.

(Mark 16:17-18) And these signs will accompany those who believe: In my name they will drive out demons; they will speak in new tongues; they will pick up snakes with their hands; and when they drink deadly poison, it will not hurt them at all; they will place their hands on sick people, and they will get well. No matter how powerful the challenge, if you respond powerfully in faith, you always win.
Pride must die so that the vessel of humility can be filled with God's grace. I hope that as we receive much, we become servants who know how to bow down humbly.
If I shipwreck in faith, any other success is merely a glorious failure. I trust in God who is faithful and almighty. He will uphold me.

In the last days, Satan as a roaring lion seeks someone to devour. Like a roaring lion, he is merely imitating; he is not truly a lion. The true Lion is Jesus, the 'Lion of the tribe of Judah' (Revelation 5:5). Trust in the Lord's name and be bold.
Can you praise the Lord in all circumstances? That is faith.
It is time to start the Saturday gathering open to everyone. We yearn for the Lord's anointing. There is nothing but the Lord.

The Parable of the Wicked Tenants (Mark 12:1-9) Jesus revealed the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, hidden since the creation of the world, through parables. In most of Jesus's parables about the kingdom of heaven, Jesus always appears as the Messiah. After all, unless you believe Jesus is the Messiah, that secret cannot be unlocked. The truth that Jesus is Christ is the key to unlocking all these parables. Terms to explain: Vineyard: A representative fruit of Israel; in Israel's dry climate without water, grapes preserved water and were essential as a beverage and food. Unlike other plants, grapes absolutely needed the farmer's help. Hedge: A fence to protect crops. Leased to tenants: It was a common practice for landowners to rent out cultivated land and receive rent. Here, the farmer is not the owner. Text Analysis: 1. What did Jesus set up when creating the vineyard in His parable? 2. How did the man lease his vineyard to the farmers? ①Hostile M&A ②Franchise (with deposit) ③Subcontract ④Partnership ⑤Leased with rent. 3. What did the owner demand from the farmers? ①Company ownership ②Stock options ③Exclusive contract ④Part of the produce. That the owner entrusted the vineyard with a hedge means it was very specially separated. God particularly distinguished Israel from all nations and peoples and desired to give them His mission and Word, salvation, and even His own Son Jesus Christ. He gave them the temple and Jerusalem. When leaving on a long journey and entrusting to the farmers, it was because of trust and expectation. What God wanted from them was part of the produce. But the wicked farmers found even that difficult. 4. What did the farmers do to the servants sent by the owner? 5. Lastly, whom did the owner send? ①Debt collector ②Police man ③Mobsters ④Street gang members ( ) 6. What was the owner's expectation when sending his son? (verse 6) 7. Why did the farmers kill the son? (verse 7) Surprisingly, the farmers killed the son because he was the heir. They mistakenly thought that if they killed the heir, the vineyard's inheritance would become theirs. They were complete thieves. They should have been grateful just for leasing the vineyard, but they did not pay the rent and even killed the son. You can see the owner's lukewarm response even until the son's death. God did not want to destroy Israel through judgment that much. The worst evil for the farmers was mistaking the vineyard for their own. When Adam and Eve wanted to become independent, sin entered humanity, and when Pharisees took glory from one another, they crucified the very God they claimed to love so much. 8. Where was the son thrown after he was killed? (verse 8) 9. Who do you think is the person to whom the owner gave the vineyard after destroying the farmers in anger? (verse 9) First meaning of parable: Jews; Second meaning: Gentiles; Third meaning: Me. Vineyard: Israel; The Church; My life. Hedge: Jerusalem walls; Worship; Spiritual ( ). Leasing: The mission and stewardship of Jews; ( ); ( ). Journey: Jesus's first coming; Second coming; Death. More to consider: 1. What is your own self-love that causes you to reject Jesus? (e.g., religious zeal, desire for reward, ambition) 2. What do you think God wants from us as He gives us the vineyard (life)? 3. The owner of the vineyard (church) is God. Do I make the owner (God) the owner and the vineyard the vineyard?
To take another step, I must stake my life. But there is no regret. Because my dream is love.
If pain and conflict remain in my heart, it means I must look only to the Lord more at this very moment.
I must know the truth. I must absolutely know and experience the cross. Because the power of change does not lie in me but in what I am captivated by.

In the 1960s, the national income was 80 dollars. Now it exceeds 20,000. In just a few decades, it jumped 250 times. Back then there were people dying of starvation in absolute poverty, but now no one starves in relative poverty. Income increased 250 times - one should be ecstatic with happiness, yet it does not appear so. Can possession really bring that much happiness? No, it cannot. It is because we understand people as mere flesh. If you cannot be happy from existing, you cannot be happy from possessing.

I have called you friends. John 15:15. In the Gospel of John, Jesus says He will become your friend. The premise of becoming a friend is explained in the preceding verse. Love. My command is this: Love each other as I have loved you. - John 15:12
Tell me what you want. I will tell you whom you serve.
Do you like Free coffee for everlasting life? Yes, membership has it's privileges. -LFGC Youth Group
If you don't like the way you were born..., try being born again.

A sense of merit brings excessive pride, monopoly of righteousness, and the attitude that only we are right and only I am correct. We can stumble when we cling to and boast about what we do well. However, when we have a sense of grace, we become amazed at 'the grace of the Lord who saved a sinner like me.'

Rejection is faith. Not everyone can reject, but when you hold onto Jesus, everything else becomes like dung. It is strange not to discard it. 'By faith Moses, when he had grown up, refused to be called the son of Pharaoh's daughter, choosing rather to endure ill-treatment with the people of God than to enjoy the pleasures of sin for a season; considering the reproach of Christ greater riches than the treasures of Egypt; for he was looking to the reward.' (Hebrews 11:24-11:26)

The devil's message about material wealth is 'I earned this money' and 'I can buy anything with money.' If God does not give it, we have received nothing, and the truly important things in life cannot be bought with money. Eternal values are invisible; living by invisible faith, hope, and love is the invisible value.

Everyone notices that Moses was a leader who led two million people. However, they overlook that he was a leader who lay prostrate before God for forty days and nights. Prayer is power, and prayer is true leadership.
You love God because He first loved you.
If you have nothing and there is nothing to return but blame, at least you can give love, can't you? Since you have nothing, you cannot pretend—give genuine love.
The person who sees Holiday as Holy is truly a person of faith.

'Buy truth, and do not sell it, nor wisdom and instruction and understanding.' (Proverbs 23:23) Purchasing truth is a blessing. You must meet good leaders and belong to a good community, and it is accomplished when you serve that community with blessing. However, more important than buying truth is not selling truth. Disobeying truth for worldly gain, deceiving your own conscience and following desire—these are selling truth. Distorting Scripture to defend and rationalize yourself is also betraying truth. God's truth includes specific wisdom, instruction, and discernment for living a successful and meaningful life. We must make meditating on and studying truth our highest life priority to live according to the Creator's intention. A new day promises success only to those armed with truth to live their new life concretely.

'Everyone who belongs to the truth listens to My voice,' He said (John 18:37). This has been taught ceaselessly through gatherings and sharing. Truth does not bind or coerce; rather, it sets free. If we love the Father and His Son, we will respond to truth and resist coercion and lies. If we seek human glory, those who belong to truth will fundamentally feel uneasy. I pray that the 'power of interpretation' and 'wisdom of revelation' to discern whether this is the Lord's grace or not may be anointed upon us.

Do not boast when there is bitter jealousy in your heart (James 3:14). If there is hatred, jealousy, envy, and an unforgiving heart, God does not hear prayer. Even if great history happens, it means nothing, He says. James sounds an alarm bell to those renowned for faith, the so-called spiritual celebrities. Jealousy and envy cannot be prevented through spiritual achievements, nor can they be recognized by God. So if such bitter jealousy is stirring within, it is not something to boast about but to fall face down on the ground. The representative self-satisfaction within me and the enemy of the cross are jealousy and envy. Recovery and miracles happen only through those who love.
I believe in the power of prayer. I believe in the faithful God. I believe in the Almighty God. I believe He changes hearts. I believe He works miracles.

Many people confess with their lips that they fear the Lord while committing sin with their bodies. Even sins committed because the flesh is weak require repentance, but it is more serious when conscience is seared and one does not know he is a sinner and there is no repentance. I hope no one despises the Lord's patience and longsuffering as He waits for repentance. God will surely judge.

How can they believe in Him whom they have not heard? And how can they hear without a preacher? (Romans 10:14) One cannot believe what one does not know. If there is no channel of understanding to enter God's grace, God's promise has no benefit for me.

Will my God supply all your needs according to Wall Street and the banking system and the economy and the unemployment rate? No. 'My God will supply all your needs according to His riches in glory in Christ Jesus.' (Philippians 4:19) Any faith and thought that makes God not God is sin. God alone is God.

To believe is to change masters. When the master changes, values, worldview, perspective on relationships, and all evaluations change. The granted 'authority' and 'power' will be used differently. Previously, I focused only on achieving much and rising high, on efficiency and effectiveness, but ultimately I realize I can either win or lose. Following only the Lord's will is true victory.

Anyone in the world can say 'everything will be fine.' But the words of a person of faith are different. 'Everything will be fine, because....' That 'because' is not just a small branch covering something, but a mighty tree with roots extending deep into the ground. 'Do not fear or be dismayed because of this great multitude, for the battle is not yours but God's. Do not go down against them; stand and see the salvation of the Lord on your behalf.' (2 Chronicles 20:15)

Much love is not obtained through begging or effort. And obtaining it does not necessarily bring complete happiness. If I received even a small comfort or love from someone, that is the boundless grace of the Lord. The greater grace is that the Lord causes us to receive His love and through that love to love the members of His body.

What the devil most fears and dreads is the body of Christ—that we are united and become one. He will do anything to prevent it. But we already know that his situation is quite difficult. When we become one, the body of Christ becomes complete, we do the work of Jesus, and we will accomplish even greater things.
Walk in the Word without fear. I pray that the Word becomes your conclusion rather than what your senses and the world's rumors tell you. You will not be shaken.
Regardless of all that happens to me, I trust the Lord. I commit my life only to the Lord and hope only in His faithfulness. Blessed are those who trust in the Lord.
To hope in and depend on the Lord's faithfulness in seemingly impossible situations—that is faith.
If I call, will You come When I cry, do You hear I believe every tear is caught up by a faithful God
I can do everything through Christ Jesus who strengthens me.
After running through all my beautiful youth, there is still a confession that keeps pushing me forward and running: I love Jesus.
I dislike tears, and I dislike bloodshed even more, but if the Lord says it is necessary, I will gladly offer it. If we must die to save, then dying is a blessing.
An increase in cockroaches is not revival. Revival is when they are transformed and become people.
God created people on the sixth day, and the first thing He commanded was rest. Rest is not doing nothing but believing in the Lord and dwelling in Him. The Lord does it. The Almighty Lord does it.

Everyone looks so deep and precious. There was a time when I was humble trying to do well and loved trying to be excellent. But walking the journey of faith, I see that the Lord is love, and so I become love. It is a great mistake to be stingy with the word 'I love you.' If you confess to those near you that you love them, darkness withdraws and the kingdom of heaven comes. It's true; do it right now.
Without the prayers of the laborers and the grace of the Lord, I cannot take even one more step, and this is not a limitation but a comfort to me.

Sometimes after staying up for several nights preparing, I am not used. Of course. It is because we seek to save lives and souls, not to satisfy people. Being able to discard what is precious is faith.

Looking at what is near shakes you. It means you cannot go straight. This is why beginner drivers zigzag on the road. Because they look at things too close... If you keep your eyes on the Lord, you will not be shaken. There is no reason to be shaken.
A person caught in a downpour is no longer afraid of drizzle. A person satisfied with the Lord is someone who has nothing more to lose. Holding onto Jesus is enough.
Pride causes wrong judgments, maintains wrong emotional states, and causes deception and being deceived.
Do not be afraid, only believe.

The only power given to all believers is to return to the gospel. It is not reacting according to your own thoughts and feelings but returning to the gospel of shed blood. The gospel means returning to Jesus, away from self-centered thinking. There is no salvation except in Jesus.

In the last days, many of God's people are needed. Through people who respond with faith and pray with love, the Lord will show miracles and power. I earnestly pray that I may become God's designer, God's engineer, God's teacher, God's son, God's daughter.
When passing through difficult times, I pray this prayer. Put your face to the ground. 'Make me even lower, so I may become even humbler.' Face down.

Living by faith does not mean at the end laying down your life. At the beginning, you are already dead, so there is no more life to lay down. Besides the Lord in heaven, what else is there to hope for?

When passing through the wilderness, it is actually easier to entrust yourself to the Lord. Because you experience firsthand that it is impossible anyway, and that the Lord's handling is completely safe.

Weariness and deprivation cannot hinder faith. If what I desire is the Lord, I want 'whether I live or die, only the Lord is honored within me.' Those who seek the Lord's will cannot be stopped by the world.

Faith is believing two things: the assurance of His presence and companionship that 'He surely exists,' and the assurance of trust and response that 'He rewards those who seek Him.' God chooses the detailed options, and we enjoy the joy.
To open the parachute of faith, you must jump off the cliff. From St. MARTIN
If I had one drop of compassion and a tear, it came from the Lord.
Sorry, simple, surprise, sweet, smile—attitudes surpass credentials.
Be bold. Be bold as one who has overcome the world. The Lord has overcome the world.

Look to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith. Faith is not believing in your own convictions. It is not believing that you will marry this year or buy a house. True faith is believing in Jesus. It means that the Jesus you behold is with you.
Gospel_and_Cross: Never tear down the altar. 'They have torn down Your altars and killed Your prophets with the sword' - 1 Kings 19:14. 1. It was because of the altar that sinful humans could approach God. 2. Also, a holy God spoke to inadequate humans through prophets. 3. Tearing down the altar and killing the prophets was a satanic strategy and a clever sin seeking total (two-way) disconnection from God. 4. Preventing people from coming to the throne of grace through the cross and blocking them from receiving mercy and grace is exactly what Satan wants. 5. Therefore, any ministry or pursuit lacking the blood of the cross is effectively an own goal.
Reset & Reloaded. Before the cross, for whatever reason or story, everything is reset by the love of Jesus. This is because nothing takes priority over knowing Jesus and making Him known.

The power of change. Change begins with the transformation of the person standing in front. My own repentance must come first. 'Change' is not just difficult; it is 'impossible.' This is because it is a fruit that only the Lord can produce. Therefore, where there is change and testimony, willing hearts are established. 'I planted, Apollos watered, but God gave the increase. So then neither he who plants is anything, nor he who waters, but God who gives the increase. Now he who plants and he who waters are one, and each one will receive his own reward according to his own labor. For we are God’s fellow workers; you are God’s field, you are God’s building.' - 1 Corinthians 3:6-9

Let the essence win. Even if you receive immense blessings and prayers, if you don't have Jesus, it's just a fake. Even if no specific existence threatens you, if you don't hold onto the cross, you will surely perish. What God has requested is not to be anxious over non-essential circumstances and reactions, but to focus and strive for the essence, which must be Jesus. What is most urgent for you is not external 'favor' or 'threats,' but whether you can 'take up the cross.' Therefore, holy brothers, partakers of the heavenly calling, consider the Apostle and High Priest of our confession, Christ Jesus. - Hebrews 3:1

The suffering of the cross. A particular reason the cross was difficult is that, historically, prisoners were stripped of all their clothes. However, it is said that Jesus did not mind this. Thus, true love is bearing the shame. Let us fix our eyes on Jesus, the author and perfecter of our faith, who for the joy set before Him endured the cross, scorning its shame, and sat down at the right hand of the throne of God. - Hebrews 12:2
The eternal Gospel. We must continue to hear the eternal, glorious Gospel of the cross for all people so that we do not change and can live gloriously.

Addiction and the Gospel. No matter how much a person hooked on a game tries to quit, they cannot, but they quit when they find a more addictive game. Why can't people quit empty addictions? Because they haven't found anything more fun or interesting. What is more powerful than worldly addictions and gives true satisfaction is 'Jesus Christ.' He alone is the unique way, truth, and life for this broken generation. Call upon Jesus. Then you will live. Jesus said to him, 'I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.' - John 14:6

Go and make disciples (Matthew 28:19). The model shown in the Book of Acts was to equip and release farmers for the countryside, teachers for schools, bankers for finance, students for campuses, and legal professionals for the legal world so they could minister without hesitation. To 'go and make disciples' does not mean to simply fill seats with a Bible on Sundays, but to become a moving church that goes to parched lands, plants the cross, and prays for the Holy Spirit to descend. 'The churches of Asia greet you. Aquila and Priscilla greet you heartily in the Lord, with the church that is in their house.' - 1 Corinthians 16:19. 'Greet the brethren who are in Laodicea, and Nymphas and the church that is in his house.' - Colossians 4:15

A rare father. Knowledge and titles may be flashy, but sacrifice is difficult. Life must beget life and blood must be shed for the Gospel to bear fruit. That is why such occurrences are not common. 'For though you might have ten thousand instructors in Christ, yet you do not have many fathers.' - 1 Corinthians 4:15

Basic. The reason we cannot be faithful only to the essence of the cross is that there are too many institutions. The late Pastor Ha Yong-jo said, 'To maintain a large organization, you must have institutions and systems, and then you inevitably lose the essence.' This is because the object and purpose we sought to maintain from the beginning were something other than the cross.
Mandatory subject. The life of faith is not something done alone. You must have a community led by God that conceives the Gospel for you. This applies to every believer.

Moving Church. On a flight to New Orleans, during an unexpected delay, four elderly gentlemen offered a performance like a planned concert, delivering an acapella song that moved everyone. At any time and in any place, creating a throne for God and worshiping with all your heart is power; that is the moving church. That is the reason I am standing here now, and that is a life of being true light and salt. If you stay awake and prepared with the Gospel for a lifetime for the sake of a single moment, you will see God's glory in every era and space you inhabit, and you will become a moving church.

The power of loss. A Gospel that cannot move me is not the Gospel. If greed, people, recognition, or relationships move me, then those things are my own gospel and the objects of my service. When you lose those things, you see your own essence and realize what your true gospel was.

Simple. When you hold onto the cross and pray, the Gospel is glorified. The reason the originally glorious Gospel is not glorified is that we retreat from the front lines of prayer, and that happens because we give up on holding onto the cross.
When the Gospel becomes power. When you live according to the Gospel, the power of the Gospel works. The Gospel becomes as real as the life you live out.
True Gospel. Do not struggle to put on an act; come before the true Gospel that can change you.
Jesus said 'I am the bread of life' (John 6:35). Without the bread you feel hunger deep inside your heart. Jesus satisfies your deepest hunger in making relationship with God to be restored.

Do not be discouraged. Eventually, the sinful world flows toward one place, and there is only one way for the soul to live. Therefore, if you glorify the Gospel with your life, it is an authority greater than all things.
The reason prayer and worship fail. A Gospel that cannot change me can no longer be the Gospel. Only the Gospel can move me to my knees. Worship with the Gospel.

The best gift. What God truly wanted to give more than anything was Himself. That is why He gives us the cross, which reveals and gives Himself to us. To humans, God's greatest gift is His 'presence,' and the greatest gift a human can give is 'walking together.'
The loudest shout. God's love spoken through perfect silence on the cross.

Peace. Lacking peace means not being at rest, which consequently means indulging in sin. God has granted the unique peace today. 'Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, goodwill toward men!' - Luke 2:14

Recommending to a sinner. To a person who repeatedly collapses into empty sin that never satisfies, I recommend Jesus, who is eternal joy. It is the higher, absolute peace that is uniquely capable of breaking the chains of sin.
Merry Christmas. Characteristics of drifting away from Jesus are pride and doubt. The spirit of Christmas is humility and joy, for it is the starting point of the Gospel.

Reformation. People say that if Christianity discards money and becomes honest, recovery will occur. But we chose those things because the cross was not enough; if a human who cannot be satisfied by the cross discards money and fame, won't that empty space be filled with something more evil and stimulating? Religious acts without the cross are merely brilliant vices.

The reason for not being corrupted. Paul preached the cross in all his writings, words, and life. He remained uncorrupted until the moment his head was severed. It was because he stayed close to the cross.

The power of the precious blood. Nothing in this world can wash away sin. Sin will surely find us out. Only the precious blood washes away sin. Saying it can only be washed by the blood means that even the most terrifying sin is washed away if it is the precious blood.
A life without regret. Even if it means loss or further deprivation, I would make the same choice if I returned to that position. There is nothing more glorious than the Gospel of the cross.
A topic to deliver. Delivering the Word well is a matter of a spiritual gift. One does not save people through spiritual gifts. It is the cross that saves.

To you who have lost courage. In a world that cynically says that's just how the world is, we need people who can shake their heads and say the cross is not like that. It is not saying, 'Living by faith doesn't make a difference,' but clinging to the cross with a resolve to die.

Mountains are mountains, and water is water. The ability to see mountains as mountains and water as water is no small power. Even those who boast of knowing the Gospel often fail to see believers as believers and the church as the church. This is because believers and the church are new creatures that only become visible when I die and Jesus lives.

Youth Sunday 2nd Service (Nov 23, 2014) - We are the Lord's Moving Church. Just as a singer is one who breathes through songs and a climber is one who breaks through to the peak, a person of God is one who reveals God's inimitable glory through an unashamed Gospel in their heart wherever they go. https://vimeo.com/113124637

You are the Lord's Moving Church. I hope you remain awake and prepared with the Gospel for a lifetime for the sake of a single moment. I hope you can bloom and fall without hesitation while carrying the cross that must be borne. In every era and space where such a person exists, they will see God's glory and become a moving church.

Blessing and Curse. When a vision is heard, one lives, but when vision ceases, a person quickly becomes corrupt. A person of the Gospel and the proclamation of the Gospel are blessings. 'In the days of Zechariah, who had understanding in the visions of God, he sought God; and as long as he sought the LORD, God made him prosper.' - 2 Chronicles 26:5
The sickness called perfectionism. It's not that we fail to return to God because we can't fix ourselves. Only the cross can fix me. Only when we return to the Father does everything find its place.

Spiritual Matrix - Reformed since AD 30 every 500 years. Experience - Truth = Mysticism; Greed + Law = Authoritarianism; Greed + Comparison = Envy, Jealousy; Faith - Grace = Legalism; Faith - Belief = Humanism; Example + Influence = Change; Direction + Management = Labor; Company = Management + Investment; Church = Spirit + Sacrifice; Bank = Money + Time; Church = Jesus + Time. 'Destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.' - John 2:19
Radical Gospel, Radical Jajangmyeon.

The ability to give living water. A person who has never tasted living water can never give living water. They have no choice but to talk about it and throw stones. 'He who believes in Me, as the Scripture has said, out of his heart will flow rivers of living water.' - John 7:38
The power of the precious blood. The power of the blood is not a one-time license. It is something that must be constantly proclaimed, drunk, sprinkled, and applied.
A strong person. One who has decided to suffer hardship along with the Gospel.
The clear difference between religion and Jesus. Religion directs and compels, but Jesus modeled and inspired.

When suffering strikes. If you try to remove or solve the suffering, the situation often worsens. You should respond with a happiness more powerful than that suffering. That is why Jesus is the answer.

Please, give what is needed. If you are only busy trying to give souls what they want, it will inevitably become an awkward ballroom dance in outdated clothes. You must supply what is needed, not what is wanted. Only Jesus can fill the thirst and emptiness for which they themselves do not know the reason. Jesus said, 'They do not need to go away. You give them something to eat.' - Matthew 14:16

Witnessing the Gospel is not difficult. It is simply impossible. Witnessing the Gospel is not hard; it is impossible. it is not a realm manageable by my own strength or wisdom. It belongs to revelation, delivering what God told us to do and what He told us to proclaim.

A sad masquerade wearing a mask of holiness. Unless you admit that you are an existential sinner and that picking off a few fruits of sin doesn't remove the root, the laborious and sad masquerade will not end. It is not a matter of 'will' but a matter of dying before the 'Gospel.'

If you lose the essence, you become miserable. When a nation, company, or family loses its essence, everyone suffers. The same applies to the church. If you lose the cross, there is nothing more miserable.
Choose the cross. You must choose to react with the cross. This is because the cross is the completion of salvation, as well as its conception.

Struggle and the Cross. God did not struggle; He ruled by His sovereignty. The pinnacle of that rule is the cross. Therefore, a believer lives by the cross and dies by the cross. If you live and die that way, there is resurrection.
The reason I am not ashamed of the Gospel. The Gospel collides and crashes. it tells you that a certain path is not the way and gives you the way to live. That is why the Gospel is truly radical.
