The power to win simply. It is hearing the Gospel every day and confirming it in your life.
I have nothing to give. That is why I am happy. 'Silver and gold I do not have, but what I do have I give to you: In the name of Nazareth Jesus Christ, rise up and walk.' - Acts 3:6

Do not confirm yourself through ministry. You will become a servant of man rather than a servant of God. And you will frequently experience emptiness and pride. My existence is by the grace of God. This means the cross is my identity—the one that saved a sinner like me.

Do not envy their exclusive leagues. The reason Jesus came like a root out of dry ground with no beauty is to deliver life to those marginalized people who couldn't join 'their league.' True influence that breaks the gates of hell and rescues souls comes from the surrender of rights and the recognition of sovereignty. It means to carry the cross and walk into the dry land.

Ministry is Delivery. It is delivering God's grace, that is, Himself and His presence. It is being with Him, not just providing information or utility about Him. Therefore, the deliverer's responsibility is to faithfully travel between God's post office and the home of the soul.

The Gospel we preached to you. The first word we gave was the cross. And the word we delivered again was the cross. Also, the word we will deliver in the future is the cross. 'But even if we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel to you than what we have preached to you, let him be accursed.' - Galatians 1:8

The reason for praise. It is not because I received an answer or received grace, but because of Jesus. It is because Jesus is the one who gave the life of the only begotten Son for me. That is enough.

The definition of heresy. It is requiring something else in addition to the Lord Jesus Christ. 'Galatians 1:8 - But even if we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel to you than what we have preached to you, let him be accursed.'

Prayer pulled up to heaven. Prayer ascends as if being sucked into a vacuum rather than falling short of the ceiling. It is because the Lord intends to save souls. Ah, I am looking forward to the retreat.
Similarities and differences between the Gospel and sales. You deliver it coolly but pray with tears.

The reason of moving on. When you feel worthless, what you need is to receive the Lord's forgiveness. The fastest way to get rid of 'a sense of unworthiness' is to trust in Christ's forgiveness. And He is ready to forgive at all times.

True victory. Rather than paying attention to the enemy, it is giving your heart to the Lord and not compromising. What is certain is that the enemy will gain nothing they desire. This is because Jesus bore the cross.
Weakness becomes hope. It is rising not by my own unqualified strength, but only by the precious blood of Jesus. Then your weakness will conversely become hope.
Proclaim, do not be intimidated, and proclaim simply. Evangelism and missions are not begging; they are gifting a privilege.
A true leader. A leader is not someone who provides a solution. It is someone who delivers the Lord, who became the unique Way.

Do not delay, do it now. You must repent and be filled with the Holy Spirit. If you cast away all wickedness and call upon the name of the Lord Jesus to be declared guiltless, you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit as the Scripture says. Do it right now.

Fundamental sin. It is not just the 'fruit theft' of eating from the tree of knowledge, but 'selfishness' where I become God and dislike keeping God in my heart, and 'idolatry' of serving the self. 'He died for all, that those who live should live no longer for themselves, but for Him who died for them and rose again.' - 2 Corinthians 5:15
The reason the Lord came. He came to be ignored, abandoned, and crucified on the cross. So, isn't it more glorious to follow Jesus and live that way than to be welcomed?
Cain's sinful desire. If you hide your wounds, your offering will not be accepted. Such sinful desires must be confessed to the Lord and ruled by grace. They do not disappear; they are covered.

Do not fear testifying. For a community to have good faith means there are believers who exert influence within that community. If everyone follows the world, the Gospel does not flow. Do not fear rejection and disregard; strive to testify to and love Jesus.

It seems extremely religious, but it's not. You just liked the person and liked the people. Faith is not liking people; it is liking Jesus, and it is good when Jesus is revealed in fellowship because of Him. An easy way to tell is to see who is being testified to.
Try living according to the Gospel once. You will stop whining and realize what true victory is.
What is the Gospel? The cross testifies to two things: the fact that I am an atrociously wicked sinner who cannot be washed, and that I will live if I hold onto the cross where Jesus shed His blood.
Without the Gospel, one suffers disgrace. Suffering disgrace is not because one doesn't know the Gospel. It is because one does not live according to the Gospel.
The reason for calling. Do not just subsist, live eternally. Eternal life means winning with the fullness of life in every area.
It is truth, not a suggestion. Do not react to suggestions; reach a conclusion through the cross. Suggestions are lies and greed.

Washing in blood is dwelling in the light. Even if you fail and fall today, please never give up on becoming God's good people. It is not those with little sin, but those who come out with their sin who have fellowship in the light. 'But if we walk in the light as He is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus Christ His Son cleanses us from all sin.' - 1 John 1:7

Outside the gate. Jesus suffered outside the city gate because He came as the Lamb to provide forgiveness of sins and salvation. Therefore, to obtain life, we too must carry Jesus' cross, reject worldly glory and human popularity, and go outside. 'Therefore let us go forth to Him, outside the camp, bearing His reproach.' - Hebrews 13:13
Grace that is not obvious. The grace we enjoy now is not a given. It means someone shed blood. The completion of grace bears fruit only when we cherish the shedding of blood and are thankful.
God's special person. Someone who knows how much God loved a person like this cannot easily ignore or hate others. Because God loved them specially.

The amazing secret of the precious blood. A characteristic of the few who excel at languages is that they acquire the language within a context. Although Jesus is the one who shed the blood, the one who sprinkles the blood must be me, like Moses and the Israelites observing the Passover. I will tell you the secret. Confessing in detail before the Lord how you feel tempted by sin and how you fall is sprinkling the blood. I hope you sprinkle it well. It will be washed well.
We have only one. We have only one Lord. Many were called lords, but the Lord who wore the crown of thick thorns is only Jesus Christ. I boast only of Him.

At the end of Passover. Since the Lamb of God who was promised to come has arrived, a true Passover is observed. Since we receive atonement through that final Passover, we now commemorate and proclaim life through the Eucharist until He comes. Thus, the place of the last Passover became the first Eucharist. Now, the place of repentance will become a place of victory and life.
Life becomes difficult because we try to receive love. Even though we were sent to love...

To be hated. If a Christian is to be hated, let it be for the sake of truth. Because Jesus was like that too. When you receive such hatred, do not be ashamed, but rather be proud. 'The world cannot hate you, but it hates Me because I testify of it that its works are evil.' - John 7:7

The power of the cross. People say it was no use believing or praying. We must ask back exactly what and how much they were holding onto. The horrific cross solves the problem of the most powerful enemy, sin, and results in salvation. Yet, how can a believer collapse due to relationships and circumstances? They either held onto something else or hoped to hold onto it; they were not crucified with Christ.

Radical Gospel. It is nonsense to say one can change the world while their own body is not free from the sins of the world. Succumbing to the lusts of the flesh and falling for worldly temptations happens because the Gospel has been diluted. The Gospel is that the Son of God bore the rugged cross. Faith is living in accordance with the value of that blood.

Earthly work, Heavenly work. It is a contradiction for someone who finds the work of the Kingdom and its righteousness—heavenly work—tedious on this earth to be granted an eternal heaven. The statement that one believes without having fellowship with Christ is also sophistry. Heaven is a place where only Christ becomes joy, so it is a place suitable for such a person. We must repent.

Complexity is evil. Paul warns against evil and false teachers who complicate the Gospel. Faith is simple. Complexity that prevents one from holding onto the cross is an evil that has lost the essence.
To succumb to vain things... the Gospel is too glorious, Jesus is extremely beautiful, and God's glory is infinite. I will choose this side.

Not rejection, but reception. After the incident of the tree of knowledge, God drives out Adam and Eve (Gen 3:24). However, looking below verse 4, He 'accepts' Abel's sacrifice. Between them is the sacrifice of the Lamb.

Life is not romantic. To make life bloom from death, there must be the love, devotion, and sacrifice of a grain of wheat that rots. If you lack such a heart, it is right to feel moved and sorry in such a state.

The ability to shed heavy burdens. No matter how desperately you try to shed a heavy burden, it won't fall off. A heavy burden is not shed; it is exchanged for an easy and light burden. If success is laboring and bearing a heavy burden to avoid becoming miserable, the cross gives the courage to be okay even if one becomes a lowly existence in the world. A person with the courage not to fear becoming a miserable existence also receives the grace to run and be embraced in the Lord's arms. 'Come to Me, all you who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest. Take My yoke upon you and learn from Me, for I am gentle and lowly in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For My yoke is easy and My burden is light.' - Matthew 11:28, 30

The reason for being anxious despite success. Everyone rejoices at winning a silver medal, but Korean athletes cry. In a society that only remembers the first place, everyone tries to succeed. However, even if you achieve some of what you and your family want, you are still anxious. Because you are not a victor. That is why taking up the cross brings true peace.

Unique grounds. Obtaining life and gaining salvation in the midst of trouble is not due to other conditions I possess. The unique ground of my salvation is the body and blood of Jesus given as the Passover Lamb.

He provides a way of escape. God does not allow us to be tempted beyond what we can bear. At the point where it becomes unbearable, He provides a way of escape. Usually, this is thought of as a degree of relief from suffering, but rather, it is the path to Jesus, who became the Way and the unique refuge of escape.
Intention of censure. Beware of the evil of sin, but believe in the power of the Gospel. If this is not done, one despairs while repenting. The cross is eternal power for everyone.

True salvation is needed. Salvation is not about suddenly getting money or having a problem you were agonizing over solved. Salvation comes when you receive forgiveness of sins and are forgiven. Therefore, in the midst of a collapse, you do not hold onto people but go to God.

A voice crying in the wilderness. When asked 'Who are you?', John the Baptist replied that he was 'the voice of one crying.' He is a truly great person. For he could become a voice and disappear while introducing the Lord. He said, 'I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness: Make straight the way of the LORD, as the prophet Isaiah said.' - John 1:23

The Gospel of the cross. Testifying to the cross leads to criticism. In the midst of that suffering, the Gospel of the cross is testified to more strongly and exerts more influence. However, compromises made to avoid trouble will bring about the death of the church.

Receiving grace because I am a sinner. A sinner escapes the guilt of sin and is justified freely by believing in Jesus. However, the sinful nature does not disappear. Therefore, we rely on the precious blood of the cross and move toward a holy life. When I admit that I am a justified sinner, I realize I am a being in desperate need of mercy and grace. What is needed is not 'improvement,' but 'infinite grace.'
On the day he achieved the greatest success of his life, Peter left everything behind and followed Jesus.
The way to live with unchanging faith - just keep burning. The power of the Lord's precious blood is eternal. It just needs to be what I speak of forever.
My unchangeable conclusion: The Cross

The reason for going to a hospital is to remove the root of a serious illness even by undergoing surgery. Going to the snack bar, having tea with the doctor, and visiting other patients in the hospital are not fundamental. We are the ones who must lie on the operating table as if dead and undergo major surgery to live. We must pass through the cross. In the church, we must continue the work of washing with the precious blood and receiving the Holy Spirit.
Do not forget to rely on the precious blood.
Gospel 6 God's original form, O youth, go out into the world and become fire

People say that the Gospel is perfect and God is perfect, but I am not. On the contrary, I become 'the inadequate me' because of the perfection of the Gospel and the perfection of God. It happens because the Lord chose me.
There is no discrimination in the Gospel. Whether Jew or Greek, even if it is a life at rock bottom according to human evaluations.
The Gospel must be proclaimed to me every moment. That is the way to live.

Leaving the Gospel does not only mean becoming greatly fallen and dissipated. If there is no Jesus in the heart and no thrill, one has already left, no matter how distinguished a religious appearance they maintain while sitting. Regarding this fundamental question, the Lord does not give up on the youth group, and He will use the youth who humble themselves before this question.

The most basic characteristics of the Gospel are that it is grace, not my merit, and that it is change. A Gospel that cannot change me is not the Gospel. If the Son of God gave His life to save me, such change must surely follow.
Characteristics of the Gospel are that there is joy, it testifies only to the cross of Jesus Christ, and human merit, righteousness, and pride are fundamentally denied.
Let the Gospel decide for me.

What is needed for the prodigals who left because they disliked the Gospel is the Gospel again. There can be no restoration or salvation apart from Jesus. That is why Christians are persistent. Regarding Jesus.
If it weren't for the Gospel, it would just be an event with nothing in common, but souls standing before that Gospel become family.

Evangelical complex - giving bread while preaching the Gospel. Finding comfort in a balanced ministry. True Gospel - total salvation and quite practical. It is achieving the opportunity to believe in Jesus as Savior and cultivate wheat with wisdom and holiness. A Christian's unique competitiveness is holiness and wisdom. Like doves and serpents.

An external change without an essential change is one of two things: one is plastic surgery, and the other is hypocrisy. An essential change is only possible through the Gospel of the blood. That is grace.
I look to the Lord because I have infinitely many deficiencies, much sin, and many flaws. For He came not to call the righteous, but sinners.
In the end, I see the image of Jesus in the inadequate disciples. Because Jesus loved them by shedding His blood.

The Christmas Spirit. The Lord said the Son of Man came for two reasons: to serve and to give Himself as a ransom. Then there will be peace and glory in heaven. So, it is said that on Christmas Eve during WWII, German and Allied forces put down their guns and sang carols together.

The Gospel must be continuously testified to everyone, not just to unbelievers. Regardless of who they are, it is natural for a slump to come if they fall away from the Gospel. The mistake of lethargy is treating the Gospel as just a ticket to heaven. 'So, as much as is in me, I am ready to preach the gospel to you who are in Rome also.' - Romans 1:15

Fire conquers fire. The fire of revival conquers the fire of war, and the fire of faith conquers the fire of the flesh. The fire falling on the altar remained only on the sacrifice, and the wrath poured out on the cross was borne by Jesus alone. Let us become lives that act as lightning rods.

The dignity of a single verse of Scripture. Tim Tebow, a person who has exerted the greatest influence in American sports history; the verse he presents is uniquely John 3:16. Many verses are not needed for obedience. A single word changes history beyond a single life.
If you criticize, you change into a more evil form than the person being criticized. Jesus never rebuked the weak. If you love with the Lord's love rather than your own strength, miracles happen.

The Apostle Paul said he was not ashamed of the Gospel. It is a confession that can only emerge when there is a conviction that the cross of Jesus is all one needs. It means, 'Because I have gained the cross of Jesus, I have all the joy I can have in life within Jesus.' If there are still many things you want in this world even after having the so-called Gospel... how is that the Gospel?

People practice a love that pursues value. It ends pointlessly, never able to reach a conclusion. However, the love the Father gave us is a love that bestows value. It establishes the flawed, saves the hurting, and enriches the poor. I hope you become lovers who bestow value rather than pursuing it.
People want to be moved. Because the world is busy, parched, and lacks truth. Jesus is an eternal thrill for all people. If you are moved by Jesus, you become a life that moves others.
True words of love. Say the words that Jesus, who is in you, wants to say to that person.

People feel frustrated. It is because the essence is not spoken of. If the Gospel of the cross disappears for a believer, they will be very frustrated. If there is one thing that can uniquely distinguish the church from the world, it is the blood Gospel of Jesus' cross. Let us repent.

A person is never changed just because their mistakes were pointed out. On the contrary, true change occurs when they are forgiven. Jesus came to forgive and soaked us, who were like dry nails in His heart, with His precious blood. I can live today because there were people who accepted me, and especially because there was Jesus.
Do not be someone who circulates information about people. You will be caught up in groundless quarrels. The Lord only allowed us to circulate the Gospel.
Love inevitably involves sacrifice.
In fact, many people thought to be bad are not bad, but their hearts are hurting. They are friends who need a lot of love. Only God's love can establish them and make them whole.
Ministry is not about intimidating or squeezing something out. As the Lord always was with His disciples, it is about overflowing. The love of Christ compels us.
When the light of the Lord's truth shines on the dark shadows of life, people hurt and try to hide. God is not trying to interfere, but to forgive sins and make them whole.

Accepting grace. Does the Lord love even a person like that? Yes, of course He loves them. I know because He loves a person like me. And I know because He bore the cross for that person as well as for me.

Peace cannot be found through avoidance. There is a life lived by greed and a life lived by grace. If you live by your own ego, the collapse is severe when the storm comes, and you fall into ruin. This is because you want peace but prescribe painkillers and counterfeits provided by the world, avoiding the wind and rain and fleeing from the situation. However, the peace Jesus gives is fundamentally different from the peace the world gives. 'Peace I leave with you, My peace I give to you; not as the world gives do I give to you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.' - John 14:27

Beware of the new Ransomware. Never click on suspicious attachments. These days, there are viruses coming via email attachments under the names FedEx, DHL, and outstanding invoices. A regular virus is okay because you can still save the data, but the one called Cryptolocker encrypts the files, eventually wiping out all photos and documents on your PC. If you clicked it, switch off immediately and find an expert.

Types of fights. Christians fight the good fight. A good fight is a fight to save lives, look toward the glory of the conversion of souls, and bring about restoration. Any other fight is an evil fight.

The Gospel told by John. In the Gospel of John, John tells those who do not believe to believe in Jesus. Also, in John's epistles, he exhorts believers to love. In Revelation, he tells those facing the end times to 'overcome.' Believe the Gospel, obtain eternal life, enjoy that eternal life, and win.

What appears in people who sinned with the tree of knowledge is 'self-seeking.' Because of this, they envy, quarrel, and even commit murder (James 4:2). Killing the self is not about practicing a discipline or gaining an enlightenment. If the death of the self were possible on the human side, Jesus' cross would be in vain. It is only believing in what God has predetermined on the cross. It is not 'doing,' but 'taking,' 'enjoying,' and 'considering.' You only need to 'count' or 'reckon' and 'believe' in the Lord. Please look upon, reckon, consider, and count. 'Knowing this, that our old man was crucified with Him, that the body of sin might be done away with, that we should no longer be slaves of sin. Likewise you also, reckon yourselves to be dead indeed to sin, but alive to God in Christ Jesus our Lord.' - Romans 6:6, 11
When the Holy Spirit comes, He makes us know Jesus more and also makes us testify about the world. True work of the Holy Spirit leads us to a deep knowledge and understanding of Jesus.

The difference between an angel and a demon. An angel became a demon when he wanted to be worshiped instead of being a worshiper. My avoidance of the Gospel for the sake of a moderate relationship is the operation of my nature seeking to be worshiped without being criticized. Open your mouth and just preach!

The world boasts of things that will perish, but there are actually two kinds of truly strong people. One is a strong person who has become low in Jesus, and the second is a weak person who has become bold in Jesus. 'Let the lowly brother glory in his exaltation, but the rich in his humiliation, because as a flower of the field he will pass away.' - James 1:9-10

People with power in the world are weak people. Someone outside the Gospel is so weak. They are weak people who are terrifyingly worried about car accidents, cancer, and their families. The Gospel is a lifetime special contract covering both this life and the next.

A story about the retreat. The church (organizer) is prepared. How about you? There are things in life that must not be missed. At the acceptable time, on the day of salvation, you must seize the opportunity given by the Lord.

Humiliation is an emotion felt only by humans. A dog can be happy, angry, sad, and joyful, but it doesn't feel embarrassed. Because shame came as a result of sin. Someone who suffers this shame suffers internal wounds that make them violent or lethargic enough to give up on life. The power to remove this shame and instead make one dance with a crown of flowers belongs only to the Lamb. 'All my shame has disappeared through the precious blood of Jesus.' - Hymn 282
If God had come in the form of God, we would all have been judged and perished. God came in the body of a human. That person is Jesus, and so we were saved.
If the blood Gospel of the cross can be testified and the Holy Spirit can descend, then for the glory of the Lord, whether living or dying.
The cross, under the shadow of the cross, there is life.

The cross takes precedence over all emotions and precedes all reactions. The cross is the Lord's unique and eternal conclusion. A person who lives and dies by the cross is free from pain and anguish and is truly happy. The cross is not a joke. It is more of 'everything' than what I thought was everything. Before the cross, all desires are rejected and all requests of the heart fall out of priority. I can't sleep because my heart is overwhelmed by the fact that the almighty, holy One 'just couldn't give up on me.' 'I will save you at any cost.' Before that cross, awkward pride, empty human expectations, and rotten recognition all become refuse. If you hold onto that low and rugged cross, you become higher, so the power of sin cannot reach you and retreats.

The cross is the best conclusion given by the Lord. If it were a trial that could not be overcome by the cross, the Lord would not have borne it from the beginning. The spirit of the cross is, 'I can't see you die; I'll save you no matter what the cost.'
No matter how great a human is, there is no possibility at all. The only alternative is Jesus Christ. Advantage without Jesus is a prelude to ruin. - Romans 3:21-22

My purpose is my calling. The one who sent me to this place is God. What God expects is not the fulfillment of ambition or a showy success. Not only am I not perfect in my religious character and personality, and deserve criticism, but I just need to carry out the work I was given through the merit of Jesus' precious blood. It is to plant the cross in this land, baptize in the Lord's name, and cry out for the Holy Spirit to descend. Then I will be truly happy.

Evil must be conquered. But if you conquer evil with evil, it is not winning, but losing. Evil must be conquered with good. The greatest victory is mercy and forgiveness. That is why the cross is the greatest victory. 'Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.' - Romans 12:21

True love. Being loved is a very good thing. But you don't really know when you're just receiving. You get to know as you love. You realize it when you see the price God the Father paid for how much He loved us. 'Behold what manner of love the Father has bestowed on us, that we should be called children of God! Therefore the world does not know us, because it did not know Him.' - 1 John 3:1

Glorious Gospel. The Gospel is glorious. The Gospel was God's best and was perfect for us. Because Jesus is the Gospel. Since He gave Himself to us, no greater testimony exists. 'For I am not ashamed of the gospel of Christ, for it is the power of God at work, saving everyone who believes.' - Romans 1:16

The Gospel's total. No matter how strong and organized the opponent is, and even if our situation is so difficult that defeat seems imminent, the Gospel has never been defeated. 'The Spirit of the Lord is upon Me, because He has anointed Me to preach the gospel to the poor; He has sent Me to heal the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to set at liberty those who are oppressed; to proclaim the acceptable year of the Lord.' - Luke 4:18-19

A certain British man was traveling to America across the Atlantic in difficult circumstances. Whenever it was mealtime, this poor man would go up to the deck with cheese and biscuits and eat alone, and soon even these ran out, and he was so hungry he was at the point of not being able to get up. The captain asked why he went up to the deck every mealtime, and the man said he had no money. Captain: 'The fare you paid includes all the meals.' It is said that this British man was so happy he ran to the dining room and ate. He arrived in America after that final meal. Jesus paid it all on the cross.
The camp of darkness has collapsed. We have won. 'So the great dragon was cast out, that serpent of old, called the Devil and Satan, who deceives the whole world.' - Revelation 12:9

No matter what disappointment and frustration come, and even if the time of realistic difficulties in the world passes, 'the power of the precious blood that sets one free from sin' is the 'eternally unchanging truth.'
Powerful Gospel. Fellow workers must love each other and be one. Otherwise, every message delivered will be just an empty echo.
There is no one without passion. The problem is not going all the way to the end. Jesus never stopped. He advanced until the very end and said on the cross, 'It is finished.'
They say Jesus alone is enough. But it doesn't seem that way. If you live by the Gospel, you are happy even if you die today. Are you sufficiently happy? If not, Jesus is not enough for you.

Jesus lived as a carpenter until the age of 30. He must have been a good carpenter. He would have been kind, diligent, and would not have overcharged his customers. Since He came to the world to humble Himself and serve, He would have lived that way even as a worker.

Jesus' death followed a public and sustained method of execution. It is because the death of the Son of God is an immense declaration against darkness and death that cannot be hidden or bound, and it becomes the power that sets one free from sin.

The reason Jesus came is to destroy the works of the devil. Calling us is also about saving lives and crushing the darkness, and paradoxically, this work becomes most powerful when one gives up oneself.

Jesus did not come to improve attitudes or morality. He came to enable us sinners, who were helplessly acting as slaves to the devil because of the law of sin and death he wields, to live by the life of God. The Holy Spirit came because of the cross, and because this Counselor gives God's life and the power to live by that life, He is called the 'Spirit of Life,' and further, it was called the 'law (power) of the Spirit of life' (Rom 8:2). If you dwell in the flesh, you cannot please God, but if you dwell in the Holy Spirit 'in Jesus,' you live by God's life and God's power, not by the old sinful life. Faith is believing that.

In the past, when offering sacrifices, one had to catch a cow, a sheep, or at least a goat. However, to us who lived thoroughly in darkness and could not offer any of those things, the Light has come. Not by my own unqualified strength, but only by the precious blood of Jesus...
Only through the Son can one go to the Father, and only through the inspiration of the Holy Spirit can one believe in the Son. Not by might nor by power.

True Gospel. The world is not moved by the height of church buildings, positions, or power. It wants to hear the true Gospel. A pastor's wife preached the Gospel to a taxi driver. He was indifferent. But she added this: 'I am on my way home after being diagnosed with cancer at the hospital. Sir, believe in Jesus. There is definitely a heaven after death. You must believe in Jesus.' The taxi driver listened. A believer's more shining glory and influence is 'overcoming,' not 'good fortune.' Like Daniel resolving... (Daniel 1:8)

What is more important than appearance is the soft embrace of a mother. The ability to see value deeply takes us to a glorious place. We buy rice looking at the price, but a farmer looks at a single grain of rice and reads the story of whether it is Gyeonggi rice or Chungnam rice, and whether it overcame drought to grow. If you know the essence of the Gospel, you read the beginning of salvation in a place you thought was the end. The Gospel makes one reject the palace and head for the wilderness.

It is impossible for us to drive out darkness. We do not discard greed and sin through our effort and resolve; they are discarded when we stay close to Jesus. When we seek the Lord who is Light, darkness is driven away faster than the speed of light. That will be the strength to rise again from personal failure.

We were not called to prove our own righteousness (justification) on this earth. We were only called to testify to His cross. The Pharisees clung to human recognition to prove their own righteousness and lived based on those standards, but the Lord silently bore the cross and fulfilled the Father's will. Do not try to be recognized by proving yourself, but humble yourself and testify. In one's youth, it will not be easy to resist the temptation to prove oneself.

Our predecessors in faith could not deny the power of the precious blood, so they had to wander in caves, be imprisoned, and even lay down their lives. Please proclaim that precious blood of the cross again. Since human problems are problems of sin, only the precious blood solves them. It was delivered as a life-giving Gospel.
Jesus, who is both the Lion of the tribe of Judah and the Lamb, heard every criticism leveled against Himself but was resolutely angry at challenges toward the Father.

Have you ever seen a music critic perform a song properly? We were not called to evaluate and critique, but to sing of life. Regarding the crimes that have existed since the Garden of Eden and the evil that will continue in the future, what we must hold onto is the 'Gospel.' The Gospel is enough.

Popularity does not necessarily mean truth. An action movie is so, so fun, but no one watches it again calling it a masterpiece. What remains after time passes is not popularity, but life. Life is born again when blood is shed.

There is always misunderstanding in life. Among them, malicious rumors are hard to bear. Such false rumors disappear in a few months. As long as I don't dig around and explain... the reason for that is that Jesus didn't bear the cross because of such false rumors. It's because Jesus' cross was for me, who is incomparably more evil than those malicious rumors.
Life is not about accumulating, but about scattering and giving away. Giving away is making a path. Do not defend, but love. Along that path, the life of Jesus will flow.

Whether you admit it or dislike it, standing before the Lord, 'I am a sinner.' Furthermore, it doesn't end there; the Lord calls that atrocious sinner a 'fisher of men' and personally leads and transforms them.
Do not believe your own psychological state; believe the conclusion God gave through the cross. One wins because they believe in and accept that victory.

When you feel like an insignificant person, rejoice. Now it is time for the Lord to work. The fact that there is no goodness or righteousness is the beginning of the Gospel, and that Gospel must still be held onto today.

Please do not be anxious because of a wrong result. Rather, the Lord does not condemn but fixes the causes, wounds, anger, loneliness, and obsessions behind the wrong result. He did not come to call the righteous, but sinners. If you were healthy, why would you have needed Jesus? - Matthew 9:12

If you went to do business and left nothing behind on the way back, you did business very well. If you testified only to Jesus and nothing remained while walking the path of faith, you truly walked the right path.

Today, I see the unfortunate reality of many believers living lives without the power of Christ and without life. That is because there is no power of life. Why is there no power of life? Life comes from the power of the resurrection, and there is no resurrection without the cross. If you refuse to take up the cross, the work of life does not occur.

During my 25 years of faith and ministry, I have seen many young people who were in heaven-like grace lose their faith and wander. And I heard the Lord's tearful cry for those young people. In a dormitory room at Seoul Theological Seminary in 1991 and at a prayer center in Gyeongnam in 1990. His heart was always like that. 'Did the world give you true happiness? I do not want to lose you.'
My heart is overwhelmed. It is because the Gospel of the cross is glorious. I proclaim that Gospel without being ashamed, for it is the power of God for the salvation of everyone who believes.
The reason previous fear changes into my prayer and deep sighs change into my song is that I unpacked all my burdens under the cross. Hallelujah~♥

Through the precious blood shed by the Son Jesus, who was in the perfect love of the almighty Father, He showed His greatest love. By the power of the blood, the power of sin is crushed, all trials are overcome, and one is not deceived by the enemy's lies. The power of the precious blood is the greatest victory and power for both God and man.
I believe in the almighty God and in His only Son Jesus Christ. I believe in the Holy Spirit, the forgiveness of sins, and eternal life.

I will be a witness every day by proclaiming and praying. From Hymn 505. Today at the company, we have Session 3 of 'Invitation to Happiness' and the confession more precious than a full load of fish from Luke 5:1-11. Please pray that we live a life of proclaiming, praying, and being witnesses.
Revelation that came in the midst of despair, Christ alone.
The correct answer is, of course, 'Jesus Christ.'

True faith is looking to the Lord in the storm. The reason testifying to the cross receives intense resistance from darkness is that the Gospel of the cross is the most precious and valuable work. I hope you become servants of life whose hearts do not change and hold onto only the cross.
Jesus, who washed the disciples' feet, told us to wash the feet of our brothers and sisters in the same way. It doesn't mean their feet are dirty, but to wash away their sins and flaws.

Jesus didn't wash the disciples' feet because they were dirty. Bathing represents salvation, and washing feet represents repentance for daily sins. Someone who has been saved does not need to discuss salvation again. It was the last work the Lord performed. Repentance is important.

It is meaningless to judge, evaluate, and predict by mixing imagination with fragmented information. Who likes whom, how some family's child is, how a certain house's husband is, and how the in-laws are... we were not called to distribute groundless (substandard) information, but only to testify to the Gospel.

Liking and loving are different. Liking is being happy when together, while loving is sacrificing and expending oneself for that person. Do not stop at liking; love. God loved with His Son, the Holy Spirit loved with His companionship, and Jesus loved with the cross.

We cannot find ourselves in gaining a good car or a good house. Owning useless things or receiving envious looks does not change the essential value of my being. Those things are all jewelry boxes. However, a jewel is a jewel even if wrapped in tissue. It remains a jewel even if it falls into the mud. That is why Paul said we hold the jewel called Jesus in earthen vessels. Do not prove, but testify. You will be happy.
No one is free from the temptation of sin. That is why we must rely on the precious blood of the Lord. There is no sin the blood cannot wash, and no sin is washed apart from the blood.

It is an impossible thing for a sinful human to dwell in God and for that holy One to dwell in us. However, the one and only way is for me to also be nailed to the cross where He died for me. When crucified with Jesus, an impossible union occurs.

Knowing that one is a sinner is the first gate of the way of the cross. But you must not stop there. When the groan 'What shall I do?' comes because you are a sinner, you believe in Jesus, and at the cross, the old person dies and is resurrected as a new person. The statement that essence does not change by evaluation means becoming a completely new creature. By the Lord's grace.
Lord's precious blood, it has power. There is nothing more to say than that. No other name has been given to humans under heaven through which salvation may be obtained.

A heart that wants to give but cannot is deep love. There are many fools who have much but cannot love. Because they have no heart. You just need to feel sorry for them. It is healed by love. Love makes one believe. Love makes one hear. That is why someone who loves is happy even if they have nothing. I hope you all become young people who feel intense love and practice intense love.

The statement that the one who gives is more blessed than the one who receives means the principle that I first receive what I give to others. To show mercy, God first bestows mercy on me, and only when it overflows do I pour it out to others. That also applies to wounds. To give a wound, that wound must first dominate me. What will you give and what will you receive?
Since the Lord saved me, how can I remain silent?
I sow seeds according to the Lord's word, but it is God who makes them grow.

Paul discards the position of a lauded rabbi like refuse. It is because he saw the real thing in Damascus. Faith is not about not going, it's about not being able to go. It's because one has never seen the truth that fascinates them.

I preached the Gospel to a member who was rapidly drifting away from the Lord. 'Why have you become like this, you who used to be so moved and say the Lord is good with tears in His love?' That friend said, 'What has God ever done for me? He just blocked all my life.' As I see it, what that friend wanted was ambition and desire for a relationship the Lord did not lead, well~ the success he wanted. Poet Song Myung-hee once wrote a poem with the Lord's voice. How it must hurt God's heart when humans complain of lack though He gave His only Son; how it must hurt the Lord's soul when people deny and curse Him though He gave Himself.

It's already a pity that we can't even get close enough to the Lord; we don't need to take time to meditate on the works of Satan and filth. Jews seek a sign and Greeks seek wisdom, but we testify to and focus only on Jesus crucified. If you know Jesus, you already know everything and discern everything.

Since it is a life the Lord has temporarily entrusted to us, we must live meaningfully. Humbly and passionately... Jesus gave Himself for us. He died in our place to save us from all evil, to cleanse us, and to make us His people who strive to do good works. - Titus 2:14
For the perfect promise given by the Lord to appear not only after our death but in our current reality, we need faith and absolute obedience to the Word must follow.
The Lord is one who turns moments of distress and regret into a unfolding of salvation at His own level.
Faith in the Lord overcomes all things. It even overcomes death. Be bold. The Lord has overcome.
Relying on the Lord and with all my heart, I preached the Gospel. I had the opportunity to watch the Bridge video and preached it. I entrust it to the Lord.
Proclaiming the Lord's Gospel is not a difficult task. It is an impossible task. It is fundamentally impossible without the Lord's guidance and help.

A person of the Lord can never be inherently selfish. Because the Gospel is entirely altruistic. Even if an apple tree bears apples, it is not the tree that eats them. Others eat and rejoice. However, the owner cherishes that tree greatly and makes it even cleaner.

Someone who does not see the Lord's love also cannot see their own sins. It is only in the light of that love that one finally realizes that my sin is not just accidental misconduct in the past, but is inherent in my essential attitude of 'self-love.' So, it is when Jesus takes me to God's heart that I put my hand to my lips and groan, 'Woe is me, for I am undone! Because I am a man of unclean lips...' - Isaiah 6:5
Before the Lord's cross, all problems are small. I hope you rise and hold onto the cross.

When you recognize the Lord's sovereignty, you will see the Lord's work. God, who gave His Son on the cross, gives precious people to love and be loved by, work to serve, and a longing heart that I myself cannot understand. That is why I give my body.
Serving the people the Lord has entrusted is pouring out sweat, tears, and blood. Then many grains of wheat will return to the Lord.
It is infinitely precious just that the Lord called me. I find it so glorious to live with faith together with precious people. Let us glorify the Gospel.
There is power in the precious blood of the Lord.
Sunday ministry seems to have ended, but it is not over. I do not stop seeking and finding the Lord, and proclaiming and being a witness. Let's see it through to the end.

If I had died, I would have lived and others would have been changed. But that is not as easy as it sounds. Dying is power. Specifically, the power called faith. It is because one doesn't want to die unless they have faith that the Lord is the Lord of resurrection.

To say 'something unimportant is important' and 'something important is unimportant' is a lie and an error. In such places, truth is what is important. Power is not diluting the 'original power' of Jesus' cross. Holding onto the deep~ original (the cross) rather than a watered-down copy is the ace God uses in this dark world. 'But God forbid that I should boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ.' - Galatians 6:14

I have preached the Gospel thousands of times over decades. But no matter how I think about it, I am preaching the same content. 1. Rely on the precious blood 2. Look only to the Lord 3. Seek the Holy Spirit. Ultimately, the conclusion is the cross.

That He allowed me to proclaim the Lord's name until now despite my lack of qualification was due to the Lord's burning mercy. If He allows me to proclaim that most high name tomorrow as well, that too will be due to the Lord's endless grace.

Truth is sufficient to stand as truth alone. Attempts to misappropriate worldly values and worldly energy there are evil. The Lord gave a sufficient Gospel, a sufficient Jesus. If you were zealous for something other than truth, repent and let's live with Jesus being enough.

Intense love makes the walls of distance and time pale in comparison. That it should be cut off but instead continues with meaning is because of Jesus. Who shall separate us from the love of God which is in Christ Jesus?
Heaven and Hell... preach right now to everyone who doesn't know the Lord... I beg of you.

Since it is youth ministry, I strive to be a bit friendly when delivering the message. I don't think being serious and being pleasant are opposites. However, the problem is that I frequently see friends crying while I deliver the message thinking it's definitely humor. It seems the Lord does not use my gags. Rather, I see Him working directly. Since whether by one way or another, Christ is preached, I will rejoice and continue to rejoice.

A soccer player running the field without resting on the bench is not a painful thing, but an extremely glorious one. 'But none of these things move me; nor do I count my life dear to myself, so that I may finish my race with joy, and the ministry which I received from the Lord Jesus, to testify to the gospel of the grace of God.' - Acts 20:24

They say praise makes even a whale dance? If you want to see a miracle greater than a whale dancing, give of yourself and love. In the prayer on the night before the cross, Jesus asked that they also be one just as He and the Father are one. If you love, forgive, and have become one through that bond, the Lord's miracle has already begun.

Quo Vadis, Domine? Lord, where are you going? This phrase appears twice. Once to the Lord bearing the cross, and another time, though it doesn't appear in the Bible, it was the phrase asked of the Lord bearing the cross who appeared before Peter fleeing from Roman persecution. Through the major surgery of the cross, Jesus took away all our sins and poured out God's grace. There is nothing more we can do for Him. It is because perfect redemption was achieved through the cross alone.

A Christian is someone with whom a deal cannot be made. It doesn't work with money, fame, greed, or lust. Because every deal was already finished by the Lord on the cross. I die with the Lord and live again in the Lord.
A Christian is not a being with ambiguous things to say. 'Nothing but the blood of Jesus' is what I will say forever.

A Christian's holy fellowship is not like sales that try to curry favor. It is acting in truth within the Holy Spirit. To some, it is the smell of death, and to others, it becomes the fragrance of Christ that gives life. Proclaim, pray, and be a witness every day.

A prodigal lives entangled with pigs. But the fundamental difference between a prodigal and a pig is that a prodigal has a father to return to, a father to call upon. A Christian can experience the worst sense of despair. Nevertheless, the truth declares, 'There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus.'
Without wailing and change, one is just thrown out and trampled. Jesus died for my sins, God's love was confirmed by the cross, and the Holy Spirit dwells within us.

The Gospel that Paul really wanted to deliver to the Roman believers, to use a modern analogy, is like publicly boasting that you are living your whole life betting everything on Jesus who died on the cross, while standing next to a classmate at a reunion who is bragging that her husband's company made it into the top 100, next to a classmate being congratulated by everyone because her husband entered politics and became a minister, in front of a classmate beaming with joy because her son or daughter graduated from a prestigious university and got a doctorate from Harvard, and in front of a pastor's wife classmate who is thanking God because her husband became the head pastor of a large church. I have nothing to boast of except the cross of Christ.

The two pillars of God's temple, Jachin and Boaz. God established them Himself. One alone is our strength. God established God's church Himself, and the Lord becomes its strength. Two pillars, Gospel and prayer, are enough.
Unless you stand before God in your honest form, as a sinner and a sick person, you cannot meet Jesus. - Mark 2:17

Anyone who does not have regular fellowship with God is potentially a person living as a slave to the flesh. If you receive the Gospel as life and fully rely on the power of the precious blood, it becomes much easier to rule over sin.

When God called me, He knew all my foolishness and stupidity, but He did not despise me and instead changed them into wisdom and power. This is entirely to make me become everything through Jesus, to put on Christ, manifest Christ, and live by Christ. 'But put on the Lord Jesus Christ, and make no provision for the flesh, to fulfill its lusts.' - Romans 13:14
If it is a person God loved enough to give His only begotten Son, we have no right at all to hate them. God's grace is stronger than hate and greater than resentment.
On the first Sunday, God spoke to the youth group about the most important thing, the first and the last of faith. It is 'Jesus' love.'

Everything is a matter of life. If there is life, one lives like a flame; if not, it fades away. Jesus declares Himself to be life. However, it is difficult to meet Him by just searching. One must 'seek and find.' I have never seen life overflowing in someone who does not repeatedly seek the Lord. Faith is simply the power of the repetition of the cross.

God gives unimaginable conflict and anguish to those He loves deeply. ㅠㅠ It is because He wants them to completely lay everything down, look only to the Lord, and go forward holding only His word. You will suffer tribulation in the world, but be bold. Jesus has overcome the world.

God is love. When following God, I escape my sticky limitations. Loving people of faith is 'fellowship.' Loving unbelievers is 'missions.' And loving God is 'worship.' And while we were still sinners, Christ died for us, confirming God's love. So love is Jesus. Therefore, fellowship is done in Jesus. Missions proclaims Jesus. Worship is only possible through Jesus. Jesus is the center of all truth.

Piling up trash in the living room and catching flies is not a fundamental solution. Covering it with a nice blanket or spraying perfume is also not a solution. The trash must be cleared (repentance) and filled with what is precious (Jesus). Do not struggle to remove the results of sin (bugs), but just be full of good things (Jesus).
The kingdom of God does not collapse due to such things. Believe in the power of the blood and keep going. Another word for faith is ignoring [the enemy].
I want to be a companion on the journey where God's love and grace become life.

If you know God's love, God's story will never be boring. Unfortunately, many people find it boring. Regardless of your emotional state, if you can hear these words, speak honestly, and find a small motivation for change, I guarantee you are someone who knows God's love for you. 'And we have known and believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and he who abides in love abides in God, and God in him.' (1 John 4:16)
There are people who have received God's grace but wastefully abuse it. What is the response to the abuse? It is not retribution and the law, but more overflowing grace.
God's grace and love do not cause us to be wounded. Frequently, easily, and more excellently than others being wounded is because the love that cannot be repaid has become excellently thin.
If God were someone who just granted my greed and wishes, I would be disappointed. Furthermore, I would even hate Him. God gave Himself and became our everything.
God so loved the world. Embracing impossible sinners and covering our shame with the Father's heart, we run to Christ and break our lives.

The reason God shows signs and miracles is not to satisfy our greed. It is to make us believe and follow the Lord. Greeks seek wisdom and Jews seek a sign, but all is just greed, and we hold onto the cross.
Then I said, 'Behold, I have come—in the volume of the book it is written of Me—to do Your will, O God.' - Hebrews 10:7

Jesus received all authority in heaven and on earth and regained through the cross all the rights Adam had lost. However, since the Lord is at the right hand of the throne of majesty, the rule and governance on this earth should naturally be exercised by us, His body. Please rise boldly and exercise the power to reign in life through Jesus. When I call, the Father is bound to answer. That is the covenant, that is the promise, and that is the power of the Gospel.

Jesus brought all the blessings of heaven. When that flesh was broken, the blessings of heaven poured out. The sign of the Son of God descending through the darkness and destroying the works of the devil was His humbling Himself, wrapped in swaddling cloths and lying in a manger. The sign by which a Christian wins in the world and disarms the devil is humbling oneself.
Not stopping is power. Rather than focusing on the many reasons to stop, just run toward the goal. Because the goal is Jesus, who did not stop from the throne of heaven all the way to me, a sinner.
Each and every soul encountered stands precariously at a critical moment. I strongly feel the need for the Gospel and the need for prayer. And I see restoration occurring.

When you feel infinitely inadequate, look to the cross. It will give you the strength to start again. You must go down to rise again. You must empty to fly again. If you meet the floor, you just need to fill up again.

To feel infinitely inadequate is the fact that only the Lord can rescue us and rescue our members. I hope everyone humbles themselves and lowers themselves so they may reach salvation and forgiveness of sins.

One piece of good news is that the Lord does not condemn us. However, He also does not want us to continue dwelling in that sin and sickness of the soul. We must not watch like a fire across the river; we must become new. Jesus said to her, 'Neither do I condemn you; go and sin no more.' - John 8:11
It is Brother Han-seok's last visit to the Friday night service in tears. He returns tomorrow. My last words were, 'Jesus saved you!' There is nothing but Jesus. Only Jesus...
The focus of core values, passion, and labor; I run without stopping for the Gospel.

I didn't believe in Jesus to be happy. On the contrary, I had to discard and give up many things. But I was truly happy. Because after losing them, the true value was seen more clearly. There is nothing but Jesus.

When a hairstyle changes, one becomes a completely different person. The eyes take up 90% of the features. However, one easily tires of such artificial changes. True change is the evaluation of value where other values become refuse because of the preciousness of Jesus through the Gospel.

The taste of a ripe persimmon cannot be imitated or forced. If I describe the taste of a persimmon that I have neither tasted nor can give, and press with 'Why can't you feel the taste?', I have to act by force and live a tired and lethargic life. Even though one hasn't experienced the taste because they weren't supplied, they blame themselves and fall into a sense of condemnation. Just as taste cannot be imitated, neither can the Gospel. When life is clearly supplied, the game is over. 'For we cannot but speak the things which we have seen and heard.' - Acts 4:20 https://youtu.be/WzJad3R29r8

If losing actually becomes gaining, and even death cannot take away my happiness and thrill, it is because the one living in me is not 'me' but 'Jesus Christ.' Please simply lose. You will gain the Lord.

Repentance is a change of direction, a turning back, and an abandonment of self-trust. The essence of repentance is the same, but there is repentance that obtains salvation and repentance that restores the joy of salvation. When I repent rather than seek success and achievement in the dark land where I stood, it becomes a holy land where the Lord is glorified and covered by the precious blood. If you repent, believe in Jesus (baptism), and receive forgiveness of sins, you receive the Holy Spirit as a gift. - Sunday Leader Meeting Summary

Repent and believe the Gospel. - Mark 1:15. The Gospel is a promise and a covenant, but the prerequisite for believing this is repentance. Repentance here is not a listing of detailed sins or lamenting over circumstances. It is turning back, changing direction, and coming back. Above all, it is discarding 'self-trust.' You must discard the heart that believes in yourself to believe in the Gospel. The prerequisite for the merit of Jesus' precious blood is crucifying my own merit.
Faith is ignoring the greed standing before me and holding onto the true substance and evidence. That is Jesus.

Paul frequently uses the expression 'pursuing' in all his epistles. Personally, I think this word arises because there are two things: direction and passion. When the direction called Jesus and passion are combined, one cannot help but pursue. Also, 'Yet indeed I also count all things loss for the excellence of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord... I press on, that I may lay hold of that for which Christ Jesus has also laid hold of me.' - Philippians 3:8-12. If you know Jesus, you run. It's quite simple, right?

It is fully understandable that people call one someone who doesn't know anything and a fanatic. It's a natural criticism. It's because they don't know the verse below. Christ's resurrection resets and renews all values. 'If in this life only we have hope in Christ, we are of all men the most pitiable.' - 1 Corinthians 15:19
On a very difficult day, rather than asking the reason for the hardship, it is enough that I can return to Jesus and that the Lord embraces me just as I am. Jesus gave everything.

'For He whom God has sent speaks the words of God, for God does not give the Spirit by measure.' - John 3:34. What should be here now is not the logic of the earth but the word of God, and what I need is the Holy Spirit poured out without limit.

The worst thing to do is advertise and sell a product you aren't sure of yourself. There's nothing worse than preaching Jesus when you aren't full of Jesus. That is why being full of Jesus is the beginning of missions.
My fullness is missions. It starts from there. Being able to save dead souls. You must be full of fire. At the center of the problem, I am the most core problem.

The Apostle Paul, who was in prison, had an opportunity to be released, but he turned that opportunity into a chance to stand before the Emperor in Rome and preach the Gospel. (Acts 25). On his voyage to Rome, contrary winds blew. Someone living by the Gospel receives powerful winds from hell. However, when the wind of the Holy Spirit blows, everything will be devastated. 'The winds were against us' (Acts 27:4)

'Peace I leave with you, My peace I give to you; not as the world gives do I give to you' (John 14:27). The only one who can give fundamental peace is Jesus. This is because only Jesus washes away sin with His precious blood and reconciles us with God. Someone who does not fear God and is not reconciled should naturally be anxious. A disease with no self-perceived symptoms is not called a blessing. One should pray that a life that has left God can never sleep with their legs stretched out.

Self-diagnosis. Rather than 'Who am I?', we should look at 'What the Lord did on the cross.' Rather than 'What did I do?', we should focus more on 'Who is He?'. Someone who focuses on 'self' instead encounters problems in 'relationships.' Becoming aggressive out of inferiority or avoiding out of a victim mentality. Because if the lens is defective, the photo of the subject appears distorted.

I can recognize my own handwriting even after a long time. When I hear a testimony, I recognize the message of truth melted within it. Clearly, the Word is working in that life through the truth... that is change.

There is no other Gospel. Especially in the last days, people want to be initiated into a secret that is special, miraculous, and likely to work immediately. There was no such thing, nor could there be. It is only the Gospel of the cross. The Gospel that faith moving mountains and the tongues of angels should rightfully testify to is Jesus crucified. (Galatians 1:6-8) 'There is no other gospel, but there are some who trouble you and want to pervert the gospel of Christ. But even if we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel to you than what we have preached to you, let him be accursed.'
The greatest work, bearing the cross.

Until I was in my teens, I ignored the Lord's calling several times, but one day I met the Lord and returned. The reason I returned was that I was the sinner who nailed Jesus to the cross, yet He loved me and died on the cross. Even at a young age, I knew this was precious. I could instinctively tell that there would be many challenges in following that truth. But at that moment of conversion, I didn't want to do that, so I confessed: 'I will follow only the Lord.'

God's voice. God, who previously spoke through prophets, speaks through His Son in the last days. Jesus is God's love and His Word. To someone who looks to Jesus, God speaks through His Son. 'God, who at various times and in various ways spoke in time past to the fathers by the prophets, has in these last days spoken to us by His Son, whom He has appointed heir of all things, through whom also He made the worlds.' - Hebrews 1:2
When your heart is dark and troubled, please think of the Lord. The Lord, who had nowhere even to lay His head, bore our suffering in our place.

The most pitiable person in the world. If our lives only seek things of this world, we are truly pitiable people. Because there is a resurrection, ours becomes the most glorious life. But if a life doesn't become particularly pitiable even without the hope of resurrection, there is a problem. It means being a Christian in name only. A life should rightfully be a ruin without the resurrection. 'If in this life only we have hope in Christ, we are of all men the most pitiable. But now Christ is risen from the dead, and has become the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep.' (1 Corinthians 15:19-20)
The cost of love. To love, one must pay a price. That is why practicing true love leads to facing various challenges. Just as Jesus came to this earth.
Tears that only those who have been saved can shed, gratitude and repentance.
Nevertheless, healing must continue, the cross must continue to be held, looking only to the Lord must continue, and the words of the Gospel must be constantly testified.

Preaching the Word is a spiritual gift. Someone who has received the gift does it excellently. Just as someone with a gift for playing music plays well. But the Lord does not praise someone just because they preached the Word well. It is because it is a gift. Ability and fluent eloquence do not guarantee a life of obedience to the Word, or who becomes the master when one is alone. 'For if I preach the gospel, I have nothing to boast of... What is my reward then? That when I preach the gospel, I may present the gospel of Christ without charge, that I may not abuse my authority in the gospel.' - 1 Corinthians 9:16-18
If the Word flows, you live. Therefore, you must pray and strive so that the Word can flow. When it overflows and comes in, and overflows and goes out, the work of life happens.

Following the pillar of cloud is not a pie-in-the-sky story. The Exodus and the entry into Canaan were not speculation on prime land. It is His true grace, the cross, the grace of the cross that nailed Him and me to the tree to make us one because He wanted to be with sinners. That is why the journey of faith is not the achievement of some status or state, but training in holiness, presence, companionship, and fellowship.
The secret that enables me to belong in God and that holy One to belong in me is the precious blood of the cross. That impossible thing became possible in that noble blood. Hallelujah.
The reason one wants to pray but cannot is that they have forgotten. One must remember. Only then will prayer open. 'In the same manner He also took the cup after supper, saying,

For as often as you eat this bread and drink this cup, you proclaim the Lord’s death till He comes.' - 1 Corinthians 11:25-26. Please do not forget to remember the Lord, His death, and His coming again.

I mistakenly think that the few things I am praised for, the strengths I am proud of, are what hold me this far. No. On the contrary, it is the things I considered trivial, the things I confessed were truly weak, that hold me. (2 Corinthians 12:10) 'Therefore I take pleasure in infirmities, in reproaches, in needs, in persecutions, in distresses, for Christ’s sake. For when I am weak, then I am strong.'

'I have come down to deliver them out of the hand of the Egyptians and to bring them up from that land' - Exodus 3:8. 'Come now, therefore, and I will send you to Pharaoh that you may bring My people, the children of Israel, out of Egypt' - Exodus 3:10. 1. God declares that He is the one who leads the people for the Exodus. 2. Also, He says that Moses is the one who leads the people. 3. The declaration of God in verse 8 and the command of God in verse 10 seem like a contradiction that cannot be harmonized. 4. The reason it is possible is that it must be a perfect union with God in Moses and Moses in God. 5. This is expressed in verse 12: 'God said,
' How can God be with us? It is because of the merit of the precious blood. 'Therefore, brethren, having boldness to enter the Holiest by the blood of Jesus...'

That I fall due to sin proves something. It is the clearest counter-evidence that I lived by my own strength. If my will and my strength are strong, it just means I fall a bit later. Do not try to delay the failure; acknowledge my collapse now through the cross and accept living together with Jesus.

The visible and invisible things I have received (whether those are tangible or intangible) were all given by the Lord. They are things He gives because He loves me. On Christmas Eve, I wish we could be thankful even for just 2 minutes. To the Father who gave His only Son from the embrace of glory for me, a sinner...

Someone who comes to make a deal, trade, or struggle is tense. Because they have to get more. But someone who comes to love is at peace. On the contrary, their original purpose is to give unsparingly and take a loss. The Lord gave His life but only obeyed until death on the cross without other compensation. It is the reason authority and power come from those who discard greed and consume everything without remainder, leaving only a glasses case and the clothes they wore. They are at peace. If they truly loved...

It is a fact that Christ was crucified for me. But if one stays only there, a cycle of recurring sin and repentance will continue. One must also accept and proclaim by faith that they were also crucified on that cross.

What I want to give to the youth is not a convenient achievement in life, but the unfathomable love of Jesus' cross. Before that cross, all wrong configurations are reset. Anything becomes possible and one becomes obedient. 'God is faithful, our word to you was not Yes and No... For the Son of God, Jesus Christ... was not Yes and No, but in Him was Yes.' - 2 Corinthians 1:18

'Will you still hold fast to your integrity?' - Job 2:9. To all the youth group members who have passed through London over the past 12 years, to the beloved brothers and sisters who are now older or have formed families and become parents, or are living their social lives with responsibility and burdens, I send my greetings. If you ask how I am doing, I will say 'by the grace of the Lord.' As time passes and I get older, I pray all the more and hold onto the Lord's cross all the more. Because the 'grace of the precious blood of the cross' we cried out for is not a joke. As you live in a rugged world, if someone asks 'Will you still hold fast to your integrity while you are young?', please answer, 'Not only will I keep it, but I am sorry I cannot give more.' 'Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.' - Hebrews 13:8

The Son of God did not bear that suffering cross so that I would be crushed to death by this problem. The Lord's cross is to save me. Because He was determined to save me at all costs, He bore that rugged cross. Therefore, we must be bold.
'This is the will of the Father who sent Me, that of all He has given Me I should lose nothing, but should raise it up at the last day.' - John 6:39

Someone wants the fastest way to the destination. Another wants the most beautiful way to the destination. But the Lord says He is 'the Way.' Also, He says that without that way, one can never arrive at the destination. If Jesus is the way, it is the most beautiful and right way. Jesus said to him, 'I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.' - John 14:6

It's painful, but not unhappy. It's painful, but I'm happy. Because the Lord heals the broken heart and gives true rest. 'He has sent Me to heal the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives...' - Isaiah 61:1

I hope you are at peace by obeying the Lord rather than complaining with your own calculations. The Gospel is that the almighty Lord died on the cross in a weak form. 'Because the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men.' - 1 Corinthians 1:25

The Holy Spirit sent in My name... when the Holy Spirit comes, He makes us call upon the name of Jesus and makes work be achieved by the power of that name. Everyone who calls upon that name will be saved. If there is a problem, I hope you call upon the name of Jesus. 'John 14:26 - But the Counselor, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in My name, He will teach you all things, and bring to your remembrance all things that I said to you.'

What was given to me was given freely by God as a blessing. I must save and bless many people with it. Joseph's revival was not a personal revival, but saved his father and family, Pharaoh, and all the people of the Near East from famine.

'(Mark 16:17-18) And these signs will follow those who believe: In My name they will cast out demons; they will speak with new tongues; they will take up serpents; and if they drink anything deadly, it will by no means hurt them; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will recover.' No matter how powerful the challenge is, if you respond powerfully with faith, you will always win.
If the joy of meeting the Lord is greater than the weight of the problem, life cannot help but be happier. There is hope under the shadow of the cross.
A cool person sheds tears without end. That is the Lord's love and grace.

Parable of the Wicked Tenants (Mark 12:1-9). Jesus revealed the secrets of heaven and the revelations hidden from the foundation of the world through parables. In most of Jesus' parables about heaven, Jesus necessarily appears as the Messiah. Ultimately, unless one believes in Jesus as the Messiah, that secret is not unlocked. The truth that Jesus is the Christ is the key to unlocking all these parables. Words requiring explanation: Vineyard: Representative fruit of Israel; in the dry climate of Israel where there is no water, grapes were essential as a food and beverage that preserves water. Unlike other plants, grapes were a crop that absolutely required the farmer's help. Hedge: A fence to protect crops. Leased it out: It was a common custom at that time to rent out cultivated land and take a certain rent. Here, it is evident the tenant is not the owner. Text Analysis: 1. What did Jesus set up while making the vineyard in the parable? 2. With what business model does a person manage his vineyard for the tenants? ① Hostile Merger (M&A) ② Franchise (receiving deposit and 5:5) ③ Subcontract ④ Partnership ⑤ Leased it out 3. What did the owner require from the tenants? ① Ownership ② Stock Option ③ Exclusive Contract ④ Part of the produce. Surrounding it with a hedge and entrusting the vineyard means it was very specially set apart. God specially set apart Israel from among the nations and peoples and wanted to give them mission, word, salvation, and even His Son Jesus Christ. He gave the Temple and He gave Jerusalem. Leaving for a long journey and entrusting it to the tenants was because there was that much trust and expectation. What God wanted from them was a part of the produce. However, it was difficult for the wicked tenants to give even that. 4. What did the tenants do to the servants the owner sent? (e.g., care for business travelers, karaoke, etc.) 5. Who was the last person the owner sent? ① Debt collector ② Police Man ③ Men with buzz cuts (gangsters) ④ New Malden Iljins ( ) 6. What was the expectation the owner had while sending the son? (v. 6) 7. Why did the tenants kill the son? (v. 7). Surprisingly, the reason the tenants killed the son is that he is the heir. They mistakenly thought that if they killed the heir, the inheritance of the vineyard would become theirs. They are total thieves. They should be thankful just for having been leased the vineyard, but they didn't even pay rent and killed the son. Until the son died, the owner's response was lukewarm. That is how much God did not want to destroy Israel with judgment. The greatest wickedness for the tenants lies in their mistaking it for their own. When Adam and Eve sought to become independent, sin entered humanity, and when the Pharisees took glory from each other, they crucified the God they claimed to love so much. 8. Where was the son killed and cast out? (v. 8) 9. Who do you think are the other people the owner, in his anger, gave the vineyard to after destroying the tenants? (v. 9) Primary meaning of the parable; Secondary meaning of the parable; Tertiary meaning of the parable; Target: Jews, Gentiles, Me. Vineyard: Israel, Church, My life. Winepress: Jerusalem City. Watchtower: Temple, Worship. Spiritual ( ). Leased it: Jewish mission, stewardship. Journey: First coming of Jesus, Second coming, Death. Problems for further thought: 1. What self-righteousness or self-love makes you reject Jesus? (e.g., religious zeal, reward mentality, ambition) 2. What do you think God wants after giving us the vineyard (life)? 3. God is the owner of the vineyard (church). Do I let the owner (God) be owner, and the vineyard be a vineyard?

You must be devoted. It is because of Jesus. That is not a burden but a joy. If you love the cross, I hope you stand where you are needed rather than doing what you want. That is carrying the cross and following the Lord. The path that even death cannot block, the way of the cross.

The leader of a buffalo herd is the buffalo that smells water well. A leader is someone with the ability to set direction. It is important whether the direction of my life matches the purpose of life, that is, mission and the Gospel. Build internal strength rather than shouting.
Do you like Free coffee for everlasting life? Yes, membership has its privileges. - LFGC Youth Group

Just as my smile is not a real smile, what is visible now is not everything. The end is not the end; the Lord will surely evaluate and repay. 2 Thessalonians 1:6-10 'since it is a righteous thing with God to repay with tribulation those who trouble you, and to give you who are troubled rest... when He comes, in that Day, to be glorified in His saints and to be admired among all those who believe.'

'In the early church of the Book of Acts, they prayed for 10 days and preached for 10 minutes, and 3,000 people were saved. However, today, they pray for 10 minutes and preach for 10 days, and 2 people are saved.'

If you say you love someone but do not convey the Lord's love, you are supplying food that causes malnutrition. We are from the Lord and become complete by the Lord. It is about conveying the Lord's love.
Do not try to be a person who is too competent. Rather, try becoming a weak fool in the Lord. 'My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness' (2 Corinthians 12:9).

The devil comes to steal, kill, and destroy. He gives a victim mentality and a sense of alienation, separates from the community, cuts off spiritual supply through alienation, and destroys self-esteem through accusation. Ultimately, what he fundamentally wants is total destruction, to make one a child of hell. However, the Son of Man, Jesus, came so that they may obtain life and obtain it more abundantly. He makes there be restoration and reconciliation, peace and joy, and enables one not only to enjoy forgiveness of sins and the joy of heaven but also to have God's powerful and perfect rule descend. What made that possible was achieved through nothing else but the precious blood of the cross. 'The thief does not come except to steal, and to kill, and to destroy. I have come that they may have life, and that they may have it more abundantly.' (John 10:10)

How shall they believe in Him of whom they have not heard? And how shall they hear without a preacher? Romans 10:4. You cannot believe what you do not know. If there is no channel (understanding) to enter the grace God gives, the word of God's promise gives me no benefit.

The unique power for all believers is returning to the Gospel. It is not reacting according to one's own thoughts or feelings, but returning uniquely to the Gospel of the shed blood. The Gospel means returning to Jesus, away from self-centered thoughts. There is no salvation apart from Jesus.
Do not prove yourself, but testify to the Lord. God anoints and is with you.
