You must realize the most important thing. It is repenting. Repentance is not something someone else can do for you. It is 'I' doing it by the unique grace of the Lord.
Be bold. Be bold as one who has overcome the whole world. The Lord has overcome the world.

Please fix your eyes on Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith. Faith is not believing in my own convictions. It is not believing that I will get married or buy a house this year. True faith is believing in Jesus. It means that the Jesus I am looking at is with me.
Take a risk in faith; then you will see a miracle.
Please speak without hesitation. The Lord's Gospel is not bound and works through people who are not ashamed. Acts 4:13

A woman in LA had her handbag snatched by a robber, but she did not let go even while bleeding. The reason was not that it was a credit card or a luxury bag. It was because of a few cell phone photos in that bag. It was to protect the photos of her daughter who had died of cancer 10 weeks prior. Everyone has a core value. For some, it is 'perishable things,' and for others, it is 'heavenly things.' In Colossians 1:28-29, Paul says he strives and labors. Preaching Him and establishing people was his core value. The value he didn't mind giving his life for was uniquely 'Jesus' and 'souls.' Love what is worth loving. You will not be ashamed.
I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes!
God forgives through the cross and gives boundless grace through the precious blood. There is no condemnation under the precious blood. The Lord accepts you just as you are.
He has set me free from sin. I have overcome the trial and gained victory.
I hope you stand before the Gospel again. Jesus is the Gospel. I hope for a life where the answer comes from Jesus, a life where Jesus is enough.
It is not important what I can do. What is important is how I am believing in whom. The great business of God is believing in the Father and the one He sent, Jesus.

What set me free from sin is the power of the precious blood. What gives victory in the midst of great trouble is the power of the precious blood. I pray that the power of the blood covers all our members tonight.

Standing before the Gospel again, receiving the cross as life, means not living by fleshly desires or bloodlines, but saying 'the Lord alone is enough' even if you lose everything. If Jesus is not enough, even if you fill the things you want so much every moment, the deep scars and emptiness in your heart will continue.
Do not fear that I will disappoint people; I hope you are at peace looking at the Lord who loved me and bore the cross when we were still sinners, and who is never disappointed in me.
I ask that He makes us stand before the Gospel again and serve with God's heart and tears. Please fulfill the Lord's will.

A special praise that has never existed in the world - we sing 'From Sin Me'. Please listen to it repeatedly and soak in this praise. And please sing this praise through cell meetings as well. Please pray that the power of the precious blood covers Africa, Asia, and Europe.
He cleared my sins and gave me a new day; the Lord's precious blood has power. Since that love gives me a song every day, it is an amazing power.

I hope you seek grace so that you can stand before the Gospel again. Standing before the Gospel doesn't mean never making a mistake again, but not using the Lord for your own greed, and being dead while the Lord who gave me life lives in me.
Like Jesus who silently walked the path of death, please speak with perfect silence.

The person who delivers the Word is a sinner, and the people who hear the Word are also sinners. Although everyone is a sinner, God said that if He washes with the precious blood and anoints, a presence like Jesus will appear and He will make them do even greater works. Please rely on the washing of the blood and the sealing of the Holy Spirit today as well.
The reason I can stand in this place is because of what Jesus did on the cross. The reason we can serve today, however inadequately, is that I am not the one living in me, but Jesus.

A person with an unadorned self is different from a person with a reality-oriented, proving self that says 'make bread from stones.' They are a generous person who can give and receive love regardless of the achievement of a task.
A Christian who has eaten Christ's flesh and drunk Christ's blood no longer focuses on themselves. Because my flesh is Christ's flesh and my blood is Christ's blood.
People think it's a crisis situation if you risk your life. No. Not risking your life is the true crisis. Risk your life for the Gospel given by laying down His life.

Many people live their lives acting. Because they believe they can be happy. On the contrary, it is tiring. They lived diligently, but it's not their life. Please be faithful to yourself. For you are a unique and precious existence in the world, and for that preciousness, the Son of God laid down His life. Don't act, be faithful.
I don't necessarily think I am preaching the Gospel. But if I don't open my mouth, the stones will rise and shout. Amen, come Lord Jesus.

That is why fellowship in faith, worship with presence, and a living Gospel are needed every day. No, they are needed every moment. The devil challenges every day. We hold onto the Lord every moment. Forgetfulness of the Gospel and grace is the reason the people who came out of Egypt were destroyed.
It is love to make someone cry and it is love to make someone happy, but true love is becoming a grain of wheat and denying oneself every day and bearing the cross for them.

Even if a police car exceeds the speed limit for public safety or an ambulance violates regulations while rushing, they are exempt. It's because it's a life-saving situation, so they are given an exception. In the work of saving lives, receiving grace, and meeting the Lord, you must always proceed exceptionally.

The Magi Principle: The Magi who lived in different countries each followed the star through their own routes and eventually met before the baby Jesus. God calls various people for that kingdom and that glory in different ways.

The most foolish thing is to criticize others. More foolish than this is judging others based on imagination. There are no side effects to God's healing and restoration. Jesus did not come to criticize, but rather came to be criticized for us.
Prayer: * Do not drink stagnant water; drink living water. Things that happen on their own are just like garbage fed to pigs. To not be crushed by problems, you must mobilize power from outside. There is funding that comes only through prayer, people who come only through prayer, circumstances that come only through prayer, and ideas that come only through prayer. This heavenly wisdom provides the clue to solving difficult problems.
* How can one not be happy? To be able to intercede for those we love...

* Pray like this. Pray that the Lord will bless. That alone is eternal and glorious. If there is something you are thankful for without praying, be vigilant and fearful, and thank the Lord who poured it out—not asking 'why,' but 'in spite of it all.' Every good gift and every perfect gift (tangible or intangible) comes down from above from the Father of lights, who does not change or cast shifting shadows—James 1:17

* The reason for the fight. We fight a good fight. Not only to defend, but even more to seize and take. Rather than being tossed about by relationships and circumstances, you will take and seize instead. Improve yourself with the appearance of a victor. You who pray are already victorious.
* Believe and pray. Through me, through my lips, the Lord alone is exalted.
* I will make you new. I do not become new merely by steeling my resolve and determination. The Lord must make me new. That is why we must seek the Lord's face.

* The reason we cannot let go. If we cannot see it, we cannot let it go or leave it. Pray that the spirit of wisdom and revelation be poured out. Then you will distance yourself from unnecessary things.

* A community that does not pray while watching people is unexpectedly smooth. Because they do not feel worthy of response. However, when a community that prayed stops praying, they gnash their teeth and rush forward. Because they know that opportunity comes only then.
* Boldness comes from humility. Not being bold is because you have lost your place. When you pray, you become bold. Because the humility of finding your place comes upon you.

* Worship team prayer meeting. Why pray before worship? Do we gain a final sprint and sparkling power so worship flows well? That is remembering that I am before God and moving to the correct 'position' as a true worshipper.
* Worshipper. In leading worship, the two most important things are longing and obedience. Longing is accomplished through petition, and obedience is fulfilled through repentance.
* Prayer pulled up to heaven. Prayer rises not falling short of the ceiling, but as if drawn in by a vacuum. The Lord desires to save souls. Ah, I look forward to the retreat.

* Continuous seeking. When you continuously and repeatedly petition before the Lord for what you 'have already petitioned for,' and always ask, you become a person of the Spirit. It means becoming someone who does not fear and loves all.
* Similarity and difference between Gospel and Sales. Communicate coolly, but pray with tears.

* Why you remain anxious even after praying. When you pray, you should have peace. If you remain anxious, it means you subconsciously know that my priorities are wrong. When priorities are wrong, I first come to understand that I cannot abide in God's guidance and assurance.

* Seek Why rather than How. Do not ask how to fulfill your role well; pray about why you should fulfill it well. Selfishness is discarded and mission is discovered. When purpose is clear, method becomes sharp.
* Friday night love feast retreat. Food demonstration. Braised chicken, spicy pig's feet.

* The reason for frustration. Because your desires have not been satisfied. That is why people fight and even commit murder. That you asked with wrong desires is evident from the reaction when what you asked for is not realized. The best answer is to ask according to God's will and to trust in the method and timing. When limits face you, rejoice. There has never been a time without limits, and through those limits you pray. Pray for revival that people, tradition, custom, and prejudice cannot block.
* Prayer to start the day. This day, may I be humbled by the breath the Lord gave me and serve, remembered by no one, yet stand upright before the Lord—may I look only to the Lord at every moment.
* A wish. God, grant that I serve in lowliness without name or glory where needed.
* Warning signs. One does not collapse suddenly. The knees of prayer collapsed first.
* The way to control sinful desires. It is pouring out a wounded heart to the Lord.

* The reason the water source sends water. It is not to wet the pipe, but to resolve thirst through the pipe. If you pray for yourself, little power will appear, but when you seek to save souls, power will be poured out.
* True interest. At this time, think of brothers and sisters suffering in tribulation and hardship and pray earnestly. If you seek only relationships you want, what is better than the unbeliever?

* Song of victory 1. If you button the first button wrong, no matter how well you do later, it is difficult to fix. Sin is something already determined by the action I do first. Start everything with prayer and end with prayer.
* Guidance. There is nothing more empty than seeking guidance without being prepared to be lost.
* Finishing rather than starting. What is more important than 'how did you start?' is 'how will you finish?' That is why we pray.
* I always remember and pray.
* Last worship, final farewell. If you think today is the last, you will think more of your own shortcomings than of what disappointed you. So today also, I let go of my shortcomings and pray.
* In the time of worry, try praying. Grace will cover you.

* Why prayer is not answered. The first button is done wrong—something must change, and from that desperate reason we pray, but the prayer is not answered. It is because we have missed one thing. That change has an order, and only when I change will relationships and circumstances change. Therefore, the first button of answered prayer is prayer asking that I be changed.

* The best way to waste time. Not praying. Because you are not fulfilled, you always react to unnecessary things. Once focus is stolen, it becomes lost time. For some it is a lost year, for others it could be 20 lost years.

* If you do not pray, you are dragged along. If you do not pray, others determine your life. Prayer is the best way for me to live my life. Pray abundantly and raise the water level of grace. Do not turn away from that easy method. Fullness is always the issue.

* A ship without a captain does not know where to go. Authority was given to take responsibility, but if you evade responsibility and abandon authority, great disaster returns. People die because of people. Foolish and ignorant people, greedy and irresponsible people—because of them, beautiful people die. As a minister, I do not understand all of God's will. Yet until sin abounds in this world, we who could not protect young souls must beat our chests and weep bitterly and pray as if we ourselves shed blood.

* When tempted. It means you are not giving thanks, not staying awake even one hour in prayer, not loving, and thinking entirely in self-centered ways. The Lord pleaded that our faith would not fail. Respond with intercession and faith.
* I am sorry. My heart hurts so much and my tears will not stop. I pray for the bereaved and everyone.
* The secret to binding the enemy. Confess and declare in faith. All the negative and dark forces at work now will be bound. What you bind on earth is bound in heaven.
* The environment is not evil. Only because I cannot humble myself do evil things show response. Humble yourself and pray. Souls will return to the Lord.
* Pray and obey. Pray earnestly and obey according to the Word. Things beyond words will happen.
* Morning meditation. Be anxious for nothing. The Lord decides and will take responsibility for all things. Tell your fate to come. Do not fear.
* Prayer when anxious. Lord, accomplish Your will. Your will is anxious.

* Prayer request. Pray for the Cambridge Yeolim Church gathering tomorrow. Those joining together will depart from church at 1:30 PM and 4:30 PM respectively, so please contact us in advance. The actual gathering is at 4:30 and 7:00.

* True prayer. Without the help of the Holy Spirit, I cannot pray even one word with sincerity. I must acknowledge this and rely on the Holy Spirit. In the same way, the Spirit helps us in our weakness. We do not know what we ought to pray for, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us through wordless groans—Romans 8:26
* The art of love. One is to pray, and the other is for me to become holy, resembling the Lord. Then those who belong to me will truly be blessed.

* When aligned with calling, there is no frustration. You were not called to complain about circumstances. Do what you can do. That is praying where I stand and living according to the Lord's Word. The Holy Lord reigns with sovereignty.
* Are you frustrated? I pray. Fight against the spirit of anti-Jesus.

* When you do not even have strength to eat—Depression. When you lack strength, you should eat adequately, but you also need strength to eat. You gain strength from hearing the Word, but you must have the basic strength to hear. Ask God for the strength and ability to hear.
* If you love, you will pray. If you say you love without praying, that is not loving but merely having wanted to love once.

* In times of temptation. Times of temptation are times surrendered to darkness; you must humble yourself, pray, and wait for that time of darkness to pass. Peter did not stay awake to pray, so he went to an unexpected place and fell into temptation.

* The most important preparation for a preacher is to love. If you do not love, it is useless, because preaching God's Word is not meant to be useless. If you truly want to love, you must love through prayer and live in obedience to God's Word. A crisis in the church is a crisis of the preacher. Therefore, we must become poorer and repent.

* For revival to come, revival means that those who have tasted revival maintain a holy dissatisfaction toward a state without revival and continuously kneel in prayer. We advance as much as we long for glory.
* The way to restore lost glory is to restore lost prayer.

* When you set apart time, it is when you give your heart. Do you have such a time, such a prayer closet where you give your sincere heart even once? If it is sparse, it means you are a Christian in name only.
* Today's Prayer: Grant me faithfulness to do my best in the work entrusted to me, trust to entrust to You the things I cannot do, and wisdom to discern to whom all these things belong.
* Do not worry about anything, but in everything by prayer, make your requests known to God. The faithful Lord will answer.
* Preparing for Healing Camp: I ask you to humble yourselves, repent, and seek the Lord's face. Only then can you live and save everyone, and that is the greatest gift.

* Why the future is not frightening but anticipated: Fear comes not from uncertainty ahead, but is proof that we have not been fully united with the Lord. When we pray earnestly and are united with the Lord, the providences that the Lord will work and accomplish become something to anticipate. The Lord cannot do nothing and has no plan He cannot fulfill. Job 42:2

* Why faith is difficult: Because we do not do it sufficiently. Because we are halfhearted, we grasp at people. Halfhearted presence, halfhearted prayer, halfhearted ministry is burdensome. When you truly meet the Lord, you change, and afterwards the circumstances also change.
* How to pray: If you continue to fail even in resolving to pray, you must command in Jesus' name that every bondage be broken and pray for prayer itself. You must bring this problem to the cross.

* If you pray but do not sow, it is fanaticism. If you faithfully sow but do not pray, it is unbelief. If you pray and faithfully sow but have vague expectations without the Word, it is superstition. If God does not think this way but you believe firmly alone, it is blind faith.
* True boldness: Lord, do not permit any worldly success that hinders me from drawing near to You.

* Do not worry but pray: Worry means it is not my domain. That is why we pray. I entrust everything I cannot do and simply give thanks. The One who receives that gratitude will do His work, and I need only worship and give glory, seeking His kingdom and His righteousness.
* The victory of life depends on who you commune with. When my soul was weary within me, I remembered the Lord, and my prayer came to Him, and it reached His holy temple. —Jonah 2:7
* What is true faith? Praying before hungry lions.
* Prayer for revival: Whatever my joy that hinders God's revival, let it be utterly destroyed.
* Prayer: Without prayer, you can never win. That also means if you pray, you will certainly win. Except by prayer and fasting, this kind cannot come out. —Matthew 17:21
* Ask like this: Earnestly ask God for courage like a hurricane and wisdom to overcome enemies and adversaries.
* Earnest prayer: Let my every breath be comfort and a gift to someone.

* Do not worry but entrust, and it will be accomplished. To worry about tomorrow when you cannot even control today is excessive. Jesus Himself said it is unnecessary to worry about food and clothing, matters of eating and living. Overcoming worry is making supplication in all things, and this is being guarded by the 'peace of God that surpasses all understanding' (Philippians 4:7), driving away fear. Commit your way to the Lord, trust in Him, and He will accomplish it. —Psalm 37:5
* Absolute faith and absolute sovereignty: Do not fear but quote Scripture in confidence and pray with thanksgiving. The Lord's rule cannot be opposed by anyone.

* Pray based on Scripture. Hold fast to promises and words of hope, clinging to them as you pray. The enemy will be defeated. Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. —Philippians 4:6-7
* Give thanks and you have already won. A prayer of thanksgiving calls peace, peace is the Lord's presence, and in the Lord's presence comes the response of the Almighty.
* Peace and answer are synonymous: In Scripture, peace and answer are used as synonymous terms. When answer comes, peace comes; when there is peace, answer comes. Hold to the truth and be at peace.

* The purpose of prayer: Simon, Simon, behold, Satan has demanded permission to sift you like wheat; but I have prayed for you, that your faith may not fail; and you, when once you have turned again, strengthen your brothers. —Luke 22:31-32 Watch and pray. If you do not want to lose what is truly important.
* The basis of answer: You must hold to promises and pray based on Scripture. The basis is His faithfulness that cannot change and cannot break His word.
Prayer is both battle and the surest victory. Please kindle the fire of prayer. — Sunday Gathering
There is no third service Sunday fellowship meal due to distribution failure. We will improvise as best we can. Hallelujah.
With Snow White... (Deacon Sang Lee Sanghun, are you watching?)

If you cannot let go of what should be abandoned, you cannot pray. If you cannot hold onto what should be held, you cannot obey. Letting go of what should be abandoned and holding onto what should be held is fearing the Lord.

The most concentrated focus of sinful humans is on 'themselves.' My problems, my money, my house, my family, my success. When you concentrate like this, problems should be solved, but like tangled thread they become more knotted. Problems grow the more you look at them. When you look to the Lord in prayer, that cut problem becomes small. Because the Lord is a great God. Please have faith that sees the Lord as great.
* Prayer: Problems arise because prayer is insufficient. You must raise the temperature of prayer to burn and melt problems. When time is given, stop serving worthless decay and cry out in prayer.

For illness, it is useless to use other medicines. You must use the specific remedy. The specific remedy for worry is not 'entertainment' or 'achievement' but 'prayer.' Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. (Philippians 4:6-7)

* Pray silently with tears. We were not called to receive human approval. We were only called to love. Since this is what we received from God, it is enough to receive God's approval, and believing God will take responsibility, we pray silently with tears.

Parents do not teach their children how to get good grades by transmitting the know-how of cheating. I pray. It is not to become a spiritual worker who cannot be disregarded. It is simply not to become an evil worker. To seek life without prayer is evil.

When you feel insufficient, the easiest thought is that you should leave, that you should let go. But that is not insufficiency; rather, your true self lacking any possibility from the start is revealed. There was never the slightest possibility from the beginning, yet this is the path walked in faith in the Lord, and so you can also walk with the Lord going forward. If you feel insufficient, you must kneel and seek mercy.

If you think you are insufficient, why do you not pray? Before you lose hope, try praying. In places I once thought were not the path and had no path, God shows great and secret ways. Those who do not reach their desired wishes or lack the earnestness to express them cannot pray.
When revival comes, all the thorns of life are pulled out. Without prayer, revival does not come, and prayer is done by those from whose hearts blood drops continuously.
Anger blocks prayer and wisdom. But when you pray in anger, you will dominate that situation and receive wisdom to manage it.

Changing anxiety to peace is standing before the Lord and looking only to the Lord. Revival overwhelms fear. We have no power to resist this great multitude coming against us, nor do we know what to do, but our eyes are upon You. All Judah stood before the Lord, with their little ones, their wives, and their children. —2 Chronicles 20:12-13
If you are anxious, please let go. When you entrust to the Lord's hands, peace comes, and with that peace comes resolution.
Are you anxious? Entrust to the Lord's hands. You will be at peace. The Lord's hand holds me.
I am anxious. It is because I have temporarily lost the Lord. When you remember the Lord again and intercede for everyone, you will find the peace that was lost. Peace without Jesus is all fake.
Burning prayer: When you pray for what God desires, you will feel your prayer being drawn up to heaven, and you will feel how wondrous prayer can be.

* Prayer: Grant our friends wisdom to overcome the enemy's schemes and make them peaceful, not oppressed and intimidated by the world, but bold. Even at this moment, as the fragrance of prayer rises and eyes full of tears seek the Lord, and trusting in the Lord who hears and works at every moment, grant that those who have begun good works will be able to accomplish them until the day of Jesus Christ. I believe the Spirit of Truth will not abandon these as orphans.

Do not complain, and so some members seal their lips. Looking at the Psalms, it seems strange that such content is recorded in Scripture. But through this passing of heart's distress, complaint does not end as complaint but transforms into the confession 'I will rather sing praise.' Urgent appeals must not remain as complaints but advance to prayers that lay out the present circumstances in detail. Open your mouth and appeal: if it hurts, it hurts; if it is hard, it is hard. O people, trust in Him at all times; pour out your hearts before Him. God is our refuge. —Psalm 62:8

Even in a death-like drought where not a single drop of rain falls, the person who prays to God for fire hears the sound of great rain ahead of time. And prepares the way for rain to fall. At great cost, one hears the voice of revival. Elijah said to Ahab, 'Go up, eat and drink, for there is the sound of a heavy rain.' —1 Kings 18:41

* Undefeatable faith: No matter what the circumstances threaten, believe that the Lord is working at this very moment, and if He were not, still give thanks and worry about nothing. Be anxious about nothing, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. —Philippians 4:6-7

Just as an airplane needs absolute speed and distance to take off, to hope for something without giving absolute time is insanity. If you desire, please give. If you truly desire, I hope you will truly give. There is no other way.

An airplane must travel 800m at a speed of 350km/h or more to fly. Without the absolute prayer that should be given to the Lord, what spiritual warfare is this? It is just spiritual play. A plane that cannot fly is parked in a Tesco parking lot, and neighborhood kids are throwing stones at it. Do not complain—take flight.

The enemy does whatever it takes to prevent us from moving forward. He brings despair, hardship, and relational difficulties. When problems arise, they characteristically erupt suddenly and simultaneously. You suddenly receive an urgent call, the school is demanding something, and on that very day the train seems to deliberately move like a turtle. Inside the train, only I grow impatient. On such days, my stomach aches. But there's no restroom. This is because they want to frighten us, saying our hands are weary and we will cease our work and not accomplish it—Nehemiah 6:9. We must not become discouraged at such times. Nehemiah simply ignores them and moves forward. 'Now, O Lord, strengthen my hands.' He prays like this, believes like this, and moves forward. If I prayed for strength, the Lord gave it to me.

People say they resolve things through 'conversation' with each other. More often than being resolved, misunderstandings occur. When we pray to the Lord, we have intimate 'conversation' with the Almighty Father and receive the supply of heavenly power.
People are wounded and commit sin. People are especially wounded and commit sin in places without God. Blessed are those who come to the holy of holies of the Lord and meet the hidden God.
Wanting to bless beloved people, I—an utterly insufficient person—become a praying person and become a servant of God.

I think about what beloved people will do and intercede and pray for them. When I pray with love and tears, I believe with faith that God will surely bless and grant the wonderful blessings He has prepared. God will surely work.

* Jacob's Shameless Prayer: I am a person unworthy of receiving all the grace and love God has shown me... Please deliver me from my brother Esau—Genesis 32:10, 11. 'I work so hard, so I am a decent person' and 'though deceitful and hypocritical, He shows grace' have different starting points. The elder son of the prodigal becomes condemned through 'proud delusion,' while the prodigal becomes one who receives 'overwhelming grace.' Those who are forgiven and have received grace love the Lord more and forgive their friends.
* How to Entrust Worries: It is knowing who God is and confirming the Lord before my present reality in each moment.
If you love, you pray.

Praying for a mission can be powerful but also dangerous. This is because a mission can sometimes degenerate into ambition and become self-pursuit in the name of the Lord. A mission is certainly important, but it is because of the One who gave the mission, so prayer is not about achieving but about loving.
* Capability: The only thing I can do is give thanks and pray.
It is not that a minister's prayer heals sickness and solves problems. The Lord has prepared all healing and solutions and has decided to work through His servant.
* Now is the time to pray. Raise the level of your prayer. Then a different class of life unfolds.
Life will inevitably bring heartaches. If you leave that heart as is, it becomes corrupted sin, and if you bring it to the Father, it becomes the worship He seeks.

Samson lost a magnificent life because he did not pray. He becomes enslaved by the people he should have conquered. If he had prayed from the beginning instead of at life's twilight, Judges chapter 16 would have concluded with a more glorious story.
I earnestly pray for all friends who spend the whole day sad due to loss, health, and relational problems.
* Going All the Way: If you have seen possibility through prayer, you must complete it through supplication. After all, isn't the reason for starting to see the end?
I often pray when I think of it :) Blessings and grace to Pastor's wife, Sharon, and Grace.

* Be Careful of New Ransomware: Never click suspicious attachments. These days there are viruses coming through mail attachments under names like FedEx, DHL, and outstanding invoice. Ordinary viruses are fine because you can save some data, but a nasty fellow called Cryptolocker encrypts files even after the virus is removed, ultimately destroying all photos and documents in your PC. If you clicked it, immediately shut off and find an expert.

* Be anxious for nothing, be anxious for nothing, be anxious for nothing, and be anxious for nothing. Rather, in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus—Philippians 4:6, 7.
* Faith will make you know. Entrust small matters to God with prayer and thanksgiving. Later you will understand the reason.
Do not worry about success; pray to fulfill the Lord's will. The Lord will keep you in peace.

Seeking peace while setting your mind on the world is greed. With life complicated and difficult, it is utterly futile to close your eyes and pray for prayer to come out. Choose one. Either choose the world and live in confusion, or look to the Lord, receive power, and live.
The fastest-answered prayer in the world... shall we try it? God, deal with me.

There are friends who let go of good worldly opportunities to keep cell meetings. Though the minister cannot be responsible for everything, because that heart given to God is precious, I earnestly ask that He repay it with good things, even through fasting.
After praying for the retreat...

I hope the Lord will show grace and give rest to all the members who prepared and prayed for the retreat. And now I earnestly hope that with that received grace, they run without regret. There is no retreat in faith. Running and running until becoming a beautiful fragrance poured out like a drink offering at the Lord's altar.

A hand grenade is said to be a mighty weapon. If you hit it squarely when you throw it, there is concussion, and even a glancing blow causes bruising. This is foolish repurposing. You were not called to do hard labor but to conquer through overflowing prayer.

* What Does Man Live By? Without God's grace, we cannot live. Therefore, there are two things we must do: acknowledge and believe that without God's grace all things are meaningless toil, and earnestly 'pray' hoping for that. Therefore, humans live by grace, and the method is to believe and pray. Really simple, isn't it?

Hidden evil brings much hurt. If poison is dissolved in medicine, it both heals and harms through side effects. Looking at myself, I must lay bare and earnestly ask that the poison that existed before does not work and cloud the Lord's glory.
* Immediate Obedience: What He desires now is that which is possible—prayer and thanksgiving, blessing and forgiveness, intercession and love, and running while looking only to Jesus.

There are times when sad tears flow and I heave deep sighs. It is the Lord's call to present everything before Him and pray. The most foolish thing is a soul that misses the signal in the midst of this and becomes deaf.
Remain awake and pray so you do not fall into temptation.

The faith life is a prayer life. Ultimately, the struggle is whether to continue prayer, and in any case, Satan tries to prevent prayer through various other issues. However, those who advance toward the goal continually move toward the place of prayer.
The hardest thing in faith is doing nothing. From the perspective of unbelief, prayer is doing nothing. But when you lift your spiritual eyes, the greatest and biggest work happens in the heavens.

* The Way of Love 3: We must love ardently with all that has been given and granted to me. And then we must get one life insurance policy. Insurance originally compensates when things depart. It is offering unceasing intercession so that the souls I have loved may look only to the Lord and continue to grow.

In the midst of struggle, to not struggle aimlessly and not make futile efforts in thin air, we must hear the Lord's voice and receive guidance in prayer and service. This is the boundary line that distinguishes worldly zeal from godliness.

No matter how much information you gather and how much you think, you cannot be certain of making the right decision. That's why you must pray. Those who follow others have no prayer. A decision without prayer ignores God and denies His image. I hope you become a person whose life the Lord takes responsibility for.

Hold precious the small place of prayer when you kneel down in the morning. It is far greater than eloquent expression and abundant knowledge. (At least it was for me.) There is the honor of the saints. Because the Lord has heard my voice and my plea, I love Him; because He inclined His ear to me, I will call on Him as long as I live—Psalm 116:1, 2.

An African chief received a Toyota 4-way as a gift. He boasted of using it remarkably. He listens to music with CDs and when it's hot, he enters it, turns on the AC, and rests. Then he walks far again and departs. A person who does not pray engages in hard labor. Though he experienced this, it is astounding that he cannot shed his regret for hard labor. He has been deeply involved in the organization for a long time, yet you cannot live a faith life for just a day or two.

* The Most Peaceful Prayer: It would be convenient to fill deficiencies, but other anxieties follow. The most peaceful prayer is this: I count all things that were beneficial to me as loss and dung—self-control is power.

Carry an intercessory prayer list in your inner pocket or handbag. Prayer gains strength the more you do it. Accumulated prayers are more useful and powerful than the traditions of distinguished families.
It is regrettable that I cannot give more. When in pain, I can give most powerfully, and in darkness, I can look most to the Lord.

James said the petition of a righteous person is powerful in its working. If we do not have God's heart in us, even if we pray, we cannot release God's power to work. To pray effectively, we must pray with God's heart and attitude toward the situation and person. Without forgiveness, true blessing and prayer do not occur.

* Absolute Peace: Paul conveys three joys to the Philippian believers from prison. He warns them to oppose the three adversaries that steal this joy: false love, legalism, and worldly worry. If you truly desire peace, embrace the mind of Christ, count what was beneficial as dung, and present everything to God with thanksgiving. That is the theme of Philippians.

One day you receive a text or email saying someone will give you several thousand pounds. How grateful and encouraged would you feel? However, such offers are usually loans where you borrow and must pay back twice the principal amount over six years. It seems to solve the problem as if helping, but the conclusion is earning more money. The Lord does not give cash. The Lord gives promises. Promises bear fruit through prayer and obedience.

* Absolute Anxiety: There is absolutely no peace for those who distance themselves from God, are not in the place of worship and grace, and have forgotten the cross work of Jesus. For those without Jesus in their heart and with the world and people filling it, anxiety is inevitable. They must experience trembling that shakes to the roots. Without even carob pods, the prodigal seeks home. I earnestly pray that such people never stretch out and sleep in peace.
When you are so confused you do not know where to start, please pray like this: Lord, take control!

* Prayer vs. Sin: Sin hinders prayer. And also, prayer hinders sin. The Lord's arm is not too short to save, and His ear is not too deaf to hear; rather, your iniquities have separated you from your God, and your sins have hidden His face from you so that He will not hear—Isaiah 59:1-2.

I hope we do not pray inadequately and receive inadequate guidance, causing us to say things we shouldn't and hurt others, or become impatient and stumble. The greatest mistake is arbitrary interpretation. To compare and become a victim is not the Lord's will. With faith, we must look only to the Lord.

Yesterday we prayed for Japan in the prayer meeting. Japan's great damage may be because of idolatry and sin. But is Korea better? When the Jews asked about the many people who died in the construction of the Tower of Siloam, He said, 'Unless you repent, you too will all perish likewise.' Christians must feel responsibility for Japan. If our prayers and love are insufficient, more people will suffer. God's primary expectation is not the fallen world but Christians who intercede in its midst. Let us pray for Japan and for us.
How grateful we should be that we can pray! Prayer transcends borders and regions, is not returned like an unwanted gift, and even transcends time itself.
I am praying for essays, work, health, visas, finances especially tuition, relationships, family, marriage, and vision. Be bold.
When I see many problems, I feel infinite lack. This is why I pray and fall to my knees. Being able to see one's own insufficiency is a blessing, because it causes us to rely more on the Lord.
Your rights: You truly have the right to be happy and, no matter where you are or what you do, you deserve intercession and prayer. That is the responsibility of a minister who serves for life.

Do not worry. Worry not, but only through prayer and supplication with thanksgiving make your requests known. Truth requires this. It is impossible with only my conviction and dedication. This is why in Acts 1, the Lord spoke this way: 'When the Holy Spirit comes upon you....'

* Life is a message: Pray earnestly for your disciples and clearly command them to live great lives. This means 'Look only to the Lord and run forward, just as I, your teacher, do.' Counting all gain as loss.... so that I may be found in Christ.... - Phil 2. I prayed that your faith would not fail.... - Luke 22:32.

During spiritual warfare, the most awakened people and groups are affected first. This is because they are on the front lines. First is the mission field, and second is those who intercede in prayer. There is no need to find trials strange. They are wrong seasons of fasting for the wrong god.
It is not my work to transform souls. I must entrust them completely to the Lord. This is why I pray and believe Him.
* The power to move forward: Believers move forward not because circumstances allow it, but because prayer changes circumstances. The Lord is wonderful. Pray great prayers for great works.

* The reason for not rejoicing: Do not complain about what you do not have, but give thanks for what you already have and your daily bread. You will receive joy as a gift and He will add other things as well. Give us this day our daily bread.... - The Lord's Prayer.

* Pass through the night this way: You must pray that Jesus becomes light in your darkness. The covering of darkness's gloom means I have no options in myself, and it means the Lord will become my light. When passing through darkness, the Lord will become light for you.
* Fly rather than Survive: Go beyond merely surviving and soar. Therefore, offer different prayers, different worship, different dedication. That is my calling. We are not just holding on....

Before saying you lack, try praying first. Retreating because of lack is the most convenient method but also the worst choice. If you lack, come to the Lord and entrust yourself to Him. Lord, I entrust my life, barley-bread-like as it is, to You. Living life without prayer is like a train trying to move without rails laid down.
There is no luck. Only thorough guidance exists. Abandon 'perhaps' and walk the prepared path with 'steadfastness' through prayer. Do not compare or wander.
Do not seek selfish desires but earnestly pray that God's will be done. The Lord will anoint your prayer. This is because it is a request supported by God's backing.

In suffering like Job, when losing everything and in dark darkness, if the Lord asks what I desire, I will ask that all the land I tread may worship Him. I will ask to see it covered by the Lord's blood. Make this place where I stand holy, and fill it with the fragrance of the Lord.

Our Lord God, who is worthy to receive great glory and honor, God present here and now.... God is faithful and holy. We join in praise, hold hands, and pray together. Now we worry for others. It's so good, and people say thank you... but people are grateful that we prayed and said no. The Lord hears our prayers.
When we pray, God begins to work.

Everything we cannot do is not material for despair but 'a subject for prayer.' Therefore, for the most important thing among what I cannot do with my own strength—'to pray'—I must earnestly pray that God gives me the power of prayer and guides me. Pray in order to pray.

Our lives are so difficult and hard that I have prayed with young people for grace and power. Within that short day, God poured out grace that had been prepared from long, long ago. I thought I truly loved, but it makes me love more, bury it deeper in my heart, and shed more tears.
We must pray once more to ask the Lord for the opportunity to give ourselves to Him. May we live with loyalty and die with commitment.

We pray unknowingly, but the Lord works knowingly. We pray inefficiently, but the Lord works with the highest efficiency. We simply raise our hands and open them, but the Lord covers with an enormous hand. We ultimately entrust, but the Lord enters into unimaginable micromanagement of that prayer. Lord, handle it. Deeply~~~~.
We must believe and pray that God's kingdom—God's supreme and powerful reign—comes upon us and our land. May you experience that reign and presence fourteen hours from now. The Lord does.

Our prayers do not bother God. Rather, they give Him glory. The Lord will surely hear our prayers. If Jesus is my Lord, there is no reason He would not listen. When Jesus's name is exalted, God the Father is most pleased and will do what pleases Him. Whatever you ask in my name, I will do it, so that the Father may be glorified through the Son. If you ask me anything in my name, I will do it. - John 14:13, 14.
Learn how to love the human heart, which is broader than the universe and more delicate than a flower petal. That is by asking the Lord. Love without understanding is suffering.

* Not seeming like sin but great sin: The most effective way to teach young people about prayer is to enter the fire of prayer together with them. Also, when the Lord gives grace so that one would die if not praying, He kindly leads humans to a situation where they would die if they don't pray. Prayer receives the power of the Holy Spirit, crushes the devil's work, and makes difficult tasks easy. Ceasing to pray is sin.

Complaint comes from the victim. But if you pray, forgiveness and blessing become possible instead of complaint. Because what is hoped for becomes reality, the victim becomes a beneficiary, and further becomes a helper.

If you want something but do not earnestly make your request, you do not really want it. If you say you love but do not pray, you do not love. A life that does not earnestly long and cannot love fervently is despised even in worldly enterprises.
After Monday dawn prayer, there is a Star Coffee meeting. We will prepare breakfast and have a good time chatting at an appropriate place.
Think on things above, do not think on things of earth. Regarding possessions and coveting, be dead, and regarding prayer and believing, be alive.

Answers require time and patience. It is not that God is limited by time, but rather that we need more time to let go, cut away, and burn away so that we become a vessel worthy of receiving the Lord's answers. That time is the Lord's 'faithful consideration.' If you abandon attachment, you will receive the answer.
At this moment, I bless and pray for all who labor, toil, and run the race of faith. Our good God will give the best things. Let us give thanks.

Pray this way. You will see the Lord's glory. When glory is great, suffering is abundantly overcome. 1. Make your requests known with thanksgiving (Phil 4:6, Psalm 50:23 Paul's prayer). 2. Pray to see His glory (Exodus 33:18 Moses's prayer). 3. Seek a listening heart, that is, wisdom (1 Kings 3:9 Solomon's prayer). 4. Pray that my will be broken and the Lord's will be done (Mark 14:36 Jesus's prayer).
I give thanks and honor and glory to the Lord for giving us such lovely members and for hearing our prayers. Lord who works! I love you.

At this retreat, I am preaching a special lecture titled 'The Cross and Life.' While preparing this, I have this thought: Be there with us. I have resolved not to minister alone. This is because the Lord told me to be with Him. For that ministry, I hope we will pray together and stand together. I will proclaim at that place, but before the Lord, I will stand with our young people. Please pray. Wednesday at 9:00 a.m.
Now that I have finished the day's work, I will go whisk away to pray.
The best way to respond to moments you cannot understand is to ask the Lord. God, what should I learn through this?

When passing through life's suffering, pray this way: God, humble me even more. That is the fastest way to pass through the tunnel. Please humble me. God pushes away the arrogant and does not allow such things to anyone. Remember that the Lord your God made you walk in the wilderness for these forty years to humble you and test you, to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep His commandment or not. - Deuteronomy 8:2.
To live on your knees while working and studying, life must be extremely simple.
To live on your knees while working and studying, life must be extremely simple. Jesus was a layperson who walked with fishermen and tax collectors and prayed as was His custom.
Well, now Haengcho Chapter 8.... Perhaps this will be the last Bible study at LG. I pray that the Lord's will be fulfilled. Also, I request your prayers.

Only those who despair of themselves will seek the Holy Spirit. In the gap between the cross and their own image, they experience this and come before the Lord and cry out. It is Saturday. Let us gather at 6 and pray together.

Holy tears that break oneself restrain fleshly desires, quench the fire of discord, cleanse dirty desires, humble proud eyes, refrain from vain speech, pursue intimate fellowship, love silence, and bear the fruit of prayer.
Rather than pursuing your own desires, praying that the Lord's will be done is the fastest and most peaceful path.

There are times when the work you do becomes trivial and your role becomes shabby. At that moment, the demon of 'comparison' surely comes. When people begin to compare, hell immediately takes hold. At such times, please pray this prayer: God, fulfill Your will for me. I have come for this, and I desire to fulfill Your plan. A person fulfilling the Lord's will has no need to compare, because it is not my work but the Lord's work.
A matter released, a problem laid down before the Lord—the Lord does not bring difficulty again. This is because there is no need to retake a passing subject.

Recover self-worth and open the door to employment at the end, give bright light in much suffering and disappointment. The word recovery seemed to exist only in books, but it appears in life too. So today also I run, to pray.

Proverbs 6:27 Can a man carry fire in his lap without his clothes being burned? Forgiveness is the prerequisite of the Lord's love. Prayer hidden with sorrow is only suffocating. If you love the Lord, you must forgive and release so they may go on.

Brother Jang Byung-hwa's father's funeral: Funeral service, Tuesday early morning 5:30 departure. Hoping for comments from those able to attend. Late saint Jang Yun-sang, September 16 at 11:00 at Durham, St. Joseph's Church.

Rather than despair at obstacles, you must kneel before the Lord and ask how you can be faithful where you are. Pray, receive guidance, and obey. Even if the work seems insignificant, when you handle it with faithfulness and sincerity, God's will is accomplished in God's time, through God's method, and in God's way.
I'm planning to fast and pray for two weeks starting tomorrow. Please pray for me :-)

I made it home safely hehe. I must have overexerted myself on Sunday because I got sick and when I woke up, Monday was almost over;;ㅋㅋ But the worship service and prayer meeting on Sunday were really wonderful!! I wish I could go on Saturday too..ㅋㅋ It's a shame ㅠ

That user determines to rush with lurker timing on a somewhat close map, and even knowing this, I fall for it. I know full well that Satan is deceiving me, yet I easily listen to that voice. Because it's so humanly persuasive and so convincing. I long to hear the Lord's voice.
Evening prayer at 7:30 PM @Mission House. Through me, through my lips... may the Lord be exalted. We will offer simple prayers. Simple prayer means praying earnestly and continuously in abundance.
After praying for two and a half hours in the evening and returning home, you will feel that there is no time in life to waste. Now anticipate the anointing upon your studies and future direction.
I pray that the Lord would give me the gift of motivation. The time given is 5 minutes.
Yesterday's fear is transformed into my prayer, and deep sighs are transformed into my song, because I laid down all my burdens at the foot of the cross. Hallelujah~♥
To Almighty Father, I urge you to open your mouth and cry out in prayer.
Put on the full armor of God. The angels who deliver prayers and my fellow workers will do the same. The answers to prayer will come swiftly.

Preach and pray, witnessing daily. From Hymn 505, today at work I have Lesson 3 of the Invitation to Happiness, and Luke 5:1-11, the Confession More Precious Than a Full Catch. Please pray that I may live a life of preaching, praying, and witnessing.

From my youth, there has been one ceaseless supplication. It is that wherever the Lord sends me, it doesn't matter, but I will not go like a dry stick. It is that I desire the Lord's anointing. That was my only condition.

Even when a young person's heart crumbles, they pray; even when it seems the sun won't rise tomorrow, they press forward. It is not by circumstances but by living in Jesus—the kind of faith-person spoken of in Hebrews that the world cannot comprehend.

When you truly long for something earnestly, you are naturally moved to act to achieve and obtain it. Not fervently praying for what you desire means you truly don't want it. Please take time to inquire what you truly desire now, what you wish to see.

No one would think it wasteful to make reservations and research good restaurants to spend sweet time with someone you truly love. The most valuable thing in the world is prayer. People of the world cannot and will not understand it. Because this is said on the premise of the Lord's being alive.

From my personal experience, God rarely works in the way we anticipate. When people stand before the Red Sea, they think a raft is the only solution and returning to slavery is the only way. No one thinks there could be a path within the sea. A path that never existed before—when you pray desperately, the Lord shows it to you. It is a secret, hidden until now from the world. You cry out to me, and I will answer you; I will show you great and hidden things you do not know. —Jeremiah 33:3
I'll be a bit late. Please pray.
Though a bit late, I wish you many blessings in the new year. I will pray that the Lord be with you in all you do. And thank you always for the good words shared through Facebook ^^

A Good Spouse. Everyone desires and prays to meet a good spouse. If I meet a good spouse, what is the fault of that person who meets me, unprepared? Therefore, I must first seek to become a good spouse myself.

Sin hinders our spiritual growth. If we cannot master sin, spiritual growth stops. When a life of receiving much grace yet committing sin repeatedly continues, it is like pouring water into a broken vessel. Come out and pray. So the Lord can touch you.
The fact that the Lord desires to hear my prayer.

The prayer 'Lord, mold me' gives us just a brief, sweet season of romance, then crushes all our stubbornness and passes us through a fiery furnace. If you asked to be molded, then being molded is enough. It is the quickest way. Thus says the Lord: 'My thoughts toward you are thoughts of peace and not of evil, to give you a future and a hope. You will call upon me and come and pray to me, and I will listen to you. You will seek me and find me, when you seek me with all your heart.'—Jeremiah 29:11, 13
Lord, bombard us with Your holiness.
Entrust yourself into the Lord's hands. So the Lord's hand may hold you.
In the Lord, I love and intercede. Disregard and keep going.
The person who kneels longest before the Lord is the one who stands most firmly.
To those who humbly kneel before the Lord, He will personally govern problems that cannot be expressed in human words. Before the Lord's sovereignty, all problems melt away.
To expect anything good without kneeling before the Lord is a deception.
Become a person who kneels long before the Lord. You will be the one who stands most firmly.
Lord, I have no intention of stopping until I finish the race set before me. Grant me to run even more. Here I am.

Lord, whether I live or die is not my concern. Since loving and serving You is my eternal purpose, grant me Your sufficient grace and the grace to fulfill that purpose. If life is long, I will serve and praise You all my days; if life is short, I will approach Your throne with joy and worship. According to my earnest expectation and hope, I will not be ashamed of anything, and now as before, I will live with full boldness—whether I live or die, that Christ may be honored in my body.—Philippians 1:20
Lord, You know what I truly long for in the end. I desire to be received by You.

If you cannot continue a personal encounter with the Lord, secret times become times of sinning. But for those who have deep encounter with the Lord, secret times become the deepest and most noble times of grace.

To pray to the Lord means that faith arises that He will surely hear and answer, and at the same time, gratitude even if He should not. Be assured that He will surely deliver from the king's hand, and though not, we will not bow to an idol.
I offer my heart to the Lord,
Offer your heart to the Lord every moment. Then the Lord will give you His heart. It is offered as a broken heart, and the Father's heart comes.

That the Lord is faithful is not a statement based on my circumstances or qualifications. He is faithful because He is faithful, and prayer is relying on that eternally unchanging character and moving forward. Success without Jesus is not success. That is why failure in Jesus is not failure either. You in Jesus can never fail.

I desire the Lord to give me a burning thirst. A thirst so great that nothing else can satisfy; a heart so earnest that counterfeits cannot fulfill it; a longing so intense that only the Lord can fill it. Grant me such a heart. I love You, Lord.
It is a happiness that there are many people who pray for me. It means I have many loved ones.

Let us look only to the Lord. Even now the Lord surveys the entire earth to bestow power on those who look only to Him (those whose hearts are fully devoted to Him—Acts 16:9). Dead fish drift with the current. But living fish swim against it. I pray that all who pray have the power to swim against the current all people swim, the strength to live against the flow of history, the power to live against the values of the age.

In the Lord, I intercede for my precious brother Hong Moon and ask for your vote. This is an opportunity to receive a Pro Team trial. When sometimes groundless anxiety comes, there is something you must do. It is to hold fast to Jesus, who is the most certain reason. Faith is a life that precedes feeling.
Prayer is called breathing. Because nothing naturally happens without the Lord's help. Everything is by the Lord's boundless grace. Pray continually—1 Thessalonians 5:16
The Lord surely hears our prayers. He knows our hearts and circumstances. Because He created that deep heart of ours.
When I see the Lord, I kneel and pray and repent even while at work or school. Peter repented on his knees among many colleagues and in his own workplace. Stand before the Lord.
I have no choice but to rely on the Lord. That is why I pray.

Those who truly trust in and pray to the Lord already receive blessings in the Lord's likeness, are satisfied, and are answered. And I—in righteousness I will see your face; when I awake, I will be satisfied with seeing your likeness. Psalm 17:15

Without the Lord's help, it is far better to perish in the Lord than to have problems solved. If the Lord does not help, nothing can help. Rather than alleviating symptoms through human methods, atmosphere changes, or justifications, when the prayer the Lord requests deepens, there is nowhere for the problem to go, and fellowship with the Lord is sufficient. 'Lord, I prayed because my heart ached, but now I am already satisfied in You, so do as You will. My soul is satisfied because of You.' 'Unless the Lord builds the house, those who build it labor in vain; unless the Lord watches over the city, the watchman stays awake in vain.' (Psalm 127:1) 'My lord, king, help me! The king said, 'If the Lord does not help you, how can I help you?'—2 Kings 6:26-27

Following the Lord's will is not playing a game of odds with selfish expectations. It is praying and quietly seeking the Lord's guidance. If you walk by the Spirit, you will not gratify the desires of the flesh.

Now is the time to pray so that the Lord's will is fully accomplished in my life. Starting to pray does not mean starting from tomorrow morning's dawn prayer, or next week's evening prayer, or next month's all-night prayer service. Then you will never pray. The moment you see this writing, you pray right there. Only then can you hold fast to prayer and accomplish the Lord's will.

Unsolved problems actually protect me. They make me pray and help me avoid wrong choices through deep providence. 'The rulers of the Philistines were angry with him; so they said to him, "Send back this man; let him return to the place you assigned him. He must not go with us into battle, or he will turn against us during the fight. How better could he regain the favor of his master than by taking the heads of our men? Isn't this the David they sang about in their dances: 'Saul has slain his thousands, and David his tens of thousands'?" - 1 Samuel 29:4,5. God protected the future king from becoming an enemy of Israel while in exile through the resistance of the Philistine officials.
God, grant me strength today to run for Your glory throughout this world.
God, give courage to friends who need courage, and give peace to those who need peace. I pray that You become strength to friends who are struggling in this hour. We desperately need You, Lord.
God, if I keep waiting like this... I'll really die. God: Hmm~~!? ......., (He's still not dead.. What a remarkable fellow...) Kids~~ Turn up the difficulty level.
God, I desire that You grant me grace so that I, the least among all, may pour out everything once more.

Without being close to God, indeed without becoming one with Him, truth cannot be achieved. The only way to become one is through prayer and the Word. If this doesn't happen, we must stop service and ministry and remain in the Word and prayer. We are sanctified through the Word and prayer. 1 Timothy 4:5
Prayer is hearing the Holy Spirit preach to me.

We must earnestly pray that God grants us the gifts and tools we need. However, we must not only hope for and wait for these things, but when we focus on, obey, and move forward in that calling, God is pleased and begins to fill all things. It is the calling that matters, not the tools.
Offer your heart to God. Because of infinite happiness, you will hate enjoying other sins. Those who give their whole heart have the happiness of their whole heart.

Sometimes God suddenly gives us a poor spirit. At that time, we must redesign our lives. We must change the structure to one of kneeling and intimately meeting the Lord. If we miss that moment, we must wait another ten years. Iron must be struck when it is hot and glowing to be changed. Grant me a poor spirit.
What God needs to guide me is not 'my opinion' but prayer and obedience.
God has not answered all my prayers. If He had, I would have married someone else and also married several times.

God will use our youth group. He will awaken the continent and spread revival like a wildfire. He will pour out grace we cannot imagine and have never thought of, so that all people will marvel. Human merit will disappear and the sovereignty of the Lord will come. We must continue to pray with the faith that the Lord will surely work. What we must hold onto is remaining humble to the end and not being deceived by Satan. I hope you will decide not to respond to darkness and respond with renunciation of rights and a contrarian spirit. While continuing to pray for one another, I hope you become young people who cast fire on this earth through worship with sacrifice and sacrifice with cost. Even if we serve for one day, I desire to live that way.
God hears and knows all things. If God knows, then God solves it. If I eagerly pursue my own methods, the result will be not solution but deterioration.
God knows me and knows my circumstances. When you pray, you can feel that. Because He has heard, you become assured that He will also accomplish it.
The life I want to share with young people through all ministries can be summed up surprisingly simply. 'Proclaim and pray, be a witness every day' - Hymn 505
God responds even to our groans. Because He is merciful. However, He does not sustain all weak people. If we complain when we are weak, we perish. Rather, if we praise, He gives us strength.
God loves us who are insignificant. To those who tell the Lord all things in detail before Him, He sends His Word to heal, restore, and strengthen them.
A common characteristic that happens to all those who seek God's will is 'answered prayer.'
Let the things that hurt God's heart hurt my heart.

Become God's ace. Be someone whose appearance can completely change the flow of the game. I hope you trust the Lord who holds and transforms the person I have interceded and prayed for and entrusted to the Lord. Under difficult circumstances and conditions, I hope you become warriors of faith who stretch out your hands, bow your head, call upon the Lord, and open new heavens through faith. Send down fire, Lord, the fire of Your Holy Spirit to me.
God will surely accomplish it according to His method. So now is the time to seek the Lord in all my circumstances. I must call upon the Lord and tell Him exactly how I feel in this situation.

To live according to God's will, you must hear His voice. Deciding and living without prayer means living by the voice of the world and darkness. If you truly want to please God and obey Him, it would be strange not to hear His voice.

If God does not help, no one can. Even if people help and use tricks, it ultimately ends in tragedy and ruin. Pray and obey so that God will help. 'Go and tell Hezekiah: This is what the LORD, the God of your father David, says: I have heard your prayer and seen your tears; I will add fifteen years to your life. And I will deliver you and this city from the hand of the king of Assyria. I will defend this city.' - Isaiah 38:5-6

God did not design people to worry. The worries that naturally come to us are not our portion. However, if we worry, the 'purpose is changed,' so tremendous wear happens to the product (human being) and eventually it breaks. 'Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God' (Philippians 4:6) -> We must use all the contents of worry as kindling for the altar of prayer. 'But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well' (Matthew 6:33) -> If we work for the Lord's work, worry disappears. Are you worried? You have extra time.

When humans try to solve what God must work on, it is called 'worry.' There is a statistic that only about 4% of what happens to me can be responded to. After all, if something cannot be solved in about 15 minutes of worry, we must coolly entrust it to prayer.
We can pray contradictory prayers that God cannot answer. Like this: God, please give me patience, please~~, right now~~~

God said: 'Because he loves me, I will rescue him; I will protect him, for he acknowledges my name. He will call on me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble, I will deliver him and honor him.' - Psalm 91:14-15. I hope you confess wholeheartedly that you know the Lord's name. I hope you confess hotly that you love the Lord. Then the Lord will deliver you.
If it is sadness and pain that God has not given, I hope you reject it. If that doesn't work well, I hope you ask for 'the ability to ignore it.'

If you go on a date and brag only about good restaurants, gifts, and entertainment, but have no interest in and excitement about the person you love, it is quite abnormal. Prayer is because being with the Lord is so good, not because you only hope for answers. If you seek the Lord's face, not His hand, He will accomplish everything else and heal you.
If you do what God tells you to do, the ministry God appoints, the meetings God permits, and the labor God requests, you will do well. Everything else, the Lord will do.

Our Father in heaven~ Our God, You are worthy of receiving great glory and honor. God present here now - Almighty Father God, this European land needs Your reign. Only You can heal and restore us. We seek Your face. Come to us~ For the kingdom, the power, and the glory are Yours forever, Father. Amen * I hope all members earnestly long on that day for God's glorious cloud to cover our tent, and pray accordingly.
When you are struggling, you are not alone. God loves and watches over you, and this causes another soul to share that heart and earnestly kneel.
Every soul we encounter, one by one, stands precariously at a critical moment. The gospel is needed and prayer is needed. I feel this strongly. And I see recovery happening.
When I came to Korea, I visited the rock where I prayed seeking wisdom in my youth. True wisdom is not having what you don't have, but delighting in what you have.
Brother Han Seok has been discharged. However, intercession continues. We will win to the end.
Thank you for praying for Han Seok. He has improved remarkably, and we give glory to God, saying it is a miracle. Thank you so much. The Lord is wonderful.

Do not be discouraged if there is nothing special to do. Can you not find the people related to you and pray for them, bless them, and forgive them? These are not abilities that begin from my strength and capacity, but abilities that flow from the heart God has poured out.
I bless the members and leaders who are with us. Thank you for following without complaint through the not-easy 14-hour gathering. Especially, glory to the Lord who was with us in prayer and talk.

When we ask together in unity, the Lord will surely accomplish it. This is the Lord's principle. So it is important that God is one. Rather than adding a few things and fighting, keeping unity, looking at each other intently, and rejoicing together is far better.
What changes the absence of the Holy Spirit to His presence is earnest prayer.

In confusion, grant clear wisdom and a spirit of revelation, and give new strength, excitement, and emotion to this tired body and heart. Send someone to preach the gospel to my family in my home country, and attach an expert and helping hand to untangle the complicated legal issues and problems tangled like threads. Heal my body, especially pour the healing oil of the Lord into my knees. Let the emptiness and purposelessness in my heart be filled with the Lord's truth and meaning. Do not let me be chased by workplace and visa issues, but let me rest in the Lord. Give healing to my wrists and joints and cover me with love. Fill my loneliness with the Lord's time, and let all my work look only to the Lord and entrust itself to Him. Let human ambition be overcome by calling, and let me act without light and without name. Let the spirit of judgment and condemnation depart, and let me serve with love, compassion, and compassion like the Lord. Reverse things in my studies, let me meet helping hands, perform miracles. In situations that are impossible from a human perspective, bestow the needed and prepared ability. Guide my way whether I should serve the Lord in England or Korea. Pour out the ability to bear this work. Bring harmony among my parents and open the door of economy in my home. Train me and establish me as a leader serving souls, and equip me. Let anxiety and worry in my heart melt before the name of Jesus. Deliver me from the temptation and greed of sin and satisfy me with the Lord alone. O Lord of power, pour out the ability I can bear. I pray for my friends with a troubled heart these days.
Act with conviction. If conviction is small, act small. If there is much work to be done, bow down more and pray to dwell in much conviction.
I must go to the depth where I can obtain peace. That is losing myself before the Lord's great love in a prayer closet where no one is.
When you pray in tribulation, help comes from unexpected places. Sometimes even unbelievers help. We cannot limit the Lord's help.

We cannot turn the water wheel with water that has already flowed. Yesterday's grace cannot become today's, and we cannot live today on yesterday's manna. I hope we become members who humbly kneel and look to the Lord.

Some say they cannot be thankful because there are too many difficult things. No. Because we cannot be thankful, there are many difficult things. I hope to present our needs and what we lack with thanksgiving. The most powerful prayer is thanksgiving that turns things into reality.
When it is difficult, you must pray like this: God, deal with me and humble me further.

Before you say you're dying because it's hard, I hope you will pray. Without even stepping on stage and lingering on the stairs, do not whine and settle the matter with knees and faith. You will really feel that it is worth it.
Not praying because you're exhausted is like refusing to eat because you're hungry. The secret to happiness is breaking the cycle of despair quickly.

People say they give up because things are hard. Before saying it's difficult, you should pray first and then speak. This isn't being shot down while flying—it's falling on your own while waiting on the ground. Without prayer, you don't even have the right to say you're struggling.

It seems like 5 minutes of prayer produces 5 minutes of God's work, and 10 minutes of prayer produces 10 minutes of work. That's not how it works. God does it all at once. He works with low cost and high efficiency. That's why the Bible uses the expression 'storing up.' Romans 2:5

* A Christian's appeal: When the church sees structural evil and injustice, there are only two ways—turning a blind eye or mobilizing public opinion, or using physical force. The first way the church changes the world is through prayer, because the Lord is the Master. Then, while listening to the Lord's Word about how to approach the world, we must appeal with God's character. Through continuous intercession, we receive guidance for specific action. When the Lord speaks and directs, we raise our voice. We must have a heart of compassion and love while simultaneously hating sin and not tolerating injustice.

Praying only for the problem when you face it is childlike faith. Behind every problem is God. If you pray for His will to be done, you will experience resolution through the Lord's method within it. You should ask like this: 'Lord, what should I learn through this problem, and what purpose should I fulfill for You?'
Not everything that is spoken is communicated. The Lord must do it. That's why prayer comes first in ministry. Before leaving this city, you must first be filled with the Holy Spirit.
Don't worry about things you cannot do; instead, obey what you can do. Move forward only with prayer and thanksgiving.

Paul taught that when we receive with thanksgiving, there is no food to reject, because we are sanctified through prayer and God's Word. Ultimately, transformation doesn't happen when we appease our desires as we experience them, but when prayer and God's Word are concentrated. I feel that our current prayer meetings are saving many lives and pleasing the Lord.
Prayer is difficult because we do it so little. Prayer becomes sweet when we do it much.
When much has collapsed, this is the prayer: 'God, let me do what I must do right now.' The answer is to fulfill your calling and remain in the Lord.
I intercede for our young people who face problems like saltwater that cannot be solved by words. Be bold.
If I reduce the time spent praying, praising, and listening to God's Word, my life will become richer and more efficient. That's not true. Life becomes impoverished, not enriched.
As you pray, do not let your faith weaken; give glory to God.
7:30 @ Mission Education Center. We will pray.

Looking back, I worried and suffered unnecessarily. Everything is resolved and solved under the Lord's grace, yet I pull future matters forward and worry about them. I should not worry beyond earnest prayer. The Lord will accomplish it.
I pray because I know what I want, and I know how earnestly I desire it.
Do not stop. Persistence becomes real power. Continue relentless intercession and love.
I hope our friends become victors in relationships. Be bold and seek wisdom.
Leaders try hard at ministry. Revival happens just if we don't hinder. Become a servant of obedience, not a hindrance.
What do you wish I would do for you? Show your desire. Through it, faith can be known. What you truly desire is yourself.

Fasting and crying out in anguish is painful. But the result is transformation of life. If you sow seeds while weeping, you will surely reap with joy. That harvest will be returned not as wealth but as life.

Many people pray, desiring that others support and love them. As prayer deepens, eventually you realize that even if everyone abandons you, it's fine, because Jesus alone is enough. After receiving this answer, other relationships are also resolved. If you cling to them, you will lose them.
The reason for fasting is not to change circumstances. Above all, it is to change yourself. Extended fasting means you need to change greatly. As much as you change, the way will open.

Things I cannot control are not my domain; they are God's responsibility. That's why Jacob didn't devise a strategy to fight Esau's 400 men at the Jabbok River; he appealed to God. How simple—obedience in what to do and prayer in what to pray for. The simple life the Lord gives: simple, flexible, intense!
To beautifully fulfill the Lord's will for me, I must pray for prayer. There is One who guides and helps in prayer. Powerful prayer begins there.
The greatest prayer is the confession of love for the Lord and prayer for His will to be accomplished.
We must ask increasingly for the Lord's intervention, His rule, and His handling. So that in this dark world we may see the Lord's glory.

Whether praying at a corner while walking the street, or confessing alone like crazy at a desk overwhelmed with busyness, 'I trust in the Lord!' or whether earnestly appealing with only eyes for the Lord's help amid unbearable pressure—the Lord sees and hears it all. He cannot possibly turn away from us whom He redeemed through His Son's cross and blood.
I trust in God who hears my prayers. I believe that He who caused me to pray will also work. I intercede and bless.
Also, grant us effective intercession for lambs in difficulty. When the Lord rules that soul, He brings rivers in the desert and causes flowers to bloom in the wilderness.
