'And this is my prayer: that your love may abound more and more in knowledge and depth of insight, so that you may be able to discern what is best and may be pure and blameless until the day of Christ, filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ—to the glory and praise of God' (Philippians 1:9-11). 'My heart is steadfast, O God, my heart is steadfast; I will sing and make music. Awake, my soul!' (Psalm 57:7).

Thinking that one message or text can change a person's heart or explain everything is arrogant. When you stomp on embers, sparks spread further. It is foolish to interfere where God should handle and resolve. David believed that receiving recognition was God's grace and receiving criticism was also within God's goodness. That is why he was an excellent leader. 'For the foolishness of God is wiser than human wisdom, and the weakness of God is stronger than human strength' (1 Corinthians 1:25).

Tears are mostly water, the rest composed of salt, lactoferrin, and lysozyme. While the composition is similar for most people, the reasons are all different. The Lord remembers all tears shed before Him and repays them. 'You keep track of all my sorrows. You have collected all my tears in your bottle. You have recorded each one in your book' (Psalm 56:8).

There is little I can control. But when I submit myself and bow before the Lord, I see the Lord's work in areas I cannot handle and cannot reach. When I work, only I work, but when I pray, the Lord works.

If David spent his days merely responding to concerns and accusations about himself, he would never have been able to embrace the vision of God's work. He should have entrusted Saul's death to God and concluded with only doing his part—'taking Saul's spear and water jug.' David's great principle: 'The Lord lives! And may my Lord the King not be concerned about this wicked man Saul. God Himself will bring about my death. But as for you, the Lord will surely make my master's royal house a lasting dynasty' (1 Samuel 26:10). Failing to keep this principle makes one like an unbeliever, for it denies the Lord's sovereignty.

I must entrust matters beyond my realm to the Lord. For what I must do, I should exert all strength and do my best, praying and seeking it. 'The Lord lives...' Release the consciousness of responding to everything. Since the Lord lives, I entrust matters beyond my realm to Him. Grant me to do what I must do.

The greatest danger is not disadvantage. It is self-confidence that thinks 'we can do this.' When the self-sufficient 35,000 disappear, the faithful 300 of belief will flourish. 35,000 is far more dangerous than 300. 'The Lord said to Gideon, 'You have too many men. I cannot deliver Midian into their hands, or Israel would boast against me, 'My own strength has saved me'' (Judges 7:2).

1. In sports, the ace is one who dominates flow and circumstances. 2. Being pressed on defense, switching to offense, changing defeat to victory. 3. The Lord desires us to become aces who dominate circumstances where He has called us. 4. That is not brute force but 'the power of gratitude.' Raising your hands and giving thanks in ruins requires using faith, and such a person dominates circumstances and wins. 5. The expression of one who gives thanks carries victory's composure regardless of environment.
Boldness is not a state without fear but a choice to hold onto something more precious. Jesus is my strength and my hope (Hymn 93).

The hardest moment in a journey of faith is the last moment. When you want to quit, when life seems wrecked, when God's voice is no longer heard—you must endure that moment. Because the last half hour is the hardest part of faith. Some may feel they should give up now. But I want to say this: please endure just a little longer. When facing momentary problems, hold fast to eternal promises.

Will you still maintain your integrity? (Job 2:9) To all youth group members who passed through London over the past 12 years, now grown older, having families and becoming parents, or shouldering responsibilities in society, I send my greetings. If asked how you are doing, I would say 'by the Lord's grace.' As time passes and I age, I pray more and more and cling more to the Lord's cross. Because the 'grace of the cross and blood' we cried out is no jest. Living in this harsh world, if someone asks 'Will you still maintain your integrity in youth?' I hope you answer 'Not only will I maintain it, I am sorry I cannot give more.' 'Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever' (Hebrews 13:8).
One who seeks that kingdom and His righteousness is an excellent person. But the trap for one seeking righteousness is seeking compensation in profit for righteousness.

Others seem to go easily while I go with difficulty. Though the path ahead is dark, when I cry out in prayer the Lord shows only half a step. The hardest thing is that He does not give me a schedule. I don't know when it will end. I am not asking for something grand, but when will I arrive and live as a human being? What my family desires is simply ordinary but a school slightly better than others, a job that pays a bit better, a spouse matching our level. The Lord ensures I walk the wilderness. Humbled completely, fed manna, drinking water from the rock until I obey the Lord's voice. Those who eat manna and drink from the rock will emerge as fine gold. 'Remember the whole way the Lord your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, to humble you and test you in order to know what was in your heart, whether or not you would keep His commandments. He humbled you and let you hunger and fed you with manna, which you and your ancestors did not know, in order to make you understand that one does not live by bread alone but by every word that comes from the mouth of the Lord' (Deuteronomy 8:2-3).

In the wilderness, to drink even a drop of water or eat a morsel of bread, one had to cry out and depend on the Lord with life and death. When relying only on the Lord, enslaved people became the greatest nation in the world. However, in Canaan, grain grew and bore fruit and water was abundant without wholly depending on the Lord. This is why rapid corruption occurred. When you lose the sense of awe from your first encounter, you quickly become proud and turn away from the Word. Do as you did at first. Jesus answered, 'It is written: Man shall not live on bread alone, but on every word that comes from the mouth of God.' - Matthew 4:4

In the wilderness, one cannot wear designer clothes or gleaming shoes, and luxury foot care is unimaginable. Simply surviving is a victory. In the wilderness, do not complain that your desires are not satisfied. Instead, be grateful for dust-covered sandals that do not fall apart, tattered clothes that do not tear, and feet that do not blister. This is because God has specially cared for you. The wilderness requires the miracles of the wilderness. During these forty years your clothes did not wear out on you, and your feet did not swell. - Deuteronomy 8:4
It is not I who labor through my suffering. The anointing works. The anointing of the power to break the yoke—that is what works.

Living an ordinary life is not God's will. At the very moment you think it is too late, if you move forward with a hunger that wakes you at dawn without effort, within a few years you will become an excellent person. A satisfied pig never achieves its dreams.

You succeed in proportion to the number of people you respect. That is why a generation without authority is unhappy. Whether you leave or stay, if respect remains, both the one who stays and the one who leaves are blessed.

Lack is not inferiority but rather the ability to achieve dreams. The choice that makes parents and others laugh is a wrong choice. Even if the whole world tears you apart, a choice you cannot deny for even one second—that is your dream.

Even when saying 'I cannot do this' or 'I am insufficient,' turning away, if you say it is the Lord's will, you will unhesitatingly go on a long journey saying 'I will serve.' When it comes from the Lord and not from me, that is faith.
Whether I have done my best is not told by results. The process testifies silently.
Faith is abandoning something lesser to obtain something greater.
You do not need to teach the answer. Most people already know. When I simply obey the heart given to me, I experience the Lord's work. The Lord does it.
The will of the One who sent me is that I shall lose none of all those he has given me, but raise them up at the last day. - John 6:39
Do not squander the time in the wilderness. God does not make mistakes.

You will surely suffer. You will also be tested. Your vision proves this. If your mission is great, resistance will certainly be great. Overcome it. But my righteous one will live by faith. And I take no pleasure in the one who shrinks back. - Hebrews 10:38

If the Lord places me in prison, it does not mean I should despair there. Rather, I must become a faithful prisoner and find the hidden opportunity. When I serve with such care and faithfulness that I notice the steward's expressions, opportunities in life will come. Joseph asked Pharaoh's officials, who were in custody with him in his master's house, 'Why do you look so sad today?' - Genesis 40:7

A chicken has perfect wings but cannot fly. Because its vision is only 30 cm. An eagle, with 4.0 average vision, soars through the sky. When you know the Lord's will, you can fly. When you obey the will He has revealed, you will discern the best path.

In orphanages, there are occasionally children who do not lose heart. Children who endure mockery and rejection without complaint, playing joyfully with vitality—they are all children who have received a promise. They are children whose parents have promised to come for them. People who regard God's promises with good faith occupy the high ground in spiritual warfare. They never lose. Hold fast to the promise. Through faith they conquered kingdoms... obtained what was promised, shut the mouths of lions. - Hebrews 11:33

In David's Psalms, the phrase 'delivered from distress' includes endurance. David prayed ceaselessly but spent many years with salvation that merely sustained life. This was not because King Saul's power was strong, but because David had to be transformed. The issue is not circumstances but me. In distress, the Lord carefully observes our response and attitude. We can advance only as much as we are transformed. Saul is merely used for a time; when his refinement is complete, he cannot be found even if sought. Affliction has been good for me, that I may learn your decrees. - Psalm 119:71

There is no suffering without meaning. Suffering has purpose. There is a voice of God I must hear. If I respond to that voice, I will live. But if I ignore it, I will die. That is truth. Listen, my son, to your father's instruction and do not forsake your mother's teaching... When you walk, your steps will not be hampered; when you run, you will not stumble. - Proverbs 4:4
God was behind it. - Genesis 45:5
Suffering compels one to kneel. The knee transforms suffering into a door for me.

We must fight the good fight of faith. Believers cannot avoid the fight and must endure it until entering the kingdom of heaven. This fight can only be won through faith, and because it is not an evil struggle of pursuing perishable self-interest, it is a 'good fight.' The good fight of faith means I die in faith and the Lord lives in my place. Fight the good fight of the faith. Take hold of the eternal life to which you were called and about which you made the good confession in the presence of many witnesses. - 1 Timothy 6:12

To others I may seem quite respectable, but in truth, I cannot even keep my own heart. The more accurate assessment is that I am full of problems. Without the Lord, I cannot be kept safe even for a moment. That complete reliance is power and authority. I must depend only on the Lord.

Where there is no revelation, people cast off restraint. - Proverbs 29:18 If the Word is not heard, there is no vision, and without vision, there is no hope and mission. People live as they please and become very empty. The Word must be heard and prayers must pour forth. Then we live.
Scheduled to be discharged in 21 days. Continuing to push forward in prayer.

Rather than complaining by my calculation, I hope to find peace through obedience to the Lord. The Gospel is that the Almighty Lord died on the cross in weakness. God's foolishness is wiser than human wisdom, and God's weakness is stronger than human strength. - 1 Corinthians 1:25

Brother Park Han-seok has improved beyond recognition, and after completing the final scanning examination, the doctor said he is considering discharge. Please continue to pray. As the Lord's kingdom expands, darkness will break and life will flourish wherever it reaches.

The wick of a lamp can only shine when it continually receives supply. When supply is cut off, it consumes itself. Rather than working sporadically, when you spend time steadily with the Lord, thorns are removed and you gain the power of rest. No burn out.

Be kind to those who have shown you kindness. That is God's will and an invitation to peace in life. Even if that person has not been good to you and has a harsh nature, overcome evil with good. That is our calling. 'The Lord was with Joseph and showed him kindness and granted him favor in the eyes of the prison warden.' - Genesis 39:21
Today is London Saturday gathering. Please be clear about what you hope for and desire from God. The Lord is the God of those who prepare and expect.

The church has people of various kinds. Many come with wounded hearts. Therefore, church members sometimes act in ways that are not virtuous, unlike worldly people. Because change comes through believing, not before believing, we must accept and wait for such people. But leaders are different. If leaders or those devoted to worship act this way, it is difficult to continue in that position. They give many people reason to stumble. God requires more dedication and holiness from those appointed to be holy than from those newly coming to church.

Trying to solve problems easily is greed. Simply fleeing that place, fearing worldly people and selling faith, trying to satisfy your heart with the world and people, after parting with loved ones, praying like gambling with fifty-fifty odds betting with the Lord, interpreting yourself and your situation merely through comparison with others, falling into self-pity and making yourself the only victim, seeking to solve everything in faith in one stroke, solving everything in that place (everything), right now (right now), trying too hard, securing money and recognition to gain worry-free stability before doing something, must fully use the opportunity God provides for training. You must shed some tears and experience heartache. Holding your place and looking at the Lord faithfully and sincerely is necessary. Only then do you come out as pure gold. Otherwise you come out unrefined. Not pure gold but gold-plated, they say.

Without establishing purpose, you are swayed by others, trapped by weaknesses, do only urgent matters, finish life, and waste your life and time in emptiness. But the person who prays establishes purpose and lives with the balance the Lord gives.

Daniel was a truly faithful employee to his boss, King Nebuchadnezzar. That king had authority over Daniel's life, promotion, and everything. Yet he was free from that boss's pressure. He enters the lion's den and the fiery furnace, facing threats, yet maintains composure and follows truth. Prayer gives insight and perspective to see that God is greater than people who appear great in the world.

When I entrust my way to God and depend on the Lord in all circumstances, regardless of situation, He brings the conclusion. Commit your way to the Lord; trust in him and he will do this. - Psalm 37:5

He looks quite improved. If we continue praying, reduce medication, and there are no seizures, we may see good results sooner. Along with relay fasting and preparing for the retreat, we ask for continued prayer for Brother Han-seok. As the Lord reigns, the powers of darkness retreat.

Prayer itself does not guarantee God's intervention. After Jacob prayed, he made a gift and divided his people into three groups as a portfolio. (Genesis 32:7) Portfolio is an investment method that reduces risk through diversified investment. When you pray this way, the Lord makes you pray the prayer at the Jabbok River where your hip is wrenched. If you say 'Though I die, I will die,' you will surely live.

Stake your life on prayer. It will surely be answered. A person with nowhere but the Lord to depend on will surely receive an answer. When everything to depend on is gone and only the Lord remains, that is when your golden age comes.

If you do not understand the meaning when suffering, you will despair. Wisdom helps me understand the meaning and overcome. My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness. - 2 Corinthians 12:9
If you can only be faithful when all conditions are met, faithfulness is impossible until death. Stake your life in limited conditions. You will see God's glory.

You must be faithful when opportunity is given. If I refuse, God's work does not stop. Not only does the work continue, but I and my household can even be destroyed. If you remain silent at this time, relief and deliverance for the Jews will arise from another place, but you and your father's family will perish. And who knows but that you have come to your royal position for such a time as this? - Esther 4:13-14. If the owners keep quiet, the stones will cry out. - Luke 19:40
Prayer is like laying rails for life. When a train runs on rails, it does not mean it is constrained but that it runs faster. I hope you become believers who lay KTX rails for your lives.
My spirituality is revealed through the smallest action. This does not mean focus on the action. It means to guard your heart, which is the root of that action.
We did not seek work appropriate to our ability but prayed for ability appropriate to the work. - Phillips Brooks (1835-1893)

Making a problem appear larger is the devil's work. That is why he tries to stop it any way possible. All forms of discouragement come from the devil. The battle on this earth is ultimately the battle between 'Am I discouraged?' and 'Is the devil discouraged?'

People of faith must not stop or pause hastily. All these men are trying to frighten us... 'Their hands will get too weak for the work, and it will not be completed.' But I prayed, 'Now strengthen my hands.' - Nehemiah 6:9. When there is obstruction and obstacle, I hope you become believers and warriors who advance in faith. Nehemiah prayed this prayer and held a tool in one hand and a weapon in the other, continuing to push forward.

What is best? What the Lord has allowed. The best clothes are those that fit me well and suit me, and the best food is that which tastes good to me. Even if what is given to me appears inadequate, God displays His power through it. David had a sling, and Moses had a staff.

As best as I can, I do my best according to the work of God who gives me strength. Maximized obedience is not measured by the world's standards but by being held by God's Word and challenging the world. Faith is believing that my destiny is determined by the Word. For this I labor, struggling with all his energy, which so powerfully works in me. - Colossians 1:29. Become a bulldozer bound by the Word.

To cook ramen well, read the instructions for about 30 seconds and cook it faithfully. If you want to reach a higher level, cook it every day. Daily practice is skill. That is 'spirituality in daily life.'
Trying to do everything well is greed and moves away from the cross. For my calling, I do my best; for other things, even third-rate is good.

What is given to me is what God has freely blessed me with. I must save many people and bless them with it. Joseph's revival is not personal revival but saves his father's household, Pharaoh, and all peoples of the near east from famine.

Suffering makes me a person of mission and suffering makes me bold. Suffering causes me to discover 'my value' and suffering transforms me from a chick lingering in the nest into an 'eagle' that rejects temptation. Rise high in the midst of suffering.

What I realize through that failure is that failure is not failure but a process of becoming bold and trusting more. When walking through the dark valley of death, the world will say 'you failed,' but it is not so. 'Even though I walk through the dark valley of death, if the Lord is with me, I can surely overcome!'
When David was anointed, what happens immediately is not wearing a crown, being exalted, and being recognized, but rather being driven into the wilderness and undergoing training in 'failure.'

When David was anointed, what happens immediately is not wearing a crown, being exalted, and being recognized, but rather being driven into the wilderness and undergoing training in 'failure.' What I realize through that failure is that failure is not failure but a process of becoming bold and trusting more. When walking through the dark valley of death, the world will say 'you failed,' but it is not so. 'Even though I walk through the dark valley of death, if the Lord is with me, I can surely overcome!'

When the Word is proclaimed, believe and obey immediately. Simple obedience brings progress in life. When you advance a little, the next path will also become slightly more visible. Even a thousand-mile journey progresses one step at a time in this way.

Do not use the strength and ability I have for myself, but invest it in places that show care for the powerless and weak. Especially when serving the people entrusted to me with unchanging commitment regardless of their response, and when bearing the burden, true power and ability are revealed.
Do not fight for my victory but for the Lord's will. I pray that you become warriors of faith who can rejoice even in defeat for the Lord's will. I must decrease and the Lord must increase.

In his later years, God gives David blessings without worry. Why? Because there is no longer a need to face failure and confirm 'what I am pursuing.' The wisest and best way is to be completely obedient before the Lord. It will be the fastest way.
The turtle waits for the rabbit to sleep, but a rabbit faithful to concentration and absolute time is an impregnable powerful rabbit. Infinite loyalty, absolute faith.

There is a way to always make the devil a losing deal. Every time you challenge, if you cling more to the Lord, you make him 'lose his investment.' There will be tribulation and suffering, but you will become bolder day by day. Haha~~~

Just as the eagle disturbs its nest and hovers over its young, spreading its wings and catching them, and bearing them on its wings... Deuteronomy 32:11. If the nest becomes stable, one will continue to stay there, and then the eagle's chick becomes a chicken. Do not become a chicken-brained person but become a magnificent eagle.
Mary chose what is better. And it was not taken from her. The gifts and opportunities given by the Lord must never be taken away. A person who does not miss out is a person who wins.
I pray that I may be used more powerfully in the work entrusted to me now. That is wisdom.
If I shipwreck in faith, then any other success is merely a glorious failure. I trust in the faithful and almighty God. He will uphold me.
The reason I pray is that I believe God is faithful and the Holy Spirit is working regardless of my feelings.

How to break a rock with an egg – why not me? 1. Motivation is Ministry. 2. Wise ministry consists of passion, vision, momentum, flexibility, and resilience. – Do not stop. 3. Fight a winning war. – General Yi Sun-shin (Brightness, Battle of Hansan Island - asymmetric military strategy, tortoise and rabbit) 4. Even a nuclear bomb starts with a small button. The spark – Jasmine Revolution. 5. System is clothing. – Give it a bath. Then the clothes will change. 6. Love is a study. The art of love; ignorant love is rude love and becomes a wound rather than love – ex) Erich Fromm. 7. The world is fast, but the church is real time. 8. He stirred up the people – have you been motivated? 9. We love the church. – What is the alternative to criticism? 10. Believe in the Lord's power and omnipotence. 11. The power of Saturday gatherings – it comes from prayer. 12. Pray without ceasing. – The Almighty intervenes in war. 13. Whenever you boast, negative wounds are always given – the success of shepherd David, the failure of King David. Now concluding...

Whether I am real or fake is evaluated in suffering. Some people become stronger through suffering, while others become negative and dry through suffering. A dry person has no one else around and only 'my reaction,' 'my wound' exists. In a mental hospital, everyone only talks about themselves. It is not that people around me have become cold. God has not withdrawn. But when I become dry, I feel that way. When it is difficult, cry out to God, 'It is difficult.' When it hurts, cry out, 'It hurts.' Then you will discover a God who comforts and helps you in your pain. That is what suffering does.

There are times when I want to please someone's heart. It is the heart that comes when wanting to love and be loved by someone. To love and be loved healthily, you must first become someone who is pleasing to God's heart. And he appointed David to be king and gave testimony, saying, 'I have found David son of Jesse, a man after my own heart; he will do everything I want him to do.' – Acts 13:22. God sees the heart. The heart is revealed not through position and reputation but through loyalty and confession.
The best way for me to love the young people I love is to love the Lord more.

You must be devoted. Because of Jesus. It is not a burden but a joy. If you love the cross, do not do what I want but stand where I am needed. That is taking up the cross and following the Lord. A path that even death cannot block – the way of the cross.

To give up gracefully, you must have obtained something. Without the premise of 'obtaining,' there is no 'giving up.' It is excellent and beautiful to have obtained much, to enjoy it, and yet give it up and distribute it to many people. People earn, gather, and achieve to stay and enjoy it, but we must earn, gather, and achieve to give more, let go, and leave.
When I fix all my gaze on the Lord and feel the living God, my life becomes the work of the Lord and God begins to work.
What is obtained through effort is good. But when effort reaches its limit and all good things collapse, when we realize it cannot be done by our own strength, we enjoy the best thing from heaven.

David does not accept the evaluation of Goliath. Unless I accept it, any evaluation is not mine. If I do not acknowledge it, no one can condemn me. Just as Eliab cannot define David, no one can define me. Goliath: I will make you food for beasts. David: That's funny, you become food, I'll ignore it. Conclusion: Goliath became food. King Saul was a person defined by women's evaluations. Therefore, his life is consumed by envy and jealousy. The pathetic state of a person whose relationships are unstable. Let us learn to work within good relationships. You will realize that solving problems is easier than you think.

There are always problems and wandering, but there is also the work of the Holy Spirit and growth. Do not panic at what is not working, but be grateful for what is being poured out. The KTX does not stop when rain and wind assault it. Ignore it and continue advancing. We absolutely do not stop before problems and challenges. We solve while running and preach the gospel while running.

To leaders and prospective leaders... Jesus asked Peter about 'love' and said 'feed my sheep.' We must confirm 'love' and connect it to 'feeding the sheep.' When grades fail or diets fail and you do a storm intake of six servings, and someone asks about the results, you do not want to answer and you dislike the person who asked. But if grades rise that you cannot achieve in a lifetime and angel-like weight comes out, 'staying silent' is almost impossible. People with hot experiences through worship will inevitably come forward to 'feed the sheep.' Love for Jesus, passion must be the starting point. We cannot help but speak what we have seen and heard. What have you heard and what have you seen? The heart must be hot with Jesus to save souls.

When I look to the same place as God, God supplies all my needs with His power. A person who does the Lord's work for the Lord's glory receives the Lord's support. Let this mind be in you which was also in Christ Jesus. – Philippians 2:5.

The purpose does not change. It will not stop. Even if I am short of breath, I will complete the distance I must run. If I run and exhaust and can no longer run, I will crawl to the Lord's altar and offer myself. And I will be happy. For I have seen the glory of the Lord.

Refusal is faith. Not everyone can refuse, but when you hold onto Jesus, other things fall to the level of excrement. It is strange not to discard. 'By faith Moses, when he had grown up, refused to be known as the son of Pharaoh's daughter. He chose to be mistreated along with the people of God rather than to enjoy the fleeting pleasures of sin. He regarded disgrace for the sake of Christ as of greater value than the treasures of Egypt, because he was looking ahead to his reward.' (Hebrews 11:24-26)
Pressure differences create wind. Become a spiritual high-pressure system, and then wind will blow that overturns the rotten world and revives dry bones.

If He desired obedience tomorrow, He would not have spoken today but would have done so tomorrow. We delay difficult words from God. Sometimes God's intervention completely stirs up my plans. It is not something to be discouraged about but something to rejoice and leap about. There is something to anticipate there.

If you are too busy to spend time with the people you love, you are doing more unnecessary work than what the Lord commanded. Be a little less greedy and keep love. Loving the precious people given to me – that is what God desired.

Leviticus 22:22. When you reap the harvest of your land, do not reap to the very edges of your field or gather the gleanings of your harvest. Leave them for the poor and for the alien residing with you: I am the Lord your God. Please help when you can. What is remarkable is that God protects the self-respect of the poor in this method of giving. Give without boasting and there is no need to know who picks it up.

'Buy the truth and do not sell it; get wisdom, discipline and understanding.' (Proverbs 23:23) Buying truth is a blessing. You must meet good leaders and belong to a good community, and it is achieved when you serve that community blessedly. But what is more important than buying truth is not selling truth. Disobeying truth for worldly gain and following desires by deceiving one's conscience is selling truth. Distorting the Word for the purpose of defending and justifying oneself is also betraying truth. God's truth includes concrete wisdom, instruction, and understanding for living a successful and meaningful life. To live life according to the Creator's intention, we must make meditation and study of truth our highest life priority above all else. Each new day promises success only to those equipped with truth to live out the concrete time of a new life.

Power and change, the collapse of darkness, revival on this earth are not accomplished through movement. It is paying the price and kneeling down right where I stand. There are no people who do not know but cannot do. Even knowing, people are deceived, and though aware, do not live according to truth. Therefore, what makes truth true is prayer, intimacy, and relationship. If you proclaim truth without the answer from the Lord, you trap people. Do not judge but give life. Give them something to eat / Mark 6:30-44.
The will of God, Nothing more, Nothing less, Nothing else.

The end of all things is near; therefore be clear minded and self-controlled so that you can pray. Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers a multitude of sins. – 1 Peter 4:7. The last round in a match is truly fierce. Everyone pours out all their remaining strength to gain even one more point. The Bible tells us we are running the last round. We are told to be the last runner in the last age and run with all our might. For a Christian to run with all their might is to make sure a war already won is truly won in the end. Being clear-minded and possessing wisdom and self-control, awakening and praying, and above all, destroying all schemes with love to save souls – this is the exhortation.

Many people give up midway. Those who endure to the end will see glory. Satan has no roots to begin with, so most attacks seem strong but are one-off. No matter how fresh flowers look, they wither in a vase in four or five days. We, rooted, may be rough, but we will endure and win.
I hate tears and bloodshed even more, but if the Lord requires it, I will gladly offer it. If death can save others, then death is a blessing.

When a relationship begins, whether we want it or not, we reach the 100th day of meeting. This is called chronos. However, when the relationship deepens and we confess our love one day, it has nothing to do with such mechanical time. The day of that confession is called kairos. God will establish me not by my age (chronos) but on the day prepared and fitting for me (kairos) with His love and power. Chronos comes naturally, but kairos must be prepared for.

If everything is prepared yet the Lord delays, it is the surest confirmation that I am not yet ready. I have not humbled myself further, I have not become more humble enough..., because my greed has not been removed. I must bow down more. I must live with the heart that I will not regret even if I spend my life bowing down. Only then does the Lord work.

There are cases where we stay up for several nights preparing yet are not used. This is natural. It is because we seek to save lives and souls, not to satisfy people. Faith is being able to abandon what is precious.
It is not that we cannot do it because we don't know. We know but do not want to do it. That is pride. If we practice even what we know and live by it, the ordinary will become a miracle.

To Moses, it was a dry staff, but when he obeyed before God's power, it became powerful. God's grace is not a new gift but setting fire to the gifts I already have. I am that style, that vessel, but when I am held in God's hands, I become most powerful.

I have nothing to offer but apologies and gratitude. 'In the same way, when you have done everything you were told to do, should say, "We are unworthy servants; we have only done our duty."' - Luke 17:10

David had no choice in changing his circumstances. However, what David thought about when choosing his attitude toward life was the sovereignty of the Lord. Those who acknowledge the Lord's sovereignty become the most powerful people. Psalm 75:6-7, 'Exaltation does not come from the east or the west or from the desert. But it is God who judges: He brings one down, he exalts another.'

I need to confirm my calling. If I think about why I was called, I can truly be free and happy, find meaning, and not concern myself with empty things. It is realizing that I am fulfilling my mission and what I have to say is simply that an unworthy servant has done his duty.
Do what you can do, and the Lord will do what is fitting.
When my ability is exhausted and I have no strength, when I do not know what to do, at least what I can do is love and forgive. No one can take this from me in the Lord.

In a game, there is always a player who wins the game, and in a fight, there is a game maker who changes the tide. David, after God's own heart, is such a person. Someone whom God can trust to accomplish even His will, someone with whom we always have confidence that he will do His will, we must become such a person.

2 Timothy 2:4 A soldier of Christ does not get entangled in civilian affairs—his aim is to please his commanding officer. A person of the cross does not dwell on his own problems. He focuses all his attention on pleasing the One who called him. My pride, my reputation, my honor, my feelings are not the main thing. My desire becomes to accomplish the Lord's will.

[Philippians 1:20] I eagerly expect and hope that I will in no way be ashamed, but will have sufficient courage so that now as always Christ will be exalted in my body, whether by life or by death. [Philippians 1:21] For to me, to live is Christ and to die is gain. Paul's concern was not on himself but entirely focused on the Lord. He even confessed that beyond the matter of life and death, beyond the urgency and limitations of his present reality, his entire attention and passion were on how Jesus Christ would be testified, glorified, and honored in his weakening body. Who can stop such a person? Can the devil or death stop him? In his confession, there is 'no concern for fleshly desires. I do not even dream of being exalted in the world or recognized in the church as having faith. I run entirely looking at the cross.' When an apostle who has crucified his own self offers his life like a flame of fire to the Lord before the altar to be burnt as an offering, the glory of Christ becomes so admirable that even angels would marvel. - From the London to nation by Jacob Kim 11pages
Many fail because they begin and pray. We must pray before preparing. Then God will show us. God is not one who supplements us; He is one who enables us to make the right beginning.

A person soaked in a downpour does not fear the rain. The fearful one is the one less wet. One who is ready to die will live. Do not struggle with uncertainty, and if you die cleanly, you will see glory. One Death Resolve (一死覺悟)
By what I pursue, you can know whom I serve. Should I please people or please God? If you seek the pleasure of people, you are surely not a servant of God.

But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well - Matthew 6:33. A person consumes their resources and energy according to whose evaluation they care about. If you respond to God, you will try to align yourself with God.

I am not in this place because of a failed U.S. visa, because my family could not push me forward, because I lack ability or missed the timing. Joseph was a slave and a prisoner, yet he was there by the Lord's will. When you understand the Lord's will (Ephesians 5:17), you truly begin to see opportunity.
Prayer will surely receive an answer. If you endure patiently long, you will surely see fruit.

Exhaustion and scarcity cannot prevent faith. If what you desire is the Lord, you desire 'that whether I live or die, only the Lord is honored in me.' Those who seek the Lord's will cannot be stopped by the world.

Faith is believing two things: the assurance of His presence that 'He must surely exist' and the assurance of trust and answer that 'He rewards those who earnestly seek Him.' God chooses the detailed options, and we enjoy the joy.

To those whose everything has crumbled and lost all hope, as a minister I would advise to give what remains to the Lord even if you die. Then with that, whether it is making soup out of death or cooking rice, the Lord will handle it. This is what a minister can say. Let me cast a vote for advice that deserves to be stoned. Elijah asked the widow for her last meal to eat and die.

If you meet a bear, you will flee in panic, saying 'feet, save me!' But to a hunter, a bear is his children's tuition, his rent, money for his family to go out to eat, and income that lets him change his old car. Become a hardship hunter.

Become a hardship hunter. When you meet hardship, do not be afraid and retreat, but shout, 'Hardship, I have met you well!' Try bumping into it; it is not that big a deal. It is not that hardship is difficult because it is hardship, but because our hearts collapse before hardship, it is difficult. In Psalm 119:71, 'It was good for me to be afflicted so that I might learn your decrees.' The person who discovers the hidden meaning within hardship is the person the devil fears most. Before Almighty God the Father, no accident happens to us. It means there is surely something I must learn in it.

To me who tries to accomplish everything easily and move on, the Lord gives me time for maturity and ripening, asking me to become a person of 'authenticity.' That time is sometimes difficult, but after being 'refined,' you become like pure gold.

My circumstances are not my choice. However, my attitude is something I can decide. It is not my circumstances but my attitude that determines my life. A change in constitution takes time and the change may not be felt, but in time it will surely bear fruit.
Do not try too hard to do everything well. That is all greed. Just try to accomplish the Lord's will. Everything is in that.

I hoped for steadfastness but was shaken, I hoped not to be shaken but everything collapsed. In that heartbreaking place, what still allows me to rejoice is that God does not make mistakes. Even in that place you utterly cannot understand, God makes no mistake 'ever.' God is absolutely faithful.
Luke 18:1 'Always pray and do not give up...' To not lose heart, you must pray always according to a set time and habit. Have you lost heart? Begin set prayer times.
When God's holiness overflows within me, it appears outwardly as service. Daniel, the most holy, was also an excellent civil servant.
From the first day of work, Daniel resolved in his heart and disciplined himself according to that resolution. One whose heart is set on the Lord does not waver and advances with trust.
Whatever you do, do it excellently. Not with hypocrisy, but as unto the Lord, show kindness to people, and act with integrity.
You do not become exalted by asserting your rights and oppressing others; rather, you become lowered. God is present with us with the highest authority when we serve and give.

It is important to live steadily. Even without great change and response, the life of a young person who does not lose heart suddenly changes. When that change and opportunity come, grasping it is skill. That is why gatherings and meetings are important for young people.

A mysterious comet approaching from a distant star at terrible speed to collide, or news that covered the entire broadcast when we woke up does not give us a crisis. The real crisis is when 'Jesus alone is not enough.' When Jesus is not enough, we use our own strength, we use strength we should not use. Then we lose friends, lose members, and lose family.
Moses bowed to the ground at slander against himself, but before idolatry, he threw down the tablets and broke them in anger. Become dead to yourself and alive toward God.
Do not lose your simplicity. Hold it until the Lord comes.

David did not resist the open misunderstanding about himself. But he never turned away from any challenge to God's name and risked his life for it. The Lord's servant risks his life for the Lord. Not for himself...

David was greatly distressed, but he found strength in the LORD his God. David inquired of the LORD, 'Shall I pursue this raiding party? Will I overtake them?' The LORD answered him, 'Pursue them, for you will certainly overtake them and succeed in the rescue.' When you are with the Lord, you become bold. When I am with the people I love, I have no fear. We will find everything that was taken and will find more. We will surely repay more than the tears we shed. When Lazarus died, it was great sorrow, but when he rose again, greater glory of the Lord appeared. Before the Lord who resurrects, I ask all to rise. Now, it's our turn!
As I walk through the wilderness, I hope to laugh. So that only the Lord receives my deep tears and blood.....

Even if you are afraid and feel unable, even if you are troubled and distressed, when the Lord tells you to follow, you follow. Even if you are broken and tattered, when the Lord says to go, you go. Even if you cannot do it, you obey. If you cannot follow, it is not a matter of compromise but a matter of tearing your heart.

Pharaoh's suggestions to Moses were to do it moderately, not to go too far, and for only the men to go. If you give one thing, he will demand another. Many great spiritual leaders who overcame persecution and suffering collapse because of the weapon called 'compromise,' leaving only a magnificent tomb behind. I hope you will break through and never be satisfied. The cross cursed by the Jews—if the Lord tells you to go there, you go.
Even a person falling without wings can soar again at that falling speed when trusting in the Lord. - The first law of Spiritual Thermodynamic
Please speak boldly. The gospel of the Lord works through people who are not bound and do not feel ashamed. Acts 4:13

A woman in LA had her handbag snatched by a robber, and though bleeding, she would not let go. It was not because of a credit card or designer bag. It was for the few photos of her daughter on the phone inside the bag. She was protecting the photos of her daughter who passed away from cancer ten weeks prior. Everyone has a core value. For some it is 'things that perish,' and for others it is 'things of heaven.' In Colossians 1:28, 29, Paul says he labors and toils. Preaching Him and building up people—that was his core value. What he would gladly give his life for was 'Jesus' and 'souls.' Love what you should love. There is no shame in it.
I do not hold onto the Lord; the Lord holds onto me, so I do not worry excessively. The only reason I have been able to jump up consistently over all these years is 'Jesus.'

That you are a disciple means you are not perfect. Sometimes you take a few steps forward and then step back a few steps. However, in life, if you maintain not speed but the right direction, that is a blessed life.

Sown among thorns means those who hear the word but are choked by worldly anxieties and the enticement of wealth and cannot bear fruit—Matthew 13:22. Rushing and worrying strangle the word you have received and prevent you from bearing fruit. Please, do not worry or rush. The Lord is still working. Coming to the altar before Samuel arrives is the greatest mistake.

And he said, 'As the Lord lives...'—1 Samuel 26:10. If the Lord truly lives in my life, I can cast away anxiety and look only to the Lord. David faced many temptations to take human actions, but trusting in the 'living God,' he eventually won the victory. Hallelujah! Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.

I have the image of the precious blood of the Ebenezer gathering, Pastor Kim Jong-han's teaching of seeing only Jesus, and I follow the path of grace of Director Hong Nan-yi of the Kuguk Altar. And now, I see and learn from and become like the love of the Lord shown by our young people.

** Please gather at the place of prayer where God Himself calls. ** I sent word to him, saying, 'The things you are saying are not true; you have made them up in your mind,' for they were all trying to frighten us, thinking, 'Their hands will get too weak for the work, and it will not be completed.' But now strengthen my hands. Nehemiah 6:8, 9. In the desolate Jerusalem, turmoil is beginning to arise—between those building God's wall and those obstructing the building of the wall. Where there is the work of life, there is naturally the work of darkness. But to those who know the truth, nothing can be a threat. Though unseen, God is most real, and through prayer offered to Him, through people who pray with that faith, nothing can shake them. We desire that God would strengthen our hands. Prayer meeting at the Education Center 7:30 PM

More important than being misunderstood is not misunderstanding others. When that happens, in God's church, the devil may attempt, but ultimately cannot finish. I hope you become stubborn enough to ignore any attack. The devil will feel frustrated by such a person and 'will not live to his natural lifespan through a heart attack.' We are under the precious blood of the Lord.
Understand the reason behind the season. Jesus is the same yesterday, today, and forever. I trust in Him.
What sustains me is the calling of the Almighty Lord. When mission drives life, other things open through the Lord's power.
Leadership means a person who loves the Lord with all their life and loves souls with tears, and who desires nothing else.

When you pray with grace and joyfully and repeatedly ask, you receive answers. On the other hand, if you pray with a heavy heart and give up after trying a few times, you receive hardly any answers. Selfish prayer for your own benefit and desire cannot engage in repeated, joyful and anointed prayer. Abandon prayer of the soul and offer prayer of the spirit.
May God's amazing providence that makes a way in the wilderness work even more powerfully through my brother.
Use your faith. Put down the spear and sword.

What freed me from sin is the power of the precious blood. What gives victory in great distress is the power of the precious blood. I pray that tonight the power of all the precious blood covers our members.
The devil says, 'I will give you what you so desire.' Tell the devil, 'How can you give me Jesus?' If what I long for is the Lord, people and the world cannot rule over me.
Do not always make decisions based on what the flesh desires and be self-conscious. Rather, find peace in what the Lord desires. That is not bondage but freedom.

Go your way. That way is neither emotion nor a place to soothe your heart. It is turning your back on the world and living watchfully. When you let go of what you hold, true value comes alive. Only those who hold on will know that the joy and meaning are far happier.

'This is too hard. I cannot go any further!' Is there someone thinking this? Resist it. It is a thought from the devil. Make an effort to gather together and increase the intensity of prayer. Block the current flow now and call upon the name of the Lord.
You are likely to receive the greatest wounds and disappointment from the person you rely on most. This is because you should rely only on the Lord.

When your heart is troubled, it is the Lord's kind sign to return to basics. Having a peaceful heart while acting lawlessly is not the blessing a person of faith should choose; suffering while looking only to the Lord is the true blessing.

If you build relationships on emotion, it will not be long before you divorce, shipwreck, become distant, or even become enemies. However, if you build on a promise, even though emotions fade, the promise is eternal, so you can create new emotions and have relationships within trust and security. God's intention and God's will—that is the promise.

This is my desire, to know as I am known, to love as I am loved. This is my ardent wish, to give my very life An offering of love, a living sacrifice. This is my reward To hear You say, ........ "well done"
As important as putting on the full armor to resist the devil is praying always without ceasing. Prayer makes power become power.
What the Lord seeks in leaders is authenticity and perseverance. I hope you will serve with the heart you had at the beginning, even as time passes.
When you answer the high calling, low problems are naturally solved.
God determines the times and seasons. What people must do is be faithful. We must respond to the Lord, not react to problems or conflicts.
I am not called for such a thing. I am not called for this either. I am called by the Lord solely to fulfill His will.
There are no part-time Christians. There are only full-time Christians or non-Christians.
If you think much has been given up, it means there is still much more that needs to be given up.
When He says to entrust, it is not to burden us but to give us more faith.

There are times when at a crossroads you do not know which way to go. If our desire is only to reach a quick conclusion no matter which way, the Lord prepares a third path, the path of waiting and maturity.
If each moment were the last, there would be no regret when you close your eyes. If all you leave behind in the world is love, you will be bold before death.

Even if you have faith the size of a mustard seed, you will keenly feel that nothing is accomplished by my own strength. You cannot handle relationships directly and make them work as you wish. Entrust them. The level, frequency, and outcome are all in the Lord's hands. The Lord is faithful.

The Lord drives those who do not pray into situations where they must pray, and confines those who do not look to the Lord in a well where they can only see the Lord. The best position is to be moved and reverent of Him right where I stand now.
When you are troubled, look upon the Lord's face. Look to the Lord of peace. The Lord gives strength and protection to all who call upon His name.

Yes or No, we want results immediately. But the Lord also speaks precious words through the process that I must hear. If you skip the process, even if you receive the best result, you cannot enjoy it. What a caterpillar calls death, God calls a butterfly.

Weight training means exerting strength against gravity and weight pulling toward the center of the earth. Then muscles become strong. The heart's muscles are the same. When you boldly push through difficulty saying, 'This is hard for me!' you become stronger. But when you say, 'I am afraid of hardship,' your heart becomes weak. Make a resolve and be bold—you will become strong in body and strong in heart.

Fear is also a kind of faith—a gloomy but persistent faith that something bad will surely happen to me. Believing is not calculating circumstances but going to the Lord and committing all—whether it results in death or sustenance—into His hands.

Suffering itself is not tragic; what is tragic is collapsing before suffering. The Lord has surely said He gives suffering you can bear, so being in the assurance that you will be able to bear it is the truth.
Do not envy or covet the opportunities that come to others. Opportunities reserved for you will surely come someday. Opportunities are given to those who prepare, not to those who are jealous.
To know the members better and understand their hearts, one can have better policies and ideas. The Lord, who expects leadership excellence, focuses precisely on sincerity.
There are no shortcuts to maturity, while we worry about how fast we grow, God is concerned about how strong we grow. God is never in a hurry but he is always on time! Keep going guys
Maturity requires time. We are often concerned with how fast we grow, but the Lord is concerned with how strong we grow.

God was so pleased with David that He said He would accomplish all His plans through him. God was delighted when He saw David's three qualities: gentleness, loyalty, and his attitude toward authority.

Many people strive to be remembered and exalted, but believers fundamentally live to be forgotten. Holding only to promises, possessing only faith, and living by grace alone, believers are those hidden in Christ, forgotten in the world's lustful gaze. Colossians 3:2-3

The journey of faith has no round-trip ticket. There is only a one-way ticket running toward the Lord. If you leave room to return to sin, you will surely stumble again. You cannot fight and overcome sin unless you die to yourself.
When I give up the rights I should exercise, God gives me authority, and the enemy becomes powerless before what I have surrendered.
Never give up, but fight sin persistently. Through the power of the blood, failures and frustrations are transformed into testimonies and praises.
Trying too hard is greed. What God desires is faithfulness.
I pray that through you, your community may receive blessings.
I can overcome suffering when my trust in obeying the Lord's will is greater than the suffering I experience.

If I were to list my shortcomings and inadequacies, without even needing the devil's help, I could easily fill dozens of A4 pages in minutes. Being insufficient in the place where God has placed me is God's will, and when I endure for the Lord's glory, the Lord receives glory and joy from it. God did not seek achievement but obedience despite our shortcomings.
Do not be angry about yourself, but be righteous for the Lord's name. That is gentleness, and God seeks out such a person and entrusts His will to them. —From a leaders' meeting
When I humbly serve the Lord, there is much trouble, but O Savior, give me strength to bear it well. —Hymn 347
Even more so, I rely only on the Lord.
Many believers testify: What I thought was fate was actually refining.

When God gives suffering, it is to those He has determined to save. If God intended to destroy, He would not give suffering. Those who are to perish, He abandons. In the midst of suffering, be transformed with thanksgiving. When you hold to God's Word and make the resolve to die, you will live.

The difference between my desire to have my problems solved and God's fundamental desire to change my life determines the length of my refinement. Ultimately there is one destination, and the difference is how much you get beaten along the way. A soccer ball, no matter how it bounces, eventually goes into the goal.

When David lived a hunted life and came before the king of Gath of the Philistines, David drooled, rubbed his body against the wall, pretended to be mad, and barely escaped to hide in the cave of Adullam. I wonder if that was when David hit rock bottom. Even the great hero David, renowned in human history, when you examine just one chapter of his life, had such miserable times.
If you kneel in prayer, you cannot stumble.
If you succeed without prayer, that success will cause your downfall.
The reason I stand here is because of what Jesus did on the cross. The reason we can serve today, however inadequately, is not because I live in myself, but because Jesus lives in me.
Yes I will run the race, until I will see your face.

When we retreated, we needed 79 vehicles. While preparing the message, I asked for help from those I could contact, though limited, and the Lord gave me a heart to trust in Him. After settling everything and leaving Wycliffe for the last time, when I checked all the vehicles, there was not a single seat left over or short. God is of low cost and high efficiency.
Fight the spiritual battle with thanksgiving and blessing. To overcome anger and resentment, you must approach with a loving heart. Before every great grace, there is always war.
Total surrender.

The relationship between a leader and Barnabas is like putting an apple on your head and shooting arrows at it. It is a relationship where you must trust, whether it means death or life. Because the Lord called for it.

If I face an impossible situation I cannot handle, it is time for the Lord to work. It is because it is so difficult to have the Almighty Lord as the Lord of my life that I have come to the Lord through all these detours.
If I cannot entrust even one relationship, saying I have surrendered myself before the Lord is an exaggeration. When you obey, even if it seems you lose everything, you actually gain everything.
It was not Abraham, the father of faith, who was great, but the God he believed in who was great.
Even if all my heart is broken and breathing is difficult, if I can live for the Lord, that is a blessing to me.
Before the devil and the world, become like Job—God's honor.
Standing where you want to go is painful. Stand where He has sent you.
I give my life for the Lord; what more should I withhold?

The reason suffering toward you continues endlessly is because there is an unchanged self in me that must be transformed before that suffering, and it is because the Lord persistently demands this. Face the endless suffering with transformation.
You running in prayer are not alone right now. Hold to the Word and be bold; intercession continues.
I pray that the Lord who rescued me on the day of my distress and humbled me on the day of my refinement would personally bless all the young people.
When I humbly serve the Lord, there is much trouble, but I rely even more on the Lord I should depend on.
It is not only from good leaders that you learn good things. You receive sufficient good lessons from poor leaders as well.
Serving the Lord in a successful manner is arrogance. When I do not rely on the Lord, I have already become arrogant and will collapse.
Those who honor me, I will honor... 1 Samuel 2:30

Those who honor me, I will honor, and those who despise me, I will despise. Not responding with faith is despising God. There is no one who despises God and is happy or successful. Those with wrong priorities seem advantaged but are the most disadvantaged.
People say the economy is struggling. The most foolish thing among them is killing a healthy economy first to try to save it. Let us run so that grace is poured out upon the crumbs given to me.

Thirst is not simply quenched. You must dig. Just digging hard does not do it. When you dig where the Lord tells you to dig, living water comes forth. Sometimes it may be stone, sometimes land you've been driven back from by worldly people, but if Jesus is there, the living water continues. I pray that you become servants of faith who can dispose of everything to gain Jesus.
When your life is on the line, you think it is a crisis situation. No, not risking your life is the true crisis. Stake your life on the gospel that gave up its life.

Doing what you want to do and believing what you want to believe is not faith. Seeking God's face is true faith. People wish God would change somewhat, but God never changes and is never persuaded. Because He is truth.

There is no such thing as not being able to do the Lord's work because of lack of money. Saying we cannot do the work of the Almighty Lord due to insufficiency makes no sense. If we abandon human glory and look to the Lord's glory, there is no reason God would not provide.
Beginning this week, we start a relay fasting for the training conference. I pray that there will be God's great grace in anticipation and prayer for all.

Even if I play the wrong chord on guitar while praising, there is no great problem. But if the rhythm is wrong, it is torment for the player and torture for the listener. When the Lord pushes, we must run with Him. When the Lord pulls, we must cling firmly with Him. Those who cannot do this suffer with their limbs, and they are still as they were.

Lot was a righteous man, but was just insensitive to God's voice. Not all righteous men are the same, and not all faith is the same faith. If Lot had been more awake in Sodom and Gomorrah and heard the Lord's voice, there would have been greater salvation than the destruction that was delayed in his escape.
If you depend on someone by hanging on them, you establish a relationship. If you entrust your needs to God, you establish a relationship with God.

A leader must gain authority. Authority is added to those who pray more and obey the Word. The Lord commanded the inexperienced Joshua to meditate on Scripture and obey. He gives power to those who obey even without charisma.

[Acts 9:11] The Lord said, 'Go to the street called Straight and inquire at the house of Judas for a man from Tarsus named Saul, for behold, he is praying. 9:12 And he has seen in a vision a man named Ananias coming in and laying his hands on him so that he might regain his sight.' When the apostle Paul was converted and praying, the one who delivered God's answer was none other than Ananias, a faithful disciple on Straight Street. When laying on of hands, God's prepared and ready will, the answer to prayer, was accomplished as a miracle. When we seek together with one heart, the kingdom of heaven unfolds in this barren land. When we stretch out our hands to bless, the will of heaven is accomplished.

We must stay awake to pray and pray to stay awake. Whether we are able or unable, joyful or sorrowful, we must pray. With many words or few words, or even without words, we must pray. You will surely receive the answer that gives peace.
I pray not to earn money, nor for honor, but because of His glory shown in our youth, and for a life worthy of His calling. I believe there is no reason God would not work.

Paul, seeing the armor of Roman soldiers, strongly urges in Ephesians 6 to put on the full armor of God. The purpose is to destroy the schemes of the devil and to stand firm on the last day. With the shield of faith that trusts the Lord, he exhorts us to block the flaming arrows of doubt against God's good purpose. The most effective shield against spiritual attack is trust and faith.
I do not think of myself as proclaiming the gospel. Yet if I do not open my mouth, the stones will cry out. Amen, come Lord Jesus.

Many kings did not last long and fell. They did not collapse because they were weak, but because they became too strong. When one tries to defend and protect oneself, the fall is great. A person broken before the Lord seeks nothing but the Lord. David did not try to protect himself, so the Lord protected him instead.

It is not a great matter that believers are misunderstood. What is more important is that I do not misunderstand. If I grasp and keep this firmly, I will not belong to darkness and will not give an excuse. Tragedy happens when both the other person and I misunderstand at the same time. Those who believe in the Lord have no need to misunderstand.

Leaders' Meeting Part 2 Deuteronomy QT (Thursday) 1. These are regulations concerning war. 2. What a leader must do is bless and declare. 3. This is the only ancient law in which exemptions from military conscription are recorded—the Code of Hammurabi. In ancient Near Eastern law, conscription is mandatory with no exceptions. 4. The fact that God's law contains exemptions from military conscription is because war does not belong to people but to God. —Do not calculate too much. 5. A person with a negative heart should not be appointed, no matter how excellent their abilities and talents.

Leaders' Meeting The Twelve Disciples Jesus Appointed Mark 3:13 Purpose: 1. To be with Him—Stay with the Lord and obey. 2. To preach—The Lord's Great Commission is to recover lost lives. 3. To have authority to cast out demons—God gives power to those who carry out the mission. Execute operations at the spiritual level. James QT (Wednesday) 1. James delivers practical messages. 2. Prayer, praise, and remedies for the sick and sinners are mentioned. 3. Through Elijah's prayer, he urges prayer. 4. Be cautious of heresy and be victorious through truth. Do not be deceived.

David was strong because he desired nothing. Those who aim at worldly goals easily fall into traps. I hope you desire nothing but the Lord. In contrast, Saul fears and oppresses people to protect his kingship. Those who try to preserve and those who try to give up live at different levels.

There are two ways to close: The easy way is to barely finish by running away, and the way God desires is to receive power and depart in the Lord's timing. Let us abandon the prejudice that the easy path is always the way to live. When the Lord's sovereignty is declared and the Lord's time is fulfilled to accomplish my portion of transformation, the Lord exalts me to a high place. May we become young people held in the Lord's hands, parting the Red Sea of dark sin.
Even if many works are done and many powers appear, if love is not the motivation, it is of no benefit. —1 Corinthians 13—
When the Lord gives the signal to pray, we must pray earnestly. I hope that you will pray without lacking prayers that overcome temptation and bring victory.

If you had calculated, you should not have come this way. You came this way because you walked by faith without using your mind. People thought they lived only by bread and money, but you must realize that they live by the Lord's Word. Furthermore, you must send yourself upon that Word.

In 2 Timothy, I see the passion of the apostle Paul, like a libation poured on the altar, the fragrance of an offering burning anew as a fading life is rekindled. I hope we offer our youth and last breath to exalt and love only the Lord. The Lord is worthy to receive it.

Eric, who was called the guitar god, after the birth of his son, made a vow before God to stop drugs and debauchery, but repeatedly collapsed. In 1991, his 4-year-old son fell from a 55-story apartment and died, and he donated 7 million pounds to an island to build a drug rehabilitation center. And he composed this song: 'If you look at me in heaven, will you know my name? Will you hold my hand? I must be strong, and carry on, Cause I know I don't belong here in heaven.' Because he did not fall into self-pity, he could continue his life. Self-pity is idolatry and sin. Psalm 62:8 We must come before the Lord continually and pour out everything. Then you become a healer with wounds.
Since I've been in Jesus, even though there have been lots of toils and snares, I always believe God is good, God is love, God is faithful. I never doubt those, never...
Do not fear even if that path is lonely and narrow. When you follow the Lord, there is God's glory on that narrow path.

Saying you will pray is not mere courtesy but something you must hold in your knees and heart. Please request prayer from the minister. It is neither rude nor disrespectful. Those who become intimate with authority accomplish God's will.
Tears are love, and bringing joy is love, but true love is becoming one grain of wheat and denying yourself daily and bearing the cross.
Faith is to think of and look to the Lord even in busyness and hustle that cannot be expressed in words.

When you meditate on the source of suffering, there is greed. We are called to this field not because we are the best in this area. If we do what the Lord has guided and are faithful to what He has allowed, that is enough. We must not be greedy to do too well. Remember the Lord's tears for that position. The Lord did not call because of ability, but He empowers those He has called.

Personally, it is much better to lead a three-hour prayer meeting eating instant ramen quickly than to be invited to an elegant three-hour dinner nearby. To pray, you must design your life. From design and structure, the content and power of your life emerge. May we become young people who stake their lives on the fire from heaven.
When I lift my dreams onto the Lord's altar, He returns them with resurrection power as a pure and unselfish vision.
Please prepare participants and fasting prayer lists for the 19th retreat. I pray that on that day we will hear the Lord's voice and see stationary ships smoothly glide forward.

A magnificent ship is anchored in a beautiful harbor full of coral reefs. Although technically perfectly prepared, the ship remains in the harbor, being used merely as a restaurant on water, nothing more. Why? Because it cannot see ahead. If you cannot hear the Lord's voice, your life will not move forward. Even after ten years, it will be the same. Return to where you last heard and listen again to the Lord's still small voice. You will become a luxury Christian.
In an adventure where it seems everything is progressing well right now, the mistake made in the latter half is pride.

Lift your eyes and see the world. What the world values is the fulfillment of greed. Following greed entangles you in darkness. To say you cannot see while dwelling in darkness is foolishness. To those who look only to the Lord, accept death on the cross, and go, there is a dignity the world cannot bear. Therefore, there are two kinds of Christians: those who live seeking to fulfill greed and those who live letting themselves go.

There is no revolutionary way to learn to walk. There is no need for other aids or wheelchairs. You just need to fall many times in a mother's warm support. Then you walk and run. Moreover, you help other younger siblings.

It seems we must do many things and only by doing everything well can we stand where everyone hopes. This is compulsion. This is being deceived. Life does not work by effort alone. Why? Because my life is not mine but the Lord's. When you entrust to the Lord and accept, He shows you secret things you do not know. Martha, Martha, you are worried and bothered about so many things, but only one thing is necessary. Mary has chosen the better part, which will not be taken away from her. When you are busy, mistakes happen.
I pray. Even with just the strength to crawl out, I crawl out and pray. Even if Mount Tai collapses and the earth caves in, prayer continues.

In his greatest life crisis, when David was pursued by his own son Absalom, he divided his military into three divisions and entrusted them. Even the last division he entrusted to Ittai the Gittite. Ittai was a Philistine, an enemy of Israel. The ability to inspire intimacy even with enemies was sought in that difficult situation.

There are two ways to understand. Understanding by hearing the Word is the best way. If you refuse to obey after hearing the Word, He sends you to the wilderness. Then you cry and understand through your body. The former is recommended.

When eating manna in the wilderness, faith must be good. Without faith, it means going hungry. But when entering Canaan, even without faith, people lived storing up grain. When you do not need to live by faith, prayer, the Word, and worship easily disappear.

Three million livestock were buried alive due to foot-and-mouth disease. It is said to have started from an overseas visit of a farmer. When sinful Israel tries to live with God, one of two things happens. Either obey and receive God's power or disobey and receive discipline. We are important people, so individual obedience is required.

If it is too precious, it cannot be used. British Wedgwood, teacups from China's Tang Dynasty, Japan's expensive tea utensils remain on display shelves, too precious to use. Most of these are dropped and broken by clumsy juniors during moving. Then cursing the junior is useless. Serve with what is precious. It is recorded in heaven.
A song I wanted to sing, for everyone. I returned with a life held in my heart and entrusted everything to the Lord.
Faith is being able to do the most ignorant things in the most noble way.
The saying that even thorns become roses when held to your heart means that while the holding is mine, the transformation is done by God.

If a businessman advertising to sell products and preparing events has no actual products but only distributes brochures or product information, it is fraud. Give what you promised. When doing the Lord's work without being filled with the Holy Spirit, you become the greatest fraud.
The purpose of advertising is marketing. If you claim to spread truth but do not experience or practice it, you will experience the most effective reverse effect.
Prayer cannot be done at any time. You must distinguish the time and distinguish the heart. Therefore, you must pray for prayer.

Daniel was a civil servant. Not a 9th or 7th grade official but Prime Minister of the world's greatest superpower. Yet he prayed toward the temple three times a day, and everyone knew he was praying. Are you busy? Then there is one more reason to pray even more.
I frequently mentioned 'carrying out the mission' as a prayer topic. I hope to truly carry out the mission.
If one candle is granted in my life, I will burn it with prayer. Then I can give the needed light to those who need it most.
The distinction between those who pray and those who do not pray is fair rather than discrimination. On the contrary, it could be said fraud if a person who prayed for two hours becomes ordinary.
Still keep going, pray, pray and pray.
The praying soul shall be blessed in all things; since the Lord does not forsake, even if there is temptation or threat to life, I will pray to the end.
During our 5000 years of national history, when we lacked strength, we lost our nation. To not lose ourselves and our friends, there must be revival.

Love ramyeon. What devoted servants must be most careful about is having no desires. Seek only the glory of the Lord, know how to step back, and let only the fragrance of Jesus remain where you have disappeared. Fourteen years ago, on the day I left Korea, I said this: With just one bowl of ramyeon and a Bible in hand each day, you can do anything. Simply learn to love ramyeon—it is far simpler and more comfortable than uncomfortable treatment or noisy parties. And concentrate everything and give all glory only to the Lord. Then you will see the glory of the Lord.
Give what you must give, and He will give what He must give.

Next week is dawn worship, Wednesday service, evening prayer meeting... it's amazing. All the ministry workers are leaving for the retreat, and I'm left alone. When I check my gifts, one that shows up is 'substitute.'
You must eat to live. You must pray to live.
When your purpose is clear, your methods become sharp. The dawn knees continue. Breakfast after dawn worship.
Glory: It is not that the victor is the survivor, but the survivor is the victor. A good faith, a spotlighted faith, is not about being flattered by people's reputations or becoming the protagonist of various testimonies. It is looking only to the Lord and going to the very end. There are many who are praised and many who are recognized, but those who run to the very end are truly rare.

The reason for not turning back: If there is no certainty of guidance, do not start; and if you have obeyed, you must risk your life to the end. If it is something to risk your life for, it must be something more precious than self-satisfaction or self-proof, and that is seeing the glory of God, letting go of everything else as you go.

When you feel infinitely small, when only sighs come out saying, 'What can someone like me do?' you must look at and confirm that you are in the glorious Lord and the Lord is in you. If Satan reminds you of your past, I hope you remind Satan of his future.

In the place where you stand now, Moving Worship Christian Organisation: It is not important where or in what form you stand, but "Whom are you worshipping?" I believe that if we lift up the name of the Lord anywhere, we will see the glory of heaven. The reason the saints of the early church shouted at death even as they were covered in sheepskins, became food for wild beasts, were burned at the stake, and died on the cross, was because they saw the glory of heaven. See the glory of God. That is the only answer. 'He is the radiance of the glory of God and the exact imprint of his nature, and he upholds the universe by the word of his power. After making purification for sins, he sat down at the right hand of the Majesty on high.' - Heb 1:3

Saturday Moving Worship First Meeting: We are having the first worship of Moving Worship. Location: The City Temple Conference Centre Holborn Viaduct London EC1A 2DE. Time & Date: 4:00 PM 14th Feb 2015. The holiness and reign of the Lord become our infinite joy and hope. 'Holy, holy, holy, is the Lord God Almighty, who was and is and is to come!' - Rev 4:8
