The Final Evaluation: God's evaluation is very different from people's conclusions and praise. That is why we will be surprised when we go to heaven. There will be those who seemed glorious but are deeply ashamed, and those who seemed shameful but are deeply honored.
The Eternal Gospel: We must continue to hear the eternal, glorious, and cross-centered gospel for everyone so that we can live gloriously without changing.
Give Glory: Do not be distressed over what hasn't been given to you, but let us give glory by offering what He has already given us.
What Matters: Character is more important than ability. Truth is more important than miracles. It is okay to live a bit lacking. If you stand before the Lord, you are already a victor.

Unbeatable: Try to share rather than stack, try to scatter if you have gathered, try to give rather than collect; simply worship the Lord anywhere, and even if I am broken and scattered, as long as the Lord is fully revealed, it is enough.

Simple: When you hold onto the cross and pray, the gospel becomes glorified. The reason the inherently glorious gospel is not glorified is that we retreat from the front lines of prayer, and that is because we give up on holding onto the cross.
Man of God: A man of God is one who pumps the joy and life that will be in heaven into this dry land.

Do not be intimidated. In the end, the sinful world is headed toward one place, and there is only one way for the soul to live. Therefore, glorifying the gospel with your life is an authority superior to all things.
I am the way. Do not be envious of what is not your path, but give glory through the path given to you. The path given by the Lord is glorious and the best path. Hallelujah.

Peace: Not being at peace means not being at rest, and consequently, it means indulging in sin. God has granted the only true peace today. 'Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace among those with whom he is pleased!' - Luke 2:14
Triumph this way: Strive to be a victor in the field you belong to. This is not for cheap comfort to survive a day or two, but to share eternal opportunity.

A pro recognizes a pro: A person of faith recognizes faith, and a person of glory recognizes glory. If a worldly person recognizes me, it is proof that I am failing. Rather, it is when you receive the hatred, check, and jealousy of worldly people that you are finally walking the right path. Therefore, brighten your face.
A life without regret: Even if I suffer loss or lose more, I would make the same choice if I went back to that moment. There is nothing more glorious than the gospel of the cross.

The duty of the 'Gap' (superior): The privilege of the one who has is not tyranny. It is the power to serve that God has temporarily lent. Just as the potential energy of water changes to generate electricity, God's glory is revealed as much as the height of my lowering.

GMO (Genetically Modified Organism) free: We experience glory when we see change. When we see glory, we can go even unto death. That change is not manipulation or coercion, but a bursting out from the 'in' to the 'out.' 'Keep your heart with all vigilance, for from it flow the springs of life.' - Prov 4:23

An arrogant crown becomes a disgrace: To a person who does not reflect on themselves, a crown returns as a disgrace. Just as anything becomes foolish and even dangerous if its essence and purpose are unknown, there is no example of obtaining glory without knowing one's own essence. You might reverse and drop others at will, but eventually, you are reversing your own life and dropping yourself.

Youth Sunday 2nd Service 2014 11 23 - We are the Lord's Moving Church: Just as a singer breathes through songs and a climber breaks through to the peak, a man of God is one who reveals the inimitable glory of God anywhere with the shameless gospel he holds. https://vimeo.com/113124637

You are the Lord's moving church: I hope you are always awake and prepared with the gospel for the sake of the moment. I hope you can bear your cross that ought to be offered and bloom and fade without hesitation. God's glory will be seen in every time and space where such a person is present, and they will become a moving church.

The reason the world is disappointed in the church: It is not because the church has forsaken their joy. It is because the church has forsaken God's joy, and the world is disappointed because there is no difference from themselves. When we fail to be God's servants and become servants of the world, people's disappointment turns into anger. 'For am I now seeking the approval of man, or of God? Or am I trying to please man? If I were still trying to please man, I would not be a servant of Christ.' - Gal 1:10

True Courage: It is the courage to look only to the Lord and be forgotten. It is letting the Lord alone receive all glory, honor, and power. 'For am I now seeking the approval of man, or of God? Or am I trying to please man? If I were still trying to please man, I would not be a servant of Christ.' - Gal 1:10
Maturity does not happen on its own: Maturity and revival always accompany the shedding of blood. Where there is the glory of God, there is a leader who sheds blood.

Jesus' Choice: 'Now before the Feast of the Passover, when Jesus knew that his hour had come to depart out of this world to the Father, having loved his own who were in the world, he loved them to the end.' - John 13:1

How to give glory: If you try to give God glory as a result, you are forced to hold onto humanism that uses any means and methods. God's glory is given through attitude, not results, and the results are governed by God. 'Well done, good and faithful servant. You have been faithful over a little...'

God uses the 'overwrite' button rather than 'delete': God's work is not about removing or exempting us from suffering. The suffering simply remains, but by showing great glory, He allows the glory to overwhelm the suffering. Rom 8:18 'For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us.'
The most precious person: These are the co-workers who remind me of God's glory and let me know that those silent works were not in vain.
A life without regret: I live the best moment for eternity.
True Glory: The only reason an earthenware vessel can be glorious is not that the material is excellent or it has an attractive shape, but because it contains a treasure within.
Omen of a downpour: What He allows prior to revival is a poor heart.

<Three Graces Relay - Second Day> 1. Since to live is Christ in me, I am thankful for everything that happens to me. 2. Thank you for letting me see God's glory through precious co-workers. 3. Thank you for giving me a presence and meeting that makes me happy even if today were my last. On this second day of the grace relay started by dear Esther Minji Chung's choice, the people I nominate are dear Susan Yusun Kim and Koeun Sun. Please share three topics of gratitude daily for 3 days and tag two people (you don't HAVE to do it ^_^).

Things seen only when lowering oneself: If you lower yourself, you will discover meaning in many things that were meaningless. This is because there are touches and footprints of God's love that are only visible when lowered. That is why becoming low makes one much more glorious than being lifted up.
Darkness tries to hide: That He has received the glory. This is the fact that darkness wants to deny so much.
Fearsome attack but glorious reversal: It is because the God we serve is alone worthy to receive honor and glory. Bring it on.

To the retreat praise team: Show them who the God who called us is, what kind of work He has done for us, how we want to respond before that love, how beautiful it is to experience the Lord's waterfall-like presence as one, and where the level of beauty of the One who makes us beautiful reaches. Whatever the result, let the Lord alone shine; that is victory.

Praise Leader: A person who leads praise must first be a person who praises. Start praising alone in your closet with just a guitar. You should fear being called a person who only has musicality. The greatest glory is being a minister who dwells in the Lord's presence and glory.
Obey, and you will hear the Lord's voice. If you obey the Word, you will see God's glory without having to look at people's reactions.
Day and night: The Lord's work does not distinguish between night and day. The Lord's zeal will make you beautiful.

Reason for anxiety: It is because the expectations and hopes you desire are perishable and shameful. You already know that these anxious desires always have a set course. That is a shameful conclusion. 'As it is my eager expectation and hope that I will not be at all ashamed, but that with full courage now as always Christ will be honored in my body, whether by life or by death.' - Phil 1:20

For revival to come: Revival is when a person who has tasted revival possesses holy dissatisfaction toward a state without revival and continually kneels. It is going forward as much as one desires glory.
How to recover lost glory: It is to recover lost prayer.
Try being with people of beautiful souls: Desires for sin and greed disappear. How much more so when we see the glorious Lord?
The path to glory: If you repeat continuous obedience, you will find yourself at the place of finishing the race and keeping the faith.

One wish: To eternally long for the beauty of the Lord in His temple and complete union with Him. "Seek my face" (Ps 27). Jesus is the radiance of the glory of God and the exact imprint of his nature (Heb 1:3). The ministry of all the apostles was only to seek His face (2 Cor 3:18, 4:1), and Jesus told the crowds who wanted to see the Father to look at Him (John 14:8,9). I hope you look only to the Lord 24 hours a day. That is everything.
To yield to vain things...: The gospel is too glorious, Jesus is exceedingly beautiful, and God's glory is infinite. I will choose this side.
Lowering makes one glorious: If I lower and lower myself, the Lord is revealed. Before the Lord, worldly pride is like a smelly rag.

How to live amidst shaking standards: True evaluation is not how I am seen or perceived, but what kind of person I am. History is made not by scores or rankings created by human understanding, but by passion and love that are impossible to measure by these things. That is why some people decorate history while others make history.
Rather than being successful, be holy. That is true victory.

The main point starts only after overcoming frustration: The faithful servants of God in the Bible also felt severe frustration when their desire to have their faith and deep spiritual fellowship understood by others was rejected. However, only by overcoming that can one participate in the Lord's main point and enjoy the Lord being glorified rather than being recognized themselves. “My father and my mother have forsaken me, but the Lord will take me in.” - Ps 27:10

What you desire determines the quality: If what you desire is only for this life, you are a truly pitiful person. Because it will all disappear. Long for eternal things. Only Jesus and what is given to Jesus are eternal. 'If in Christ we have hope in this life only, we are of all people most to be pitied.' - 1 Cor 15:19

He does not consume the bramble: The fire was on the bramble, but it did not burn it away. God does not use us as a source. It is because He simply wants to be with us and reveal His glory Himself. That is why when you take off your shoes of rights and doubts before the Lord, God's holiness and glory appear.
It's not that the burden is heavy, but that there is no hope: If devotion feels difficult and bothersome, it is not because the burden is heavy. It is because you have not seen the glory of God.
Holiness and the Holy Spirit: One must be holy to receive the Holy Spirit, but the grace of the Holy Spirit is also needed to be holy. Not by my strength, but only by the Lord's power.
He pays attention to me, who am insignificant: Among many crowds, even among VIPs, the Lord pays attention to me, who am insignificant. This is because God is interested in the anointed one.
Reason for pain: After passing through this darkness, this darkness will later become a message to me and others.
Before the Lord, these young people are glory.
Oneness is not just a good method: In faith, being one in love is not just an effective way to achieve a goal; it is victory and revival itself.
A lion does not eat rotten meat: Do not be satisfied with things that rot. Have shameless expectations and hopes—that Jesus would be honored in me. There will be joy that even death cannot stop.

A promise, not a probability: Abraham did not know where he was going, but he went forward believing the Word. When you discard probabilities that allow for calculation and prediction and go forward holding onto the promise, you see God's glory.

I see young people confessing that clinking glasses, flashy lights, and intense beats no longer satisfy them. Congratulations. You have experienced the glory of God. Now you will always be hungry and thirsty for anything else.
One case where a reversal drama becomes a tragedy: When one drops out of the drama halfway. The deeper the worry, the more glorious the reversal will be.

Christmas Spirit: He said the Son of Man came for two reasons. To serve and to give as a ransom. Then there will be peace and glory in heaven. That is why on Christmas Eve during WWII, German and Allied soldiers reportedly left their guns and sang carols together.

What is clear is the fact that there will always be a lack in every moment of our lives. When that deficiency and slow progress are interpreted as opportunities rather than handicaps, the glory of God appears. It's not that the path isn't open now, but that He has given a little more opportunity to serve the Lord and the saints before becoming incredibly busy. You must be a person who is more faithful and prepared when you have time now.

Unbelievers aim for survival. They are people who would beg for their lives before a fiery furnace just to live a little longer. On the other hand, those whose purpose is glory go forward with faith and the cross. They overcome the flames, and even when the nation changes and all rulers are purged, they continue to be used.

Mission: My job is not to receive the most votes in a popularity contest. That is the reason I wasn't called as a celebrity. Carry the contempt, the scorn, and the cross. Honor, glory, and all power must be received by the Lord alone.
Heaven is a delicious place.
Though I am foolish, I am not so foolish as to trade the Lord's glory for perishable glory. Even if you don't know everything, if you know the Lord, you know what is truly important.

Though I have nothing left, if the Lord looks upon His servant and gives me a pulse to burn out the end, I will run once more for the Lord's glory. If my strength fails while running, I will gather my last breath and call out to Jesus. Then I will be truly happy.

There is a song called 'Vision.' it depicts the heavenly worship in Revelation 7, seeing God and participating in His glory. Commonly, vision refers to one's own desires, job, or achievements. True vision is seeing the glory of the Lord. Then, you can follow like Isaiah when the Lord wants to send you. 'After this I looked, and behold, a great multitude that no one could number, from every nation, from all tribes and peoples and languages, standing before the throne and before the Lamb, clothed in white robes, with palm branches in their hands, and crying out with a loud voice, "Salvation belongs to our God who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb!"' - Rev 7:9-10
I will become light and go toward the darkness. If I fall while going, another light will go forward. Thus, we will finally proclaim the Lord's glory and witness all peoples worshipping the Lord.

I hope you are not intimidated by the flashy power, money, and beauty of the world. What Pharaoh held was a scepter made of gold and jewels, but it was smashed before the dry stick held by Moses. The power given by the Lord is not gorgeously packaged, but it is incomparably more glorious than Gandalf's staff. The material isn't important; who holds it is what matters.

People long for the world's dreams. That is a tragedy. A dream should not be about one's heart gradually hardening while being surrounded by a good environment, wealth, comfort, and guaranteed stability. Are Stephen's death and Paul's devotion tragedies? They, who gave their lives to make the name of Jesus Christ praised among people throughout their entire lives, did not live a tragedy but lived out glory.

The possessions and boasts of people are all like straw, which will all be burned and disappear. However, invisible faith, hope, and love are like jewels that do not change and will shine even in heaven.
Do not fear failing to please people, but strive to be the Lord's joy. Jesus endured the cross for the joy set before Him and sat at the right hand of God.
When a person pours their soul into a work, a masterpiece is born. When the Spirit of God is poured into a human body, it becomes a masterpiece of God's level. You are God's Masterpiece.

It is glorious to be called to a place where there is no love and where hatred and jealousy overflow, a place where there is no worship and only dryness and competition prevail. Because the land I step on will be covered by the blood of the Lord. I believe that.
If you fail in ministry, you can see whom you were actually pursuing. It becomes clear for whom you sought honor, glory, and all power.
'For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us.' - Rom 8:18
Types of fights: Christians fight the good fight. A good fight is a fight that saves lives, longs for the glory of soul conversion, and brings restoration. Any other fight is an evil fight.

My symptom, God's prescription: The Lord acknowledges that we can be temporarily grieved by the difficulties we currently face. However, He also wants us to know that it is not worth comparing with the glory of God we will see in the future. 'For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us.' - Rom 8:18

How to give glory: It's easy to think we give glory to the Lord by coming out at an awards ceremony holding a trophy and a bouquet saying 'Glory to God,' or by going around giving testimonies after achieving success that the world envies. However, true glory is given when faith does not weaken in a situation where everything has collapsed. 'He did not weaken in faith when he considered his own body, which was as good as dead (since he was about a hundred years old), or when he considered the barrenness of Sarah's womb. No unbelief made him waver concerning the promise of God, but he grew strong in his faith as he gave glory to God.' - Rom 4:19-20
Who lives in you? 'For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.' - Phil 1:21

Burning and scattering like a flame... every moment must be offered with all one's heart as if it were the last, as if every meeting were a parting. So that there is no regret before the Lord, for my being who I am is by God's grace and He alone is the eternal judge. 'For I am already being poured out as a drink offering, and the time of my departure has come. I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith. Henceforth there is laid up for me the crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, will award to me on that day, and not only to me but also to all who have loved his appearing.' - 2 Tim 4:6-8
The greatest miracle is the change of heart: There must be a longing for God's glory. There is no greater glory than a sinner being changed. I see God's handiwork through souls.

A moment seems like nothing. However, to a person of faith, every moment is precious. If you do your best moment by moment, the ordinary times of relying on the Lord will gather to form a glorious day like a giant wave.

Nothing is as fair as faith. Because there is a judgment, and furthermore, that judgment is fair. Faith isn't something you can't do because you have no money, or because there is no air conditioning or even a building. You just can't do it because you don't have the heart. If you have the heart, you can see the Lord's glory even on a deserted island.

Receiving blessings as a believer doesn't mean being exempt from various challenges and trials. Rather, it is experiencing the Lord who is greater than those problems. The Lord's blood is thicker than my pain, and the Lord's grace is greater than my problems.

The reason a believer must have power is not to reign and oppress like Pharaoh. The world needs money and power to live comfortably and discriminate, but we use power to face suffering and see the Lord's glory.

Being disappointed means you definitely had an expectation. If you seek vain things, you will surely be disappointed. Because they soon wither away. A person who pursues eternal things will obtain imperishable glory.
If the gospel of the cross's blood can be witnessed and the Holy Spirit can descend, then for the Lord's glory, whether by life or by death.

When it hurts, you must say it hurts. Even if you were hit because you did something wrong, when you shed tears saying it hurts, the Lord binds you up, restores you, and makes you more glorious than before. 'Trust in him at all times, O people; pour out your heart before him...'

Glorious Gospel: The gospel is glorious. The gospel is God's best and was perfect for us. Because Jesus is the gospel. Since He gave Himself to us, no greater evidence exists. 'For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes.' - Rom 1:16

When Jacob slept with a stone pillow at Bethel, he saw God's way, God's ladder. Without human wisdom, ambition, or obsession, he saw angels ascending and descending and the glory of God. Until we face a situation where we sleep with a stone pillow, we live lying, deceiving, and being betrayed to gain the world's glory. When tears stream down and fall from the cheeks on a rough stone pillow, that road which was invisible, that eternal road opens up.

Weaknesses are hidden and strengths are exaggerated. That is the principle of marketing. However, we rather boast of our weaknesses. Through our weakness, the Lord's power flows out. That is why when I am weak, then I am strong.
Weakness is the true strength that allows one to experience Christ's strong power. 'My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.' - 2 Cor 12:9

To a person who faithfully tends even a small flock of their own, 'suddenly, unexpectedly, at an unpredicted time,' the glorious Lord appears. 'And in the same region there were shepherds out in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night. And an angel of the Lord appeared to them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were filled with great fear.' - Luke 2:8-9
Most Powerful Performance: The strongest power is love. Because the Lord Himself works where the Lord's heart is. Without love, it is useless and meaningless.

'It was not because you were more in number than any other people that the Lord set his love on you and chose you, for you were the fewest of all peoples.' - Deut 7:7 I bless you to be the weakest. Then the Lord will be revealed more.
Immortal Purpose: It is not the world or people that hold me. It is only the Lord. That is why life can be beautiful and glorious.

When facing unfair treatment: You will face unfairness anyway. You might be misunderstood regarding things you didn't do or your intentions. There are two choices: if you just explode in anger, you and the other person both die without a solution; the other is to think of the Lord and His glory within it, endure, and become beautiful. There will be great glory for the person who thinks of the Lord who permitted all this. 'It is good for me that I was afflicted, that I might learn your statutes.' - Ps 119:71 'For this is a gracious thing, when, mindful of God, one endures sorrows while suffering unjustly.' - 1 Pet 2:19
When you deeply think of and love Jesus, you become unconscious of how others look at you. In worship and life, the world and I disappear, and only the Lord who redeemed me is seen.

Believing in Jesus means being thrilled looking only at the Lord because of the glory that is no longer evaluated by the world's values. Looking at my choices and responses proves what I trust and love. Do you love Jesus?

There are people who insist on walking the path Jesus blocks. They are foolish. There are people who seek Jesus' help for their own path. They are clever. There are people who walk the path they wouldn't have gone if it weren't for Jesus. They are people of faith. They will see God's glory.
Do not keep hesitating, thinking 'maybe' with something other than Jesus. If you run for Jesus alone, you will 'certainly' see glory.
A life focused solely on honoring Christ is peaceful. This is because living and dying do not become such issues and one is overwhelmed by more important values.
If you have fully sought God's glory and tried to save souls, you are already a champion. I hope you look only to the Lord boldly without wavering.

Why do Christians live in the world without power? First reason: Because they think of God's grace as just fire insurance... God's grace fills you with a power greater than that of Daniel or John the Baptist. Grace is what's needed in every field.

Not zeal, but class: There are two ways an elementary student solves a problem. Doing it diligently. Diligence might raise them by about 10 ranks in the midterms. The other is solving it as a college student. Revival doesn't come through relative zeal alone. It comes when the glory is so great that you don't care about anything else and offer a completely different life, different prayer, and different worship toward the goal. Discard petty things and dwell in a different Class. 'Brothers, I do not consider that I have made it my own. But one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and straining forward to what lies ahead, I press on toward the goal for the prize of the upward call of God in Christ Jesus.' - Phil 3:13-14

Life begets life: There are those like police, firefighters, and coast guards who save human lives. Unlike jobs that just handle phones and computers in an office, they can sometimes die in the line of duty. To save a life, you must risk a life. Seeing some saints, respect and wonder come out even without seeing the minister. You know the teacher by looking at the disciple.

Being loved doesn't mean monopolizing all interest and affection. It simply means that God's irreplaceable love is poured into us like clay vessels, making us jewels, and sometimes we meet people who recognize and respect that jewel.

I return deeply realizing how precious the ministry we do is. It cannot be fully expressed in words. We in London deeply think of and love all the members in Korea. Our friends who shed good influence in every church make me truly happy and also make me straighten my collar.

'For we are his workmanship' (Eph 2:10). We are God's masterpiece, a one-of-a-kind masterpiece, God's poem, and God's letter. When I become myself, the power God endowed flows out. Don't be someone else; be yourself. That is the freedom that comes when discovering oneself in God.

We are the body of Jesus. The head and the body are never separated. Just as my head is Hwasung Kim, my body is also Hwasung Kim. We are partakers of the divine nature and the fullness of Jesus. That is why the power to rule dwells in us. I hope you never give up that authority.

Our prayers do not bother God. Rather, they give Him glory. The Lord will surely hear our prayers. If Jesus is my Lord, there is no reason He wouldn't hear. When the name of Jesus is lifted up, God the Father will be most pleased and will perform the things He delights in. 'Whatever you ask in my name, this I will do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son. If you ask me anything in my name, I will do it.' - John 14:13-14

Pray like this. You will see the Lord's glory. If the glory is great, you can easily overcome suffering. 1. Make your requests known with thanksgiving (Phil 4:6, Ps 50:23 Paul's prayer). 2. Pray to be shown the glory (Exod 33:18 Moses' prayer). 3. Seek a listening heart, that is, wisdom (1 Kings 3:9 Solomon's prayer). 4. Pray that my will be broken and the Lord's will be done (Mark 14:36 Jesus' prayer).

If you try to enforce your own desires, only regret will remain, but if you follow the Lord's way, there will be glory. If you are greedy, you might gain something but eventually lose it all; the Lord's way might involve many losses, but you will instead gain everything.
The purpose of life is to glorify God and enjoy Him forever (Westminster Shorter Catechism). Forcing joy is a disaster.

When life twists contrary to one's desires, there is the Lord's amazing providence. Augustine as a rhetorician, Paul as a famous rabbi, and Joseph merely desired a life like a young noble in the Near East. When their lives were twisted, they were flustered, but they realized that a life God intervened in is glorious and within an amazing plan. Even if you fail an exam, fail in business, or lose your place to stay, the Lord is with you who confess He is faithful. The Lord is still faithful even in situations that don't make sense.
The reason life is hard is that we don't shed blood. Rather, when we willingly shed blood for Jesus, we are most happy and glorious.

Things you boast of will be taken away. All things boasted of will be taken away. However, if you boast of Jesus, Jesus will be proclaimed. (2 Kings 20:13) 'Hezekiah welcomed them, and he showed them all his treasure house, the silver, the gold, the spices, the precious oil, his armory, all that was found in his storehouses. There was nothing in his house or in all his realm that Hezekiah did not show them.'
If you want to boast, you must boast of your weakness. Because God's power overflows even more in our weakness. In weakness, God's power without impurities becomes perfect.

If you reveal yourself, show yourself, appeal for yourself, and lift yourself up, there will only be an intense emptiness. However, if I die on the cross and I no longer live in me but only the Lord lives in me and I live only by faith in the Lord, people who evaluated or tried to ignore me will pay attention to the Lord. Because the Lord cannot be hidden. - Gal 2:20, Ps 40:3
Examine your desires. Then you can know for whom you live. Those who live for perishable things will be ashamed, and those who live for the Eternal One will receive glory.

A person who laments their situation, frustrated that they are not a jewel, says, "Others are doing so well (comparison), why am I not working out?" Life isn't reversed by plastic surgery to look like a jewel or upgrading specs. You just need to become a true earthenware vessel and focus on the Lord, who is the treasure. He never forced you to be a jewel, and you can't be one. Only Jesus is the jewel. The secret to overcoming both despair and pride at once is knowing that truth. I am the vessel, the Lord is the jewel. 2 Cor 4:7 'But we have this treasure in jars of clay, to show that the surpassing power belongs to God and not to us.'
If you have solely sought only the Lord's glory, act boldly. No one can tear you down. The one who looks only to the Lord is the one who only triumphs.

My ability, surrounding circumstances, rumors, and crises are not major problems. What is important is that the Lord's hand protects me because He sent me. That is why the goal to focus on changes. It is only to witness the cross in that land and see God's glory.

Small decisions change the course of life. Thus, choice determines destiny. 'Faith' is making a decision that you wouldn't make if it weren't for the Lord, rather than a decision your flesh wants. A decision of faith is the good side that the Almighty Lord thinks of. That is how a life becomes one that God glorifies through that choice.
I am certain the Lord will give much grace in this retreat. Because I see the members lowering themselves and serving with a heart of martyrdom.
My heart overflows. Because the gospel of the cross is glorious. I proclaim that gospel without shame because it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes.
The most valuable life is running for the Lord and leaving not a single drop through holy consumption. If you are used until nothing is left, it is a truly glorious life.
The disciples rejoiced when they were persecuted. Because receiving resistance in the world meant they were becoming worthy of heaven.
No one respects a gangster for driving a luxury car. A person's true nobility comes from the value of their soul, not from school, reputation, or class.

If you are sad because you are not respected or recognized, you cannot see God's glory. Agony toward God's kingdom and community proves that he is a partaker of God's glory. Do you get angry or disappointed for human glory? Or do you feel agony for the Lord's glory? Lead us to the place where the Lord calls.

Lord, I am not afraid because I run toward You. Also, I am happy because I will live for the Lord and die for the Lord. Since I look to the Lord with all my heart, sin cannot overcome me. Being able to run for the Lord is an overwhelming glory to me.

I run forward for the Lord, for the Lord's glory. Even if everything collapses, if that is in the eyes of the youth, that is the blessing of the young, and there is hope for this nation and church. Honor, glory, and all power, may the Lord alone receive.

Following the Lord, especially doing ministry, is recognizing losses in advance. Therefore, spiritual loss, material expenditure, and the birth pangs of relationships are thought of not as fears, but as payments that must naturally be made. A person who has decided to follow the Lord does not consider these as terrible pains. Because they have seen the Lord's glory. Personally, I dislike poverty and loneliness but I am not afraid of them.
We must serve with the Lord's heart and the Lord's love. Only then will the Lord alone receive glory.

Looking only at the Lord's glory and discarding self-interest doesn't happen automatically. The time of purification, such as having one's own ambition removed from Joseph's dream, is different for each person. Moses took 40 years as a shepherd, Paul 12 years in the wilderness, and Jacob almost a lifetime. I hope you are free from the effort to prove yourself. Jesus could have proved Himself by making bread from stones, but He relied entirely on the Father's word and waited only for His evaluation.

Seeking the Lord's glory refers to unretreating faith. Even though you sought the Lord's glory, situations that don't work out and things you really want to avoid can rush in. Faith is continuing to seek only the Lord's glory without much modification, being able to rejoice saying 'Glory to the Lord' even if I die here.

When you fully seek the Lord's glory, you become bold and free. To such a person, He entrusts human rights, material rights, and spiritual rights. I hope you are not afraid of insignificant things. I hope you become a life that is burned on the altar so that the Lord alone may be exalted.

When doing the Lord's work, the most important thing is not financial support, gifts, or organization. It is guarding your heart. When you guard your heart, you continue without getting discouraged, and when you continue regardless of being ignored, God's glory appears. 'And let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.' - Gal 6:9

The Lord sent me. – Mission. Even if it is a narrow road that many ignore, He sent me saying that road is the true road, that road is a meaningful road. It is the path Apostle Paul walked, even if there's no treatment as a guest throughout life, even if there's no one to cook a warm meal. It is the path He told him to come to while showing God's glory in Damascus, the path he ran without regret and poured himself out like a drink offering before the altar. It is the path he went joyfully even with much loss and suffering to align with God's will. I pray that you walk the path where the words to be carved on your tombstone will be of a person who truly loved souls and God.
Just being called by the Lord is infinitely precious. It is so glorious for me to live with faith together with precious people. Let us glorify the gospel.

A person the Lord calls, a person who runs out unconditionally at the Lord's calling, a person who becomes the Lord's joy, a person for whom nothing other than the Lord can possibly be a joy, a person the Lord saves, a person who honors only the Lord whether by life or by death—even if I walk this path alone, may I be such a person...

I must run without rest so that the Lord may be glorified. So much that I don't know what to do because the Lord is so good... May your heart be full of longing for the Lord's temple... Jesus, I love You.
Do what the Lord wants. Compared to the glory to be received, the current suffering and payment of price are not worth comparing at all.

I hope the Lord is important to you. Blessed is the person whose interest and pursuit is the Lord. A person for whom other values become like rags before a luxury item because the Lord is so precious is glorious.

Since the Lord is with me, there is nothing to fear. Since it is work God wants, I will not even grow weary. Since it is for His eternal glory, all other matters are bound to be secondary. Like a ride at an amusement park... hold the handle tight. Now we run.

I feel a lot of lack while doing the Lord's work. At the same time, it is glorious to be able to walk the path of faith with precious people. Meeting you is a great glory to me. Serving beautiful souls is an undeserved glory to me. I bow my head.
I run toward the Word of the Lord. Fire-like powerful prayer and answers.
There is power in the blood of the Lord.

You can do what can be done right now. If I die and Christ lives, I will experience many souls coming alive. The problem is 'me,' not 'others.' If you live the life the Lord wants, you will see the Lord's glory. Blessed is the person who is satisfied with the one Lord who is the true truth, rather than trying to satisfy their sick self with perishable things.

I am the kingdom of God where the Lord's reign descends. Through me, the community I belong to will be blessed, and I am the source of blessing that blesses the world. When I go forward, the kingdom of God descends there.

Now is like the time of Elijah; the most evil king in Israel's history was Ahab. Also, the prophet with the strongest power in history was Elijah from the same era. The darker the age, the stronger the light that dispels that darkness. Who will become strong? "POST TENEBRAS LUX"

True joy is not acquisition or achievement. It is looking at the coming joy before me while bearing the cross. That joy enables one to overcome current deficiency and suffering. 'Who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross...' - Heb 12:2
Worldly wisdom teaches to highlight strengths and hide weaknesses. However, faith challenges us to rather boast of our weaknesses and testify to God's power that is made perfect within them.

There is a taste of heaven, a joy of heaven, and a fun of heaven. Therefore, one must be a person of heavenly greed, that is, one who takes it by force. If you get a taste for worldly fun, heavenly fun disappears. A person who believes in Jesus goes to heaven. Therefore, there is a fun and a taste in believing in Jesus.

A person who has seen the highest glory is not tempted by lower glory. A person who has experienced the best is not shaken by something inferior to it. Experience the Lord's glory. Then you will not be shaken for emotional reasons, or by comparison and worldly pride. 'That the word of the Lord may speed ahead and be honored, as happened among you.' - 2 Thess 3:1 When God's word runs, you experience glory. Let the word of the Lord run in your heart.

For a soccer player, running the field without resting on the bench is not a hardship but something supremely glorious. 'But I do not account my life of any value nor as precious to myself, if only I may finish my course and the ministry that I received from the Lord Jesus, to testify to the gospel of the grace of God.' - Acts 20:24
There is the sound of a heavy rain. It is the sound of a heavy rain being achieved through our youth.
I hope you stop calculating and believe in the Lord. If you weigh probabilities, you live according to the flesh; if you follow faith, you see glory.
After the Saturday meeting, one member says appreciatively, 'It's good~' I also find the grace granted by the Lord good and glorious.
The greatest and most beautiful miracle is change. It is something only the Lord does.

It would be very blessed to walk a smooth road and cultivate fertile fields. However, it would also be a great glory to fall while painfully cultivating a stony field. The work the Lord told you to do and the place He told you to stand is the promised land, the holy land.
Do not become somewhat comfortable by becoming a captive, but I hope you fight the good fight intensely. The glory of a saint can never be compared with the current suffering.

The gospel Paul really wanted to deliver to the Romans, if described in today's context, is like this: next to a classmate at a reunion who brags about her husband's business being in the top 100, next to a classmate being congratulated because her husband entered politics and became a minister, in front of a classmate whose face is full of joy because her son or daughter graduated from a prestigious school and got a Ph.D. from Harvard, and next to a pastor's wife classmate who is thanking God because her husband became the senior pastor of a large church—it is to publicly boast that I am living risking my entire life on Jesus who died on the cross. I have nothing to boast of except the cross of Christ.
There is a question I always ask in every moment. What do I want and why am I in this place? The answer is always consistent. 'I want to see the Lord's glory!!'
God, give me the strength to run for the Lord's glory in this world today as well.
May we eventually see the Lord's glory in the work God has started and on that path. I will only dwell in the Lord's tent.

God remembers two things primarily. 1. Small things. 2. Seeking His kingdom and His righteousness rather than my greed. If you do not try to satisfy your greed but are faithful in small things for the Lord's glory, it will be remembered.

God pours His blessings upon the confession of 'It is okay to be given up if it's not Your will' and 'Still, I love the Lord.' A person who can be humble after being lifted up, a person who can be truly happy by fearing the Lord—He will lift such a person up and reveal God's glory through them.

God will grant revival when we become one in the Lord. It is truly difficult to achieve oneness in human affairs. The devil never permits it. One certain fact is that I will see the Lord's glory. God will deal with, fix, and raise us up, who are sinful and full of flaws, for His glory and holiness. And eventually, He will remove the stubborn heart and give the Lord's heart. 'And I will give them one heart, and a new spirit I will put within them. I will remove the heart of stone from their flesh and give them a heart of flesh, that they may walk in my statutes and keep my rules and obey them. And they shall be my people, and I will be their God.' (Ezek 11:19-20) Victory is not believing in feelings but believing in the Lord's promises. Hold on.

There is a reason for not being able to meet God. It is because of a wrong premise. It's the hypothesis that 'God will receive glory through my success.' The thought that He only receives glory through gold medals, prestigious schools, good jobs, and social status. It's a wrong thought. The Bible says that believing is glory. It says not standing in evil is already blessed. Crying out that it hurts in the midst of suffering is the glory of a saint. I hope you become saints of faith who hold onto the One who not only is with me but also hurts and sheds tears with my struggles and difficulties, yet never gives up with the absolute solution of the cross.

A person who glorifies God enjoys peace even in tribulation. A person who succeeds in Ministry to God also succeeds in Ministry to People. Priorities beget life. 'Though the devil should rush to swallow us with open mouth, Jesus our Captain will fight and win in the end. It is well with my soul, it is well, it is well with my soul.' - Hymn 46
God's interference is not an obstruction. It is the most glorious path as a human that even angels would envy. God's will is sweet to those who obey.
^^ Let the day holy, holyday

God's name is not insulted through unbelievers. It is because of the avoidance and lukewarmness of believers. Do not be angry at not being recognized, but be a David who expresses righteous indignation upon seeing that God's name is not glorified. Glorify the gospel through your life.
For the Lord, for the Lord's glory... Lord, please receive it.

There is something God asks of us. It is not to tenaciously compete with others and climb up by trampling them. Lifting up and bringing low is in His hands. Rather than filling one's own selfish greed, He says, "Let no one seek his own good, but the good of his neighbor" (1 Cor 10:24). The guts and leisure to seek the good of others in an infinitely competitive society is a privilege enjoyed only by those working for the glory of God.

God said, 'Because he loves me, I will rescue him; I will protect him, for he acknowledges my name. He will call on me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble, I will deliver him and honor him.' Ps 91:14-15 I hope you confess with all your heart that you know the Lord's name. I hope you passionately confess that you love the Lord. Then the Lord will rescue you.
The brightness of heaven's glory breaks the dark shadows. Darkness has never once overcome light. By relying on Jesus' merits, always triumph.

Our Father in heaven~ Our Lord God, God who is present here and worthy to receive great glory and honor - Almighty Father God, this land of Europe needs Your rule. Only You fix and restore us. We seek Your face. Please come down ~ For the kingdom and the power and the glory are Yours forever. Amen. * May all members pray with eager longing for the cloud of God's glory to cover our tent on that day.

Even if you live just for a day, I hope you run at 350 km/h. You will see the Lord's glory. Otherwise, you'll end up crawling on the ground with wings. God has called us gloriously. * Absolute speed for a plane to take off: 350 km/h / Absolute distance: over 800 m.

When you pass one hump, another hump stands waiting. Still, it doesn't matter because one who runs for the Lord's glory will never give up nor stop. I believe in the Lord's almightiness and believe that He will work all things together for good.

When you feel infinitely small, or when only sighs come out saying 'What can someone like me do?', you must look at and see that you are in the glorious Lord and the Lord is in you. If Satan reminds you of your past, I hope you remind Satan of his future.
Each and every soul is not made just like that. I am proud of you.

Honestly, when I get a call from my brother once in a while, I can't sleep. Because I get so challenged and excited..ㅋㅋㅋ Today is such a day. There's a drama I'm enjoying right now, but after talking to him, I feel guilty even watching a drama. ㅋㅋ Anyway, I definitely have to watch "Moon Embracing the Sun," so please refrain from calling on Wednesdays and Thursdays..ㅋㅋ It's a Wed-Thu drama. Haha, you know I'm joking. Hearing about my brother's family history(?) is truly challenging. I praise the Lord who is glorified through your life. Hallelujah!!!!!!
Thank you for praying for Hanseok. He has improved surprisingly, so I give glory with the word 'miracle.' Truly thank you. The Lord is wonderful.

I bless the members and leaders who were together. It's a difficult 14-hour session throughout, but thank you for following without a word of complaint. Especially, I give glory to the Lord who was with us in prayer and talk.
Entering modern times, many people compromise. Among them, the most serious is salvation without repentance. Without holiness, no one will see the Lord.

In reality, tears burst out even while eating, but the Lord makes me dream beyond the walls. I hope you confess and declare before the Lord and the world: 'I shall not die, but I shall live, and recount the deeds of the Lord.'
It is a night with much repentance. Because I am a person entrusted with souls and the power of life is the key point. I must be given more and burned completely. Only the Lord must be glorified.

Commonly, succeeding is not God's glory, but enduring and waiting rather becomes glory. When my faith does not weaken and I hold onto God's promises, I give glory to God. Glory is given not by wish fulfillment but by faith. 'He did not weaken in faith... No unbelief made him waver concerning the promise of God, but he grew strong in his faith as he gave glory to God.' - Rom 4:20

People often say they give glory to the Lord when they receive a spotlight that others would envy. That is why the Lord doesn't lift them up. Because they lift themselves up to give glory. The Lord's bringing low means I am not prepared. Succeeding to envied heights or mentioning God's glory in an interview is not glory. Glory is when one has waited long without an answer yet faith has not weakened and one holds onto the promise without doubt. Glory is not something just anyone gives. (Rom 4:19) 'He did not weaken in faith when he considered his own body, which was as good as dead (since he was about a hundred years old), or when he considered the barrenness of Sarah's womb.' (Rom 4:20) 'No unbelief made him waver concerning the promise of God, but he grew strong in his faith as he gave glory to God.'

To me, all meaning and value come only from the Lord. When looking at others and the environment with such truth, I rejoice and give glory with the meaning the Lord gave. The Lord alone is my reason. “A person cannot receive even one thing unless it is given him from heaven.” - John 3:27
Oh happyday, I will never the same

The reason Moses is beautiful is that he walked Moses' path and after being faithful unto death, he made a lonely exit at Mount Nebo. If Moses had insisted on walking Joshua's flashy path of entering Canaan, he wouldn't have been beautiful and would have obscured God's glory. My life is most beautiful only when I walk the path the Lord gave. Walk your path. Even if it looks narrow...

Moses makes a beautiful exit without being pathetic. Because he fulfilled his mission with all his life, being faithful every day as if it were the last. One who has fully fulfilled their mission is clean.
Do not let your faith weaken while praying, but give glory.

Animals all boast of things on a physical level. However, humans, who are God's best masterpiece, should not boast at such a level. We must not boast of our own things but boast of Him. The essence of SNS is, in one word, boasting. What one wears, whom one meets, what one eats, and what one has seen. But we boast of Jesus alone. That is the difference from animals.

Even if the dog barks, the KTX runs. Because its purpose is clear. A person whose purpose is the Lord does not care about reactions or words. Living or dying also becomes secondary. Because honoring Jesus is the most important purpose.

A head of the family doesn't sit around slumped. Because there are family members to support. A person with a mission doesn't stay fallen. Because they are a person who saves lives. Anyway, we will rest eternally when we go to heaven. Run for glory.
We must request more of the Lord's intervention, reign, and dealing. So that we may see the Lord's glory in this dark world..

A new employee who just entered a major corporation after only doing part-time jobs feels extremely insulted when told to empty the trash and wipe the floor. However, the chairman of that company receives respect and glory when he does so. A strong and honorable person can easily lower themselves to serve and that becomes glory, but a weak and defensive person cannot lower themselves and regards it as a shame. A true strong person can serve and lower themselves without getting angry. Jesus lowered Himself boundlessly and bore the cross.
This path will not be easy compared to other paths. But it will be truly glorious.

If you were disappointed because there is nothing good in me, that means you are proud. A humble person does not expect anything in themselves but only wants to die and live only through Jesus; therefore, they are not frustrated by their appearance but are captivated by and rejoice in the Lord.

People mistakenly think they can give glory to God if they achieve something. God is already high alone and has all power; why would He be lacking anything to hold out His hand to us? The only way to glorify God is for us to become glorious. That is only done by grace, where the self is denied and rights are given up. Only then does the Lord receive glory. He has never once received glory through my self-realization. 'When Jesus had spoken these words, he lifted up his eyes to heaven, and said, "Father, the hour has come; glorify your Son that the Son may glorify you."' - John 17:1
I hope you hold fast to your faith. The Lord wants that, and eventually, discipline also has an end, and at the end of that road, there is the glorious Lord.

The most powerful life is one without regret. Whatever happens, whatever tribulation comes, a life that seeks the Lord's glory has no regret. If what you seek is greed, there will be much regret and lingering, but if it is the Lord's perfect glory, it will be sufficient.

There is a question I always ask myself. "What are you doing now?" Every time, a confession pops out reflexively. "I want to see God's glory!" There is a heat in the heart following that question and answer. It is a blessing to know what I want and with what alone I am satisfied.

There is a saying, 'Leave while they are applauding.' It's a selfish thought. A person of mission does not leave for personal gain but for glory. Glory is not my will, but His will, who receives the glory.

Well-lived life: In the distant future, if my daughters ask, I don't think I'll have much to show them. However, I don't think I'll be ashamed. If there is nothing left because I burned it out for the Lord...

True purpose: There's no need to strive to be great while living in the world. Then you overexert yourself and side effects follow. And since there is already glory in the Lord, there's no reason to seek worldly glory. Before the Lord's glory, worldly things are but fireflies.
Good news: The Lord still reigns. In all areas, visible and invisible, the Lord is King. This is comfort and joy.

Importance of meeting: Meetings are truly important. Because through that meeting, one's values are influenced, and when the purpose of life is modified, life in the eternal dwelling is also determined along with the entire life. 'For what is our hope or joy or crown of boasting before our Lord Jesus at his coming? Is it not you? For you are our glory and joy.' - 1 Thess 2:19-20
One of my missions is to raise people who can never be satisfied with counterfeits or substitutes. It is to become a Christian who runs constantly for Jesus alone with that holy dissatisfaction.

I am truly thankful to God for the co-workers who are with me. This road is not an easy one, and the heartache must be beyond words... John Wesley and other co-workers who returned and played until the end with Wallace Hartley, who was playing alone as the Titanic sank. If we are together with such love that does not fear death, it would be beyond glorious. Walking together is so glorious and happy. "Gentlemen, it has been a privilege playing with you tonight." - Wallace Hartley, choir director of Bethel Independent Methodist Church, after finishing his last performance on the sinking Titanic.

1. A person who earnestly seeks God cries out for His mercy. Then the Lord answers like this. 2. 'Hear, O Lord, when I cry aloud; be gracious to me and answer me! You have said, "Seek my face." My heart says to you, "Your face, Lord, do I seek."' Ps 27:7-8 3. Seek my face. That was God's answer. That day Moses so longed for, that face David so cried for, that presence Job so desperately called for. 4. 'He is the radiance of the glory of God and the exact imprint of his nature, and he upholds the universe by the word of his power. After making purification for sins, he sat down at the right hand of the Majesty on high.' (Heb 1:3) 5. God's answer, to 'seek the face,' is Jesus Christ. 6. Only in Him is there complete union with God and the solution to that burning thirst.

The reason people of faith distance themselves from sin is not that they are ethical or strong-willed, but because the glory and love of God they experienced were so great. Under the blazing sun, a candle must go out. If you love the Lord more, you distance yourself from sin. Because it's too hard to sin. ㅠㅠ

Even if I rot away secretly while upholding the Lord's name in the place I stand, I will not regret it. Because He knows me and I know Him. If I can seek only His glory as vain glory disappears, that is the eternal inheritance and blessing for this lacking one.
The most childish things are boasting of money, academic background, and fame. Rather, I hope you boast of your weakness. The Lord will be revealed. The Lord's grace is sufficient for us.

If I haven't become a 'glorious person of the Lord' yet, it's because I haven't clearly faced the 'glory of the Lord' or the 'Lord of glory' yet. Even if you mobilize strong self-discipline and free will, if you don't face the Lord's glory, it eventually ends in three days. For a person who has seen the glory, living a life that isn't glorious is actually harder.
The secret that I can be in God and God in me is because of the blood of the cross. That impossible thing became possible within that noble blood. Hallelujah.
I will not stop. I will not give up. I will not even look back. Even if I fall, I will rise again. I will never lose and I will triumph. Because He has shown me the Lord's glory.

It is a truly precious thing for a high-ranking person to clean with a broom. But there are those whose job is cleaning in the world, and they clean in the church too. No one looks back at them and it's taken for granted. They are more precious. There are often precious people who are excluded from praise and not revealed to the world.
If a marathoner doesn't run the track with all their might and has strength left after the finish line, that is a crime.

If someone is afraid and panics, they are a person whose purpose is 'survival.' However, a person whose purpose is 'God's glory' is not chased. Because they are interested in Christ being honored in them, whether by life or by death. Whether you eat or drink or study or work, do it for the Lord's glory.

Many want their weakness to disappear or at least try to hide it. However, if I only look to and hope in the Lord despite my weakness, the Lord receives glory through lacking me. Despite lacking character, expression, clumsy relationships, and unstable emotions, the Lord wants to receive glory through me. Only when I look to the Lord.

정작 many people fail to bear fruit and obscure the glory even amidst many forms of godliness because they enjoy human praise more than necessary. 'Not to us, O Lord, not to us, but to your name give glory, for the sake of your steadfast love and your faithfulness!' - Ps 115:1

There is the glory of a saint when prayer is so overwhelming that one goes to the restroom and cries out with muffled, desperate sobs. That person, who has no choice but to call upon the Lord and rely on Him regardless of time and place, is the glorious person and the strongest person.

A performer on stage is extremely nervous. They practice a piece they've played many times hundreds of times. However, the audience is just relaxed and enjoying. When the performance is over, there are applause, bouquets, and glory for the performer, but none for the people who watched. Exceptionally, there's an audience member who is anxious together and rejoices together when the performance ends. It's a loved one, like family. If you love, you share suffering and glory without being jealous.
Paul was a person whose handicap became a boast. Because through that weakness, the Lord's power becomes strong. In the Lord, the infinitely weak person becomes the most powerful person.

1. We need salvation in our future, job, relationships, health, and heart. 2. God's salvation, the Father's will, is not revealed to just anyone. 3. One who makes their conduct right will see the Lord's salvation and His will. 4. One who makes their conduct right, one who offers a sacrifice of thanksgiving, and one who glorifies God are the same person. 5. Offer a sacrifice of thanksgiving. You will see His will. 6. 'The one who offers thanksgiving as his sacrifice glorifies me; to one who orders his way rightly I will show the salvation of God!' - Ps 50:23

Trying to solve a problem when you face it is an instinct. However, what the Lord wants is not for you to solve the problem, but to look at the Lord. When you long for the Lord's glory more than the solution to the problem, you experience the Lord untying and blessing you. Daniel did not look at the problem (lions) in the lions' den, but looked at the Lord. The mighty Lord...

There's a dream, but there's a fear. It's the fear of 'What if God doesn't want this?' Such a worry is practical, but it's a worry you have because you haven't met the Lord properly. It's not that letting go of the world is really hard and holding onto the mission is too difficult, but because you haven't discovered the real thing. One who has seen the glory does not struggle with or fear anything.
Moses' request was to be shown God's glory. The reason one easily collapses and becomes a slave to sin is not knowing the glory. A person who has seen God's glory can never live that way.

Moses goes to God with the problems of Israel. Even in the midst of conflict then, one can see God's glory descending. You must not focus on the conflict but only on the Lord. Then, while melting away the problems, you will see the Lord's glory. 'Jesus said to him, "You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind. This is the great and first commandment."' - Matt 22:37

The fiery furnace of suffering is not meant to kill me, but rather to set me free and make me walk. That fire looks painful, but it is a blessing that does not harm anything good and only burns the ropes binding me, the chains of sin, and the intensely corrupt self. Walk in the midst of the fire; you will never die and will face God's glory, Jesus. 'Then he commanded some of the mighty men of his army to bind Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, and to cast them into the burning fiery furnace.' - Dan 3:20 'He answered and said, "But I see four men unbound, walking in the midst of the fire, and they are not hurt; and the appearance of the fourth is like a son of the gods."' - Dan 3:25
...by doing so, the Lord alone must be most glorified, the Lord alone must be most exalted.

Among the Old Testament sacrifices, the burnt offering is the one that is completely burned. When everything is fully burned and offered, the glory appears. When the Holy Spirit comes, we live a life of complete combustion. Because He gives us the true goal and field.
If you only stay faithful when all conditions are met, faithfulness is impossible until you die. Risk your life in limited conditions. You will see God's glory.

No matter how hard a vessel tries, it cannot become a treasure. It becomes a treasure when you put a gem in the vessel. Become a person who contains Jesus. There will be a glory on a different level from those decorated with luxury brands on the vessel.

The strength and ability I have should not be used for myself, but should be invested in considering weak and powerless people. Especially, when I serve the people He allowed me with an unchanging appearance regardless of their reaction and also lose to them, real authority and power appear.

In 1977, Voyager 2 travels toward the edge of the solar system at a speed of 90,000 miles per hour, faster than a bullet. In 1989, about 11 years later, after arriving at Pluto, it leaves the solar system. This means it will take 958,000 years to see another star. And that's within a 1-light-year range. There are 100 million such solar systems in the Milky Way, and they say there are 100 billion such galaxies in the universe. The number of stars in the universe is roughly 7 trillion times 10 billion, which is 10 times more than all the grains of sand on Earth. It's about 10 to the 16th power times the number of grains in a handful of sand. But here's the thing: our God created these things like this. 'And he made the stars also.' (Gen 1:16) Ah~ He is so simple. That is the power of the Creator, the Almighty. Such a God loves me and pays all the price on the cross, not sparing even the insult to His divinity which is higher than our character. And He wants us to rely on Him with complete faith.

The most powerful person is not someone with high means, methods, or specs, but rather a life with a powerful purpose. That purpose is God's glory. An absolutely strong purpose leads to an absolutely strong life. Please be strong by embracing Jesus.

If you throw your path to the Lord and entrust it to Him, you will receive it back as refined gold-like faith. (Job 23:10) After that, you, who only knew others' testimonies and experiences theoretically, will face the living God directly and become a glorious person. Leaving the values and the path the world speaks of is itself suffering. However, suffering is good for me. (Ps 119:67) 'I had heard of you by the hearing of the ear, but now my eye sees you.' - Job 42:5 Because suffering is another revelation of God.

If you have the passion to give the best to the most precious One, if you want to go forward as an apostle of love who serves by being more prepared, you must pour more time and sincerity into the prayer meeting before worship. If you truly long for the Lord's glory..

You must be free from someone watching you. Also, you must not try to make others see you. All our interest and focus must be on God alone; that is the worship of life, true worship. If I only look to the Lord, people also don't look at me but see the God I am looking at. If others can see God through you, that is the highest glory.

The purpose does not change. I will not stop either. Even if I'm out of breath, I will finish the course. If I'm so weak I can't run, I will at least crawl up to the Lord's altar and offer myself. And then I will be happy. Because I have seen the Lord's glory.
The difference in atmospheric pressure creates wind. Become a spiritual high pressure (anticyclone); then a wind that flips the rotten world and revives dry bones will blow.

Many people give up halfway. Those who endure to the end will see the glory. Since Satan originally has no roots, most of his attacks look strong but are one-offs. No matter how fresh a flower looks, it withers in 4 or 5 days in a vase. We, who have roots, are rugged, but if we endure, we triumph.

If a person of faith doesn't pray, even an ordinary life is difficult. While others walk life easily, I take one step in pain only by risking my life. I cannot understand why I chose this path. I cannot understand it, but that path is glorious and happy. It is a narrow road.

When a relationship starts, people often celebrate 100 days, Valentine's, and White Day. Without love, there is no such labor or torture for both the giver and the receiver. Without love, everything is just a wound and everything is just tiring. The situation was critical, being stoned, but Stephen was happy and glorious. Because there was love. If there is love, one is not deceived, does not collapse, and rather pulverizes the forces of darkness.

The fire of the Word and the fire of the Holy Spirit make a person focus. Focusing means being able to discard. Only a person with fire can boldly discard. Regardless of whether it's something prepared for a long time or something precious to me, one becomes able to discard it like straw before life and the Lord's glory. You cannot swallow life without vomiting out the rotten things.

It was a dry stick for Moses, but it became power when he obeyed before God's power. The grace God gives is not a new gift, but setting on fire the gifts I already have. I am that style, that vessel, but I become strongest when I am held in God's hand.
He must increase, and I must decrease. If you are decreased, rejoice; then there will be a joy the world does not know. 'He must become greater; I must become less.' - John 3:30

Many people rush toward a goal. That is proving that they are decent people. Life does not open the door when you try to prove yourself. Only when you discard yourself and seek only the Lord's glory do the doors of life open. God does not set a proud person up high. For them, and also for the kingdom of God..

[Phil 1:20] 'As it is my eager expectation and hope that I will not be at all ashamed, but that with full courage now as always Christ will be honored in my body, whether by life or by death.' [Phil 1:21] 'For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.' Paul's interest was not in himself but focused entirely on the Lord. He confessed that he had complete interest and passion in Jesus Christ being preached, honored, and showing His nobility even in his dying flesh, more so than the issue of life or death and more than the limits and urgency of the reality he faced. Who could stop such a person? Would the devil or death stop him? In his confession was, 'I have no interest in fleshly desires. I don't even dream of being lifted up worldly or being recognized in the church as having great faith. I run forward looking only at the cross.' When the old apostle, who crucified his self on the cross, gave his life like a flame for the Lord and burned it like a drink offering before the altar, the glory of Christ, which even angels would envy, was revealed. - From the London to nation by Jacob Kim 11pages

We are still thirsty, pour your spirit out Lord. Never be satisfied with just this much. God prepares larger clouds and rain. What I am interceding for now as a minister is not a prayer to use us in the European continent, but that our youth group would be praised and disciplined before the God who surely uses us and is already using us, and that we would give glory to the Lord and become humble to the end. I pray that you become young people who hold only to Jesus to the end and seek the Lord's joy. You will become cool young people who take off their crowns and return them to the Lord.

A person drenched in water is not afraid of raindrops. The person who is afraid is the one who is less wet. One who seeks to die will live. Don't struggle with petty things; if you die cleanly, you will see the glory. 一死覺悟 (Ready for death).
If the purpose is Him, everything is joy.

David was greatly distressed... but David found strength in the Lord his God... And David inquired of the Lord, "Shall I pursue after this troop? Shall I overtake them?" He answered him, "Pursue, for you shall surely overtake and shall surely rescue." You become bold when you are with the Lord. I have nothing to fear when I am with all of you whom I love. We will find everything that was taken and bring back even more. He will surely repay more than the tears we shed. When Lazarus died, it was deeply sad, but when he lived again, a greater glory of the Lord was revealed. I request everyone to rise up before the Lord who brings life again. Now, it's our turn!

If I try to list my faults and deficiencies, I can easily write dozens of A4 pages within minutes without even needing the devil's help. Staying in the place God told me to be even with a lacking appearance is God's will; thus, if I endure for the Lord's glory, the Lord receives glory and rejoices in that. God didn't want achievement, but wanted obedience despite the lack.
The Lord wants a broken heart. Because the Lord's glory will shine more through those broken cracks.
As I look back at myself, I become thankful to everyone with a bowed head. Being together was grace, and staying together is mercy. Each and every person is an undeserved glory to me.
Do not fish in vain elsewhere, but give glory with this precious person and precious time He gave me.

The less valuable the jewel, the more flashy the jewelry box. A person who possesses the true jewel does not compare or criticize their own storage box or others'. A person who has welcomed Jesus into an earthenware vessel is already precious and does not need to prove it.

A psychology professor in college said that the most childish thing in the world is trying to be treated as special just because you're 'older, wealthier, or more educated.' The world might buy that to some extent, but the church does not. If the Lord doesn't recognize you, it's nothing. It's not important what people think; what God evaluates is important. You are not a mass-produced product but an irreplaceable masterpiece.

There's no saying you can't do the Lord's work because of a lack of money. It doesn't make sense to say we can't do the Almighty Lord's work because of lack. If we discard human glory and long for the Lord's glory, there's no reason God wouldn't support us.
I believe that if we pray for a life worthy of our calling, not to make money or for fame, but only because of the glory He showed in our youth, there is no reason God would not work.

In 2 Timothy, I see the passion of the old Apostle Paul, whose fading life once again becomes the fragrance of a drink offering poured on the altar and burns bright. I hope we give our youth and our last breath to exalt and love only the Lord. The Lord is fully worthy to receive it.
You are the only masterpiece in this world.
Do not fear even if that path is lonely and narrow. Because the Lord's glory is on that narrow road when you follow Him.

There are two ways to solve a problem. If you use your petty tricks, you'll suffer immensely and be back in the same spot after 40 years, but if you solve it through prayer, you fulfill God's will and become glorious. Experience the Lord's glory.
Courage_and_Peace: Breaking Fear Through God's Presence: Fear is not caused by the magnitude of problems but by the absence of God's presence. Worship in His presence breaks through fear.
* On Reverence: The Holy Spirit is not a God of convenience but a God of peace.

* Comforting My People: Empathy—asking 'How much does it hurt?'—accomplishes more than explanations like 'You did well anyway.' Sometimes, compassionless correct answers hurt people more than painful inadequacy.
* Reasons for Thanksgiving: The most moving gratitude comes when the Lord is with me.

* Comforting My People: We must pray that God's comfort comes, especially praying earnestly for ourselves when we need it most. This is necessary not only for ourselves but more so for family and friends, because only then can we avoid being cruel.

* Why We Must Never Treat Problems as Problems: When we view a problem as merely a problem, we are already buried in it. Taking one step away and seeing it through the Lord's eyes, we see only good things working together.

* The Important Factor: I cannot know whether good or difficult things will come, but what matters is that I face them at least filled with the Holy Spirit. He is the defender of the weak, comfort those in need. Being with the Lord is power.

* The Protagonist: The protagonist of Job is not Job but God. What matters in life is not my position or what I do, but that God acts according to His good pleasure. When the Lord is the protagonist of my life, my soul is at rest.
* Are You at Peace Now?: Absolute peace is the most basic duty of faith. Without peace, it means God is absent, and consequently, we abuse ourselves and trouble others.

* That Day: Many friends experienced liberation and became strong, and moreover, experienced happiness regardless of their problems. Through God's deity and Jesus's cross, graduation, employment, career, and marriage could no longer hold them back. Psalm 1 testifies that the simple, focused, God-approved life is a victorious life.—February 8, 2014, Gaveston Hall.

* Step Out of Stress: If there is something repeatedly on your mind, step out of that stress. The Lord is not in stress based on imagination. The Lord does not desire that we suffer from what is not essential.

* How to Know Myself: What makes me sad and what makes me joyful move me. What I desire reveals who I am. One thing I ask of the Lord...to gaze on the beauty of the Lord and to seek Him in His temple.—Psalm 27:4
* Do Not Fear: People fear they will become weak. But they do not know that when they become weak is the only time the Lord works and makes them strong.
* The Condition for Happiness: Stop defining your happiness by others' reactions. Furthermore, stop imagining based on those reactions. This is neither genuine truth nor God's intention.
* How to Have a Good Day: Simply trust that this morning God is worthy of granting a good day. There cannot be a good day that even I do not believe in.

* Addiction: When we healthily long for the inherent beauty of something, we escape from wrong and twisted addictions. When the bright moon shines beautifully without shame, we are satisfied without secretly possessing or clinging to it.

* Believe in the Lord: Believe in Jesus. With faith, you can obey. Before the sovereignty of Him whose wisdom is greater than mine and whose thoughts surpass mine, I entrust all things and dwell in peace.

* An Overflowing Life: There is a way to obtain through envy, falsehood, and theft what was not given, and there is a way to receive and enjoy it as a generous and overflowing gift. When you trust, you are not only at peace but abundant.

* The Problem in Relationships: What is absolutely essential in relational problems is margin, and that margin comes from knowing, experiencing, and tasting God. It comes from meditating on His character, power, and works. Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in Him...Fear the Lord, you His holy people, for those who fear Him lack nothing. The lions may grow weak and hungry, but those who seek the Lord lack no good thing.—Psalm 34:8-10
* Do Not Fear What You Will Lose: The Lord both gives and takes, but all this is so we may eternally gain what is eternal. Thus my soul is secure in the Lord.

* Peace: Not being at peace means not finding rest and consequently means indulging in sin. God has granted today's only peace. Glory to God in the highest heaven, and on earth peace to those on whom His favor rests.—Luke 2:14
