To proclaim truth as if pouring fire and to have no flaw in doctrine and risk one's life for ministry is as important as this: is my heart beating because of love for Jesus? If we cannot be moved, we cannot help but struggle.

True love is accompanied by three things: the desire to see, the heart to hear their words, the desire to follow their will. David had all three. He longed for God, desired to hear God's Word, and broke his own will to seek God's will.
If our language did not have the word 'love,' we would have to use such a simile from figures of speech: 'I truly think of you with the heart of Jesus.'
True rest does not come from comfortable circumstances but from relationship. If there is sin and grace is exhausted, no matter how much time and rest you give, there is no rest.

A true person of God prioritizes presence over achievement. Before David faced Goliath, there was meditation and prayer contained in the 'Psalms' of a humble shepherd. Before you open today, bow before the Lord and seek Him, His blessing rather than His blessing. God and rejoicing in Him is my strength.

True strength is the ability to care for weak people. When you win, give your best to win, and when you lose, know how to lose. The highest level of ability is strength used to give hope and joy to people, improve and restore relationships, and serve and build up many people.
Deep love makes the walls of distance and time fade away. What should be cut off becomes meaningful and continues because of Jesus. Who can separate us from God's love in Christ Jesus?

The reason my heart is comforted when it aches and becomes a good friend when lonely is because of God's unspeakable reasons. Making us shed tears of blood for not having the blessings that others have is His attempt to give us the true blessing, Himself. That's why it hurts. Thank you, right?

The reward of those who accept discipline willingly is restored relationship with the Lord and the peace that comes from it. No one enjoys the Lord's peace like those who have been set right through discipline.

Just as a warning light comes on when a car has no oil, when the Lord becomes dim in our hearts, the warning light of emotion comes on. When pain comes, we should not ignore or remove those warnings, but should invite the Lord. Faith is loving Jesus with all your heart. Please open your heart and confirm: Is Jesus at the center?
If you truly want to love and help someone, please pray like this: God, help me serve according to the heart and way the Lord has allowed.

Worldly wisdom teaches methods and techniques for dealing with people. It has temporary effects. But the truly absolute relationship that determines success or failure in life is accomplished through prayer. When a person pleases God through his conduct, even enemies are reconciled—such is the power of God. God is the master of all relationships.

When talking about first love, there are many hopes. But ultimately, the person you come to love is far from those hopes. Love is transcending the conditions you dislike. You come to love even weakness, even shortcomings.

Heavenly rewards, church revival—there are truly many important things, but among them the most precious longing is 'that I know Jesus.' There are many methods for how to long for God, but the most important thing is simply that 'you must long.'

The most foolish man in the world is one who tries to overcome a woman. When nations and peoples fall, hardliners display futile pride. The ability the Lord gives is not to be used to silence the other person, but rather to build them up and lose.

First love like burning fire guards the community, endurance of persecution in the name of Jesus, and loyalty and sincerity that would be regrettable if second to any is what cannot be replaced: 'love.' What is required more than excellent ministry and faithful devotion is to 'recover first love.' It is finding what was lost that is most important, and it is recovered only through repentance, not through events or atmosphere change. Jesus calls that repentance overcoming. 'I know your deeds, your hard work and your perseverance. I know that you cannot tolerate wicked people, that you have tested those who claim to be apostles but are not, and have found them false. You have persevered and have endured hardships for my name, and have not grown weary. Yet I hold this against you: You have forsaken the love you had at first. Consider how far you have fallen! Repent and do the things you did at first.' -Revelation 2:3,4 'Whoever has ears, let them hear what the Spirit says to the churches. To the one who is victorious, I will give the right to eat from the tree of life, which is in the paradise of God.' -Revelation 2:7

* The only way to holiness: It is impossible for a person to become holy. That is why the holy Lord came to us, and only when we dwell in Him can we become holy. The way to see Him is for His Word to dwell in us. 'Sanctify them by the truth; your word is truth.' John 17:17

Youth ministry pattern: 1. Eat, listen to the Word, pray, eat, listen to the Word, pray, sleep, wake up again, eat, listen to the Word, pray, and return. 2. Come back and gather and eat tremendously. (Kimchi stew or jjamppong + etc) 3. And share.
Do not be angry to save face. Especially not with family. People are more important than face.

In the sixth grade of elementary school, I lied about my age and attended the church youth group service. The middle and high school girls saw me as their age and were so kind to me. Since I had no faith, the service was just a formality and fellowship time was more enjoyable. One Sunday, my friend and I arrived late as usual to the youth group service when a senior student about seven years older scolded us sternly, holding us both: 'You're worshipping God with such lack of sincerity....' That day my friend and I mocked him like this: 'At least go to a good university, and you're retaking exams....' That senior is probably close to fifty by now. I'm sure he worried a lot then. 'That red-faced kid needs to believe in Jesus and become a proper human...,' 'Senior, I'm sorry. Though I am lacking now, I live for the Lord and desire to die for the Lord. See you in heaven.'

The lion of the savanna does not run at just any time. Its top speed in a moment is incredibly fast, but with its large body it cannot run as long as other herbivores. But when a chance comes, it gives all it has. And once it catches, it never lets go. Friday evening is the beginning of the revival meeting. If you want to recover your first love and desire a true encounter with God, please attend. And please have your other friends attend as well. Love in the Lord.

Recently, have you heard from someone about repenting, recovering your first love, and overcoming? This is far too clear and cannot be replaced by anything else—it is the most important story. Furthermore, this is not comparable to mere pleasant greetings or advice but is directly connected to the problem of your relationship with Jesus and life itself: 'Where is my interest and affection flowing?' Blessed is the one who hears the voice of God that they should hear. Blessed is the one who has someone to say such things to them. 'But I hold this against you: You have forsaken your first love. Consider how far you have fallen! Repent and do the things you did at first. If you do not repent, I will come to you and remove your lampstand from its place.' -Revelation 2:4,5
Loyalty is not choosing people you like and keeping them beside you. Because He called us to love, we look only to the Lord and cover all people with the heart the Lord gave us.
They say praise makes even whales dance. Love makes flowers bloom even on dry thorns and dead stumps. Rather than stopping at a life where flowers bloom, become a life that makes flowers bloom.

They say praise makes even whales dance. If you want to see a greater miracle than a dancing whale, it is to give yourself and love. In His prayer the day before the cross, Jesus asked the Father to make them one as He and the Father are one. If through loving and forgiving and being bound together by that bond you have become one, the Lord's miracle has already begun.
'O Lord, my strength and my fortress, I love you, Lord, my strength.' -Prayer 7:30
Not great power, but if you are not rude and patient, most of our problems will be healed. 1 Corinthians 13

I see how one person's transformation not only changes their family and friends, but also serves as a pillar in the body of Christ. You will also come to realize that worship and the people you once met were of the highest value to you. This means that later you will realize that this worship given to me in measure and these co-laborers were truly dream-like worship and beloved people to me, and you will regret that more could have been offered. Therefore, we must love so intensely that we cannot give more. Now.

Each moment is important. It is because it is life. When we are together, man is not glorified and Jesus is the protagonist. Since we meet and share life, and these times are truly precious and invaluable yet irreplaceable, we must be all the more grateful.

Koreans will not hesitate to immigrate for their children's education. Yet they are so busy with support that they are stingy with actually being together with their children and building relationships. It is like cooking rice for someone and giving it to a dog. More precious than academic achievement is the child as a life itself.
Brother Han's tearful final visit to Keum Chul. I return tomorrow. My final words were 'Jesus saved the brother!' There is nothing but Jesus. Only Jesus...
If everything has been done to no avail, there is one remaining thing not yet done. That is returning to the Lord. So come Home running, His arms are open wide
Do not try to surpass my limitations; rather, I must remain in Jesus. Jesus is not one who fills our limitations. It is His presence, not achievement.
Asking something of a faithful and leading person is not to squeeze them harder. The only request is to draw near to the Lord and love Him more.

Putting down the burden of dedication seems to guarantee much productivity. Soon you will see how the rest gained from abandoning faithfulness becomes utterly meaningless. If performance and efficiency were the goal, God would have made us Terminators or cattle. Faith is not efficiency but relationship. Please remain in the Lord.

To rest in this harsh world, you must have skill. Without skill, you will always be chased. You give gold for what is empty and spend silver for what is futile. This skill does not mean influence in the world. True skill is intimacy with the Lord, that eternal power.

The brothers wanted to kill Joseph not as their brother but as their father's son, 'your son.' But when Joseph forgave his wounded brothers as family, God's salvation came upon all people. The people next to me, my co-laborers, are angel-like people whom God Himself sent to love. When those people become 'my brother' instead of 'your son,' recovery, healing, and salvation occur. It is not that forgiveness becomes love, but because we love, forgiveness happens. Love with all your heart the people God has placed beside you. This is what God earnestly desires of me in this very moment and what He asks of me. But when this son of yours who has squandered your property with prostitutes comes home, you kill the fattened calf for him!' - Luke 15:30 / The older brother's perception of the prodigal son They took the ornamented robe back to their father and said, "We found this. Examine it to see whether it is your son's robe." -Genesis 37:32 / The brothers' perception of Joseph is not ashamed to call them brothers - Hebrews 2:11 / Jesus' perception of us

In marathons or cycling races, even with so many people running, they don't tangle and fall. The reason is their goal is the same. If they were to go different paths, it would become like an egg scramble right from the start. A good community is spreading and rooting the words below in the center of every soul. Persistently, without compromise, continuing to ignore... Not that I have already obtained it or have already been made perfect, but I press on to make it my own, because Christ Jesus has made me His own. Brethren, I do not regard myself as having laid hold of it yet; but one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and reaching forward to what lies ahead, I press on toward the goal for the prize of the upward call of God in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 3:12-14
Do not fear that you no longer have glamorous relationships. Rather, you should fear that your relationship with sincere God grows thin.

In chemistry, there is a chain reaction. The preceding reaction triggers the following reaction. People typically call this an Explosion. Iron sharpens iron. When faithful people and those answered by Jesus are put together, a chain reaction of revival occurs and becomes even more passionate. What kind of trigger do the people beside me now give to me?
I must advance to the depth that merits peace. That is losing myself before the Lord's great love in an empty room with no one else.
There are those who want to be welcomed and those who welcome. They look similar, but the results are as different as heaven and earth. Welcome, and you will be welcomed.

There is no way to live without repentance. Without 'seeking and seeking the Lord with effort,' His presence does not come automatically. It is ultimately a battle of whether Jesus is there or merely seems to be. If Jesus is in me, the problem ends there.

A humanist's best is 'I will take responsibility and go forward.' God did not call us to take responsibility. He calls us to approach Jesus, who will be responsible for us eternally, to rely on Him, and to give us the position to enable others to trust Him completely. We cannot be responsible even for ourselves, much less for other people. Please commit everything only to the Lord.

Often when we want to prove our love, we give extravagant gifts and plan events to move people. Yet all of this can be imitated momentarily. However, 'sharing pain' and 'continuously sympathizing with that pain unchanged' can never be imitated. Becoming one makes his pain my pain.

It is family that gives strength in difficult moments. Today, watching Gilchak rehearsal, I deeply realize that each and every one of our family members is precious to me. When I think of precious people, the desire to step back changes to the desire to love even unto death. Beloved people are given 'the strength to begin again.' For beloved people, the price of loss and damage is not wasted.
On days too difficult, it is enough to know that we can return to Jesus and that the Lord embraces us as we are. Jesus gave everything.

There is a saying 'a kite with a broken string.' Because the person or force that supported one's back has fallen from power, they can no longer provide convenience. Separation is simple. These strings should break, and breaking is actually a blessing. Just remain connected to Jesus, the vine. Become a kite with a broken string, settle down, and become a branch attached to the Lord.

*When unavoidably changing churches: 1. If possible, maintain good relationships. 2. Do not act when angry; act when you can bless. 3. In the midst of this, do not forget that the Lord asked for my change, not the church's change. 4. When your mission and your life conflict, seek the Lord's will. Do you still have remaining tasks, or is my supply of grace urgent right now? 5. At least pray for a place that secures continuous grace supply and opportunity to serve. Never be buried among the multitude.
In fear and anxiety, what is needed is not logic and persuasion. Even if understanding comes, unease does not leave. What is truly essential is intimacy. Ah, the Father is with me! That is enough.
For me, the happiest moment is when the Lord makes me weep.
When I cannot lose the Lord even if I lose everything else, the Lord is truly with me.
Faith is giving your heart to the Lord.
What do you wish me to do for you? Show me your desire. By this I know your faith. What you truly desire is myself.

Many people pray, desiring that I would support and love them. As prayer deepens, eventually the thought comes that it is okay even if everyone turns away from me. Because Jesus alone is sufficient. After receiving this answer, other relationships are also resolved. If you cling, you will lose.

Anyone can be deceived for a moment, but not for long. If there is no intimacy with God, you will do well. Only for a very short while. And the collapse will be severe. Please make time for the Lord, speak with Him, and trust. That is what will save me.

Please value gatherings. From youth until now, I have never failed to value gatherings. Gatherings are faithfulness, and those who are not faithful, no matter how excellent in ability and gifts, are not used by God.

Those who like me do so as long as conditions match. Liking means current decaying conditions are temporarily satisfying. But love is unchanging and rather tolerates and covers countless faults and shortcomings. Love is a gift poured out because you have decided to sacrifice for the soul the Lord gave, not for decaying and changing conditions. I love you.

Walking down the street and praying at a corner, or at an incredibly busy desk confessing alone 'I trust in the Lord!' with fervor, or desperately appealing with only the intensity in my eyes for the Lord's help amid unbearable pressure—the Lord sees and hears it all. The Lord cannot turn away from us whom He has redeemed by His Son's cross and blood.

*Self-diagnosis: Focus on 'What the Lord did on the cross' rather than 'Who am I?' Focus more on 'Who is He?' rather than 'What have I done?' People who focus on 'themselves' will rather encounter 'relationship' problems. Becoming aggressive through inferiority complex or avoiding through victim mentality. If the lens is defective, the photograph of the subject appears distorted.

*Prayer tips for your spouse! 1. Wherever they are now, fill them with the Holy Spirit, and if they do not believe, guide them to the path of faith. 2. When you meet, open your eyes so emotions do not lead you astray or reason does not make you calculate. 3. Make me attracted to them and lovable, so I discover what others cannot see inside, and I too become that meaning to that person.

Sometimes you need to eat purely what your loved one gives without separate calculation. When you receive love from your beloved, healing happens and the Lord remembers. Only what is done in love counts. Love is the purpose and meaning.
If the destination is the same, you will eventually meet everyone. Those who make the Lord supreme and advance toward Him will ultimately become excellent co-laborers to each other.
Do not blame others; I must repent and turn from my sin. The problem is in the first person. When I change, it will become a good community.

A quack explains with difficulty, treats complicatedly, costs much, and the illness is slow to heal. A skilled doctor diagnoses accurately, explains simply according to the patient's level of understanding, and treats boldly. Simply put, my failure to love the Lord is the cause of all my problems.

It is not because I lack willpower but because I do not love the Lord. If you love the Lord, you must make time and kneel. Jesus told Peter to stay awake and pray lest he fall into temptation. Without prayer, everything we eat, drink, and breathe belongs to the devil.

Gathering much of what the pig ate is not success. Even when that falls away and one hungers, blessed is the one who remembers the father's house and turns back. Rather than slowly and gradually perish without dying, recognize vanity and quickly turn back.

A flower is beautiful because the flower is within me. Yet sometimes we must direct our steps to where flowers are blooming. Blooming flowers cause the flowers within us to also bloom. There are flowers and filth within people. What responds depends on what we encounter. Be with good people.

*What is needed after the greatest grace: Mary received the greatest grace that the angel could confirm. Yet that grace becomes anxiety due to human circumstances and customs. When she met Elizabeth through long, difficult mountain paths, she receives confirmation again through unexpected welcome. "The mother of my Lord..." What is needed after receiving grace is continuous confirmation through God's people and His Word.

*In the wilderness, shortcuts do not work. Only the Lord's presence was the way of life. But in Canaan, one could live to some degree through sowing and trading. That is when idols entered. Living well without His presence—that is great sin.
A helpless sheep's only competitiveness is 'fellowship' with the shepherd. You must live filled with the Holy Spirit. Awake and pray.

Do you love me? Peter, who denied the Lord, hesitantly says he loves Him. Now it is not by his own strength and boasting, but only when the Lord's sovereignty permits, and only in the grace of the Lord that I am by His grace, that this love is accomplished. So no one can boast. Love is here, so it is not that we have loved God...

*A difficult but necessary conversation: When you fall in love, change always occurs. Both you and others know it. To the Ephesian church that did not compromise and kept the gospel, endured persecution, the Lord says He has something to rebuke. It is that they abandoned their first love. The Lord considered that most important. Pretending to 'believe' and 'love' and going through spiritual life is a serious illness. You must become honest and sincere. I hope you examine what you truly desire as central in your time use and attention. You may not truly, passionately love the Lord. If you do not have private intimate times with the Lord and do not pay the price of sacrifice, you must acknowledge that your love has grown cold. What marriage exists in the world without private times of intimacy? That greatly insults the Bridegroom Jesus.

*The Importance of Meetings: Meetings are truly important. Through that meeting, you are influenced as to where you will place your value and live, and when life's purpose is corrected, your entire life and eternal dwelling place are determined. What is your hope, joy, and crown of boasting? When He comes again, are you not before our Lord Jesus? You are our glory and joy. - 1 Thessalonians 2:19-20
Fullness: Drinking living water puts an end to the party. It says that everyone who drinks this water will be thirsty again. The water Jesus gives becomes a spring of water welling up to eternal life. Those who do not have the eternal spring have no choice but to drink the rotten salt water of the world. What those who drink from the world prove is that they are not drinking Jesus. If we stop the stubbornness of claiming to know Jesus while being friends with the world, and become honest that we did so because we didn't have the Lord, the Lord will save us.

An overflowing life. There is a way to obtain by envying, lying about, and taking what has not been given, and there is a way to receive and enjoy an overflowing life as a bountiful gift. When you trust, you will not only be at peace but also become abundant.

The greatness of Psalm 23. It is not that the LORD became my shepherd because I have no lack. It is because God is the shepherd that there is no lack. When we move forward as children of God, there is truly no lack. Identity is power.

The ability to give living water. A person who has never tasted living water can never give living water. They have no choice but to only speak about living water and throw stones. He who believes in me, as the Scripture has said,

Gifts. A representative misunderstanding about gifts is confusing them with God's love. Since gifts are to reinforce the function of serving the community, they bear abundant fruit when forming correct relationships and uniting with fellow believers.

Please, give what is needed. If you are only busy trying to give souls what they want, it will inevitably become an awkward ballroom dance in outdated clothes. You must supply what is needed, not what is wanted. Only Jesus can fill the thirst and emptiness for which they themselves do not know the reason. Jesus said,
The reason why you feel empty despite working hard. All power, meaning, and value of existence come from relationships. Seek Him.
Seek the beauty of the Lord to the point of being dry. The more you do, the more you live the most abundant life.

The reason faith becomes difficult - The Zeroth Law of Spirit-dynamics. If you are not full, you will be influenced. Now thanks be to God who always leads us in triumph in Christ, and through us diffuses the fragrance of His knowledge in every place. -2 Corinthians 2:12
How to win easily. It is being full of the spirit of worship. Then worship becomes a thrill. When worship comes alive, you don't need to force anything, and you will experience a
work. When you are full, you will become powerful.
The power of the earthen vessel. The best thing an earthen vessel can do is contain. This is called receptivity. It means that when you contain and accept
who is the treasure, you become the most powerful being.

Influence. Influence occurs when there is a clear difference. Just as a dam generates immense electricity when high water falls, when a person in the deep presence of God serves and humbles themselves, they can become a

A full victory. If you only feed someone enough to barely survive and then make them box in a ring, they will undoubtedly struggle and return half-dead every round. It would be very foolish to then counsel them on how to win. The power is in sustaining yourself to remain full.

The best way to waste time is not to pray. Because when you aren't full, you always react to unnecessary things. From the moment you lose focus, it becomes lost time. For some, it might be a lost year, and for others, it could be a lost 20 years.

If you don't pray, you are dragged along. If you don't pray, others will decide your life. Prayer is the best way for me to live out my own life. Pray fully and raise the water level of grace. Please do not ignore that easy method. Fullness is always the issue.
The reason for being called. Do not just subsist, live eternally. Eternal life means winning with the fullness of life in every area.

Delighting in the Lord is the key to everything. The compulsion to commit sin leaves, and there is the happiness of entering deep into the Lord's presence. That means becoming a new being. It refers to a thirst that the greed of the world and the desires of the flesh can never satisfy, but only God can fill.

The reason for godliness. A doctor washing their hands multiple times before surgery is not trying to become holy alone. It is to save lives. Stay with the Lord and be godly. Only then can life and change come, right?
The fundamentals of faith. The beginning and the end are surprisingly simple. It is to fill yourself with Jesus without any gaps.
To love the Lord, you must be filled with only Jesus without any gaps. To love the Lord, you must be full of the Holy Spirit.

You must not be bound. So that the Lord's blessings spring up within me, I too must be generous and release and let them flow according to the abundance and mercy of the Giver. Then He pours out even newer grace and blessings.
If the anointing is there, everyone can know; if it is not, the person feels that emptiness to the bone.
The same environment, a completely different life. It is living fully. It is ministering fully. It is loving fully. It is giving thanks fully. Hell will change and become heaven.

A topic for repentance. Let us repent for not being zealous. Not being zealous means there is no passion, and having no passion means not being full. The greatest sin is not having the Lord and filling yourself with other things. Therefore, the command to be zealous and the command to repent are the same. What harms a relationship of love is not lack or mistakes, but boredom and indifference. You must not squeeze it out; it must overflow.
-Revelation 3:19
Change is entirely God's sovereign work and a miracle. More amazingly, He continuously holds and protects that change. It is the Lord's love and mercy, deeper and wider than human understanding.

Do not be satisfied with the grace poured upon you; please long for the grace that wells up and overflows within you. Do not live only on grace received through others, but live with a heart for which Jesus alone is enough. See you at the Saturday meeting.
Thank you for being insufficient. In me, the Lord becomes perfect.

What is clear is the fact that there will always be a deficiency in every moment of our lives. When that lack and slow progress are interpreted not as a handicap but as an opportunity, God's glory appears. Rather than the path not being open now, He has given a little more opportunity to serve the Lord and the believers before becoming incredibly busy. Now, when you have time, you must become someone who is more faithful and prepared.
If you are criticized, admit it. The more your lack and weakness are visible, the more you should say you need the Lord. We are beings who need the Lord's grace every time our heart beats.
The anointing in ministry is often simply participating in what the Lord and coworkers have already done. If it wasn't me, what does my insufficiency have to do with the Lord's work?

Try to love rather than just doing ministry. The God we believe in is a God of relationship. I hope you become a person with the power of staying in His presence rather than just doing well, a person strong in God's grace.

Life moves and expresses itself. The Lord's love is life. That abundant love is limited within us. As long as we do not give our freedom to express it, the Lord has still decided to be limited by us. Rest and enjoyment are the beginning of bearing fruit. The Lord does it.

Chain reaction. Gratitude comes from a contented heart. If you are thankful, you will not quarrel but be at peace and become abundant. Therefore, if you are content, thankful, and peaceful, it proves that you are in the One who gives you strength.
-Philippians 4:13

There are various difficult factors and trials in faith. There are two ways to walk that path: either go while being full, or barely make it. Environmental problems can be solved by being full, but poverty of the soul is not solved by the environment. Simply be full.
Weakness is the true power that allows one to experience the strong power of Christ.
-2 Corinthians 12:9

A British man was crossing the Atlantic to America in difficult circumstances. Whenever it was mealtime, this poor man had to go up to the deck alone to eat cheese and biscuits, and soon even these ran out, leaving him so hungry he couldn't stand. The captain asked why he went up to the deck every mealtime, and the man explained he had no money. Captain:
This British man was so happy he ran to the dining room and ate. He arrived in America after that final meal. Jesus paid it all on the cross.

If you give children a candy and a check for 100 million won, they pick the candy. It's because they are young. When they grow up, they choose the 100 million won. Because within the 100 million won is the candy they can eat until they die. Everything is inside Jesus.

How much you have doesn't mean much. What matters is whose hand you are held in. The small child's two fish and five loaves of bread were nothing, but in Jesus' hands, they became a miracle that fed 5,000 people. Please entrust your insufficient life to the Lord. The Lord's grace will be sufficient.
Influence is overflowing. It is not squeezing it out.

If water comes out well next door but not at your house, it's not a Thames Water problem. It's supplied sufficiently, but your pipe is the problem. If faith is the problem, you cannot receive the supply. Have good faith.

If you are satisfied with Jesus alone, you gain composure and fear retreats. In Jesus, every evaluation will be reinterpreted. It is a full life and there is no lack. A person fascinated by Jesus is the most beautiful person, and He will vindicate such a person.

Why do Christians live in the world without power? First reason: because they think of God's grace as just fire insurance... God's grace fills you with more power than Daniel or John the Baptist. What is needed in every field is grace.
Love is.... Love is not a resolution. That is why we cannot do it by our own strength. Love is what fills my inside. That is why I always think of it, and eventually, it moves me.

We are His workmanship (Eph 2:10). We are God's masterpiece, a one-and-only work of art, God's poem, and God's letter. When I become myself, the power God bestowed flows out. You must not become someone else; you must be yourself. That is the freedom that comes when finding myself in God.

We are the body of Jesus. The head and the body are never separated. Just as my head is Kim Hwa-seong, my body is also Kim Hwa-seong. We are partakers of the divine nature and the fullness of Jesus. Therefore, the power to rule dwells within us. I hope you never give up that authority.

The power of giving everything. Why is there no power? Because you only give a part. Simply give your whole life. Everyone is afraid when told to give everything. They think they can't go on trips and there will be no fun. That's right. You won't be able to go on the trips you used to go on, and your fun will be gone. Instead, there will be trips and joy with coworkers prepared by the Lord. Even if you go to the same Scotland, who you go with is more important.

Do you know where the crisis in our life comes from? Is it money, the opposite sex, despair, pride, or laziness? The biggest crisis is because 'the Lord alone is not enough,' in other words, 'because there is no faith.' If you are not satisfied with Jesus alone, no matter what you do or what you have, it will only be insufficient. If it's insufficient, you become greedy, and if you are greedy, you do evil. When God becomes the shepherd, not only is there no lack, but the life becomes one where the cup overflows. - Psalm 23

The most powerful recovery. God's Word must flow. It must be Word that overflows. When God's Word flows into my life, I am sufficiently happy even without filling it with other things. This is because the peace of relationships and the fulfillment of mission occur naturally. The person who fulfills the Lord's will is the one who experiences the most powerful recovery. I do not fulfill the mission; the mission fulfills me.

Even if you combine all relationships among humans—couples, teacher and student, parent and child, friends who would die for each other—it is barely an analogy for our relationship with God, and there is no way to fully express that oneness and perfection. Because there is nothing of a similar level to God's love.
The happiest moment in life is not when being recognized. It is when laying that recognition down at the feet of the Lord.

A natural person has many things to discard. Foolish things, things that react sensitively, things that make me and others suffer must be discarded, but it is not easy. However, after growing up, one puts away childish things. Love makes us, who are young, complete and allows us to have the same perspective as the Lord. 1 Corinthians 13:11-12 KRV:
After growing up, one puts away childish things and sees clearly face to face what was seen dimly. To grow means to be changed, and that happens when perfect love is achieved.

The biggest misconception young people have is the illusion that they will be happy if someone gives them a cool and perfect love. Humans become unhappy from the moment they want to be loved. You become happy when you exist in God's love and give love. Do not hang on to receiving love and be lonely; please receive God's great love and give and fill others with love.
It's really good, beyond words... looking at the Lord... I am truly happy.

If sin and repentance are repeated, you are always walking in the same place. If you walk by the Spirit, you will not fulfill the lust of the flesh. It's because the Spirit does not tolerate it and gives you the power to win and rule. Please receive the fullness of the Holy Spirit and the power of self-control.
The good thing about a person who dwells in the Lord is that they have nothing more to lose. You, who have nothing to lose, will continue to be filled.
When walking with the Lord, two representative powers appear. 1. Bearing much fruit. 2. Being able to do anything in the Lord. - John 15:5

While it is right to praise with lifted hands because of the joy the Lord gives, if you exalt the Lord with all your heart and mind, He gives boundless joy. When the Holy Spirit comes, He gives joy, power, and a heart of obedience, but if you believe He will do so and obey and move forward in faith, He also pours out fullness.
God fills those who confess that they will die if they must.

Who I am today is not because of gender, level of education, background, or family lineage, but only by the grace of God. That means the power to live more beautifully and excellently is already within me. Grace does not only mean going to heaven after death. Grace is power, and grace is 'Jesus-fullness' where the Lord gives Himself directly to us.

When an underground water pipe is cut off and the water pressure disappears, underground water from the soil seeps into the cracks of the corroded pipe. So, after the water is cut off, when tap water is supplied again, muddy water comes out. If you are not full of Jesus and take no action, you will become a life that supplies muddy water to people expecting living water. Maintain holy water pressure.
I bless our friends in faith. I believe I have such a blessing. Because God loves us and the youth need it. If it is needed, He pours it out.

The characteristic of an earthen vessel is that it has no value in itself, is easily broken, and crucially has no options other than its unique function of containing. If you contain the treasure fully, that is victory. You can leave the rest under His sovereignty.

Obsessing means there is dissatisfaction. It is a lack of fulfillment. It's because you aren't filled. It is a representative symptom that appears when you are not satisfied with the Lord and do not live in Him.

When you hire a car, you must fill it back up as much as you used. Of course, since there's no need to put more in, you match it exactly. But for your own car, you just fill it full. You aren't just going to ride it for a day or two, are you? You must fill your soul fully with grace and become a life that overflows. Since we're going to go for a lifetime anyway...

Like the lyrics of a hymn, the world is full of worries and piles of deathly things. The way to dramatically reduce these anxieties and worries is to die for the Lord. He who seeks to die will live forever.

The days of youth will certainly disappear. However, the thrill and tears of those days remaining in the heart do not disappear. Therefore, youth must sow. Even if you cry... even if you fall, tumble, or get pushed aside... still, even if you have to crawl, you must go and sow. In the time of youth, success is not success and failure is not failure.

Almost all problems young people face are things that would be solved by being full. It's not that things are broken, they are just turned off. If I am not full of Jesus, it's correct to see it as already being in a state of severe trial. You will sin, hate, become discouraged, and feel anxious for no reason.

Even if it looks shabby or flimsy, if the Lord does not give it, nothing is received. Therefore, you must make the most of everything you have received. You can do all things in Him who gives strength.

The peace that wells up in my heart is a treasure buried deep. Who can dig out and take my treasure? I am at peace. Peace, peace, it comes down from heaven. Let that wave of love cover my soul forever. (Hymn 469)
Christians don't need to pretend to be strong. If discovered in the Lord, you naturally become strong.

Specifically, the reason He gives mothers an earnest heart to love children is because raising a life requires such a great payment and sacrifice. To shed those tears of great sacrifice joyfully and go on without getting exhausted, 'that love' is needed. One who has received the Father's heart releases heavenly miracles on this earth.

There is the pipe theory. It functions as a channel to deliver important things. However, Christians must go one step further. Do not stop at being a pipe; you must be a living branch. If you block the bad and let the good flow, you save everyone and you, the branch, also come alive. The faith of a living branch is not a mechanical religious life. That is why we do not trade with the Lord, we pray.
I am still thirsty, I must continue to run, and I have no choice but to continue pursuing the Lord.
God is the one who fills us. But He is not one who fills greed, but one who fills needs. More often than we think, the Lord tests us through finances. Where is your heart?

Piling up trash in the living room and catching flies is not a fundamental solution. Covering it with a nice blanket or spraying perfume is also not the solution. The trash must be cleared (repentance) and filled with what is precious (Jesus). Do not struggle to remove the results of sin (bugs), but just be full of good things (Jesus).
A person full of God's power is not hurried or chased. Rather, it is a life that gives challenges and pursues.
God's Word enables us to be equipped with everything and to have the power to do good. - 2 Timothy 3:17
God's life comes from intimacy with Him.

God's intention is peace. He makes us obtain life and live an abundant life. He gave us authorities to give such blessings. That is God's law. Getting close to authority is the secret to receiving blessings. God always works through authorities.

If God said one day He would give you a great reward and comfort, your expectations would be really high. You'd let your imagination run wild—a good car, a house, a wonderful spouse, and so on. But if He said that the great reward and comfort was giving you Himself, would you be disappointed? Or would you be more joyful? If an 'Ugh...' comes out when He says He's giving you Himself, you're far off.

I hope you do not get discouraged because there is nothing specific to do. Can't you find the people associated with you and pray for them, bless them, and forgive them? These things are not power that started from my own strength and ability, but power that comes from a heart God poured in.
Do not try to overcome your limits, but try to dwell in Jesus. Jesus is one who is not bound by limits. Presence over achievement.

The one who fills the empty soul is the Lord. You can be lonely even if it's not that you don't believe in the Lord. That is because it is a process of coming out of darkness and moving into the light.

There are people who try to use a cell phone for a week after charging it once. After 3 or 4 days, they say KakaoTalk doesn't work and FB doesn't work. It's not that they don't work, it's turned off. Faith doesn't just stop working, it gets turned off. That is why you must always be full. Only then can you overcome sin and trials.

What if it hadn't rained when David was sinning and he hadn't seen Bathsheba bathing? He would still sin. Because his state was already a state of sin. Not being full of the Lord is already high treason. Someday the sun will rise, temptation will come, and trials will be faced. What's important is what you are full of inside. There is no vacuum in the world. You are bound to be full of something.

I see you. There is nothing to be gained from a dried-up well, yet humans are the ones who keep going and peeking, only to return empty-handed, suffering and lonely. Life is not happy because what should be there isn't, and what shouldn't be there is. What should be there is Jesus, and what shouldn't be there are the many things trying to fill the emptiness—the trash. I am not trash. The Lord never creates trash.
If I reduce the time spent praying, praising, and listening to the Word, it seems my life would be more abundant and efficient. No. Life does not become abundant; rather, it becomes destitute.
The only competitiveness for a powerless sheep is 'walking together' with the shepherd. You can only live by being full of the Holy Spirit. Stay awake and pray.

The most delicious ramen? Kkoko? Nagasaki? Shin? Anseong? Neoguri? Ramen eaten when hungry? When someone else cooked it and you get to have one bite! It doesn't matter what ramen it is. It's when there is my hunger, a longing for ramen, gratitude for being allowed one bite, and the fullness of that one bite. It's not good because it's good, but the poverty of my spirit makes me pursue the best things.
If the Word flows, you live. Therefore, you must pray and strive so the Word can flow. When it overflows and comes in, and overflows and goes out, the work of life happens.

To a poor person, everything tastes good no matter what you give them. A person with a poor spirit feels the Lord's love in everything and becomes thankful. That is why that person is blessed. If life tastes good, how can you not be happy?

If you love someone, it's natural to be interested in that person's interests, tastes, and efforts. To someone who is an amateur in that field, it's nothing and seems to have no meaning, but if it's related to the person you love, you remember it and cherish its meaning. You can love Him as much as you know Him.
If you want to be served, you will surely be distressed. Rather, if you serve and treat others well, you will be joyful. That joy comes from heaven.

No matter how hard a vessel tries, it cannot become a treasure. It becomes a treasure when you put jewels in the vessel. Become a person who contains Jesus. There will be a glory on a different dimension than those who decorated a vessel with luxury brands.

The goal is going to college, and after admission, it's getting a job, and after a job, it's marriage, and after marriage, the goal is living above others. It's a machine. If you live with such goals, you dry up and live like a tin can. Not a single drop of blood comes out if you're pricked with a needle. I wish you would shed tears when you see someone pricked with a needle as if it were yourself.
Prayer is not about filling what I want. Jesus knows our needs, but He wants to give the most important thing—Jesus Himself. That is why prayer must grow.

Will my God supply all your needs according to Wall Street, the banking system, economic conditions, and what the unemployment rate is? No. 'And my God shall supply all your need according to His riches in glory by Christ Jesus' (Phil 4:19). Faith and thoughts that do not allow God to be God are all evil. God alone is only God.

You try to determine happiness by looking at your possessions. You are a person who lives by bread alone. Determine happiness by grace, mission, and God's filling. You are a person who lives by the Word. I pray that you become a life that goes looking toward the Lord's filling, rather than a life that worries and anxieties over finding needs. Pursuit of mission, pursuit of the Word.

In the One who gives me strength, you become thankful and praise even when enduring everything. It is a heart of contentment that is impossible to even understand from the world's perspective. The world cannot handle such a person.

Most people are frustrated because their needs and wants do not match. What they want is not what is needed, and what is absolutely needed is not what they want. If these two match, amazing things happen. Only Jesus fills my needs and my wants at the same time.
Impression without expression causes depression.
If your chest is cold, it's because you've put on other clothes. A person clothed with Jesus has a heart warm enough with Jesus alone. If you follow vain things, your heart will continue to be cold.

Thirst is not just quenched. You must dig the ground. It's not that it happens just because you dig hard. Living water comes out when you dig the ground the Lord told you to dig. Sometimes it might be a rock, and sometimes it might be a land retreated to after being chased by people of the world, but if Jesus is there, the living water continues. I hope you are servants of faith who can dispose of everything to gain Jesus.

If you look at the root of pain, it meets with your own greed. We have covetousness for what we cannot have and claim rights to what the Lord has not given. We are thieves and greedy people. If you are not satisfied with what you've been given, you become a glutton who is hungry no matter how much you eat. What can fill me is not the splendor of relationships or the abundance of material things. 'Tolle Lege, Tolle Lege'—the words neighborhood children said while playing, 'Pick up and read.' At those words, Augustine read the book of Romans and was changed. Only the Lord can fill me.

A Christian stirring coffee at Starbucks is parting the Red Sea... (omitted)... I don't love only when I am strong or perfect. There is a saying, 'Women leave when they have nothing to give a man, and men leave when they have nothing to get from a woman.' Is true love really like that? When was the time you felt intense love for your parents? It wasn't when they gave you something. You feel the greatest love when they want to give you good things but feel distressed because they don't have them.

A thirsty person seeks living water. Do you know what a person who has drunk living water wants? It's to become even thirstier. Being thirstier so the living water doesn't stop. It's being so parched for seeking the Lord that it cannot be stopped.
Reconciliation_and_Unity: Never tear down the altar. 'They have torn down Your altars and killed Your prophets with the sword' - 1 Kings 19:14. 1. It was because of the altar that sinful humans could approach God. 2. Also, a holy God spoke to inadequate humans through prophets. 3. Tearing down the altar and killing the prophets was a satanic strategy and a clever sin seeking total (two-way) disconnection from God. 4. Preventing people from coming to the throne of grace through the cross and blocking them from receiving mercy and grace is exactly what Satan wants. 5. Therefore, any ministry or pursuit lacking the blood of the cross is effectively an own goal. [cite: 2480, 2482]
God sent me here, He will send me there. But don't feel badly, don't blame yourselves for selling me. God was behind it. God sent me here ahead of you to save lives - Genesis 45:5 [cite: 2483]

Dwell in the light. Dwelling in the light does not mean becoming sterilized by being 'good.' It means coming into the light and living while confessing sins without hiding anything. Then He will cleanse us from all unrighteousness. Darkness refers to living while hiding. Repentance is power. 'But if we walk in the light as He is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus Christ His Son cleanses us from all sin.' - 1 John 1:7 [cite: 2484]
The one who wins. If you truly want to win, you must forgive. [cite: 2484]

Just as you are. God does not say, 'If you change your behavior, I will accept you.' The moment I turn back, He accepts me just as I am. [cite: 2485] Believers change their lives not to obtain salvation, but because they have been saved. [cite: 2485] To the woman caught in adultery, Jesus said, 'I do not condemn you.' [cite: 2485] And He says, 'Go and sin no more.' [cite: 2486] True change is not about a few external modifications, but a reaction from a sincere heart toward the Lord's love that accepted me just as I am. [cite: 2486] He said, 'I don’t condemn you. Go, and sin no more.' [cite: 2487]

The power of simplicity. Simplicity is much harder than complexity. [cite: 2488] Because clear thinking is not something just anyone can do. [cite: 2488] I hope you discard the lie that you are a victim and accept the mission of being a healer. [cite: 2488] Love is restoration. [cite: 2489]

The amazing secret of the precious blood. A characteristic of the few people who excel at languages is that they acquire the language within a context. [cite: 2490] Although Jesus is the one who shed the blood, the one who sprinkles the blood must be me, like Moses and the Israelites observing the Passover. [cite: 2490] I will tell you the secret. [cite: 2490] Confessing in detail before the Lord how you feel tempted by sin and how you fall is sprinkling the blood. [cite: 2491] I hope you sprinkle it well. [cite: 2491] It will be washed well. [cite: 2492]

True salvation is needed. Salvation is not about suddenly getting money or having a problem you were agonizing over solved. [cite: 2493] Salvation comes when you receive forgiveness of sins and are forgiven. [cite: 2493] Therefore, in the midst of a collapse, you do not hold onto people but go to God. [cite: 2494]
The reason for reconciliation. Be reconciled. The Lord is near. - Philippians 4:5 [cite: 2495]
There is no discrimination in the Gospel. Whether Jew or Greek, even if it is a life at rock bottom according to human evaluations. [cite: 2495]

Partial things are bound to disappear when the perfect comes. [cite: 2496] When you know partially, you condemn, but when you come to know the whole, you forgive and show mercy. [cite: 2496] 'Ah! So that's why, how hard it must have been, it must have hurt a lot!' [cite: 2496] When acting out while knowing just a little, everyone condemns. [cite: 2497] Satan works through condemnation. [cite: 2497] However, when a whole person comes, they save lives. [cite: 2497] They forgive. [cite: 2497] Love is responding to the whole. [cite: 2498]

The clear fact is that you can be united with the Lord as much as you have forgiven and as much as you have loved. [cite: 2499] There are no other religious activities that can replace this. [cite: 2499]

Whether being criticized or praised, it is hard to say that is my essence. [cite: 2500] Conversely, the judgment I make toward others is also the same. [cite: 2500] We know partially and speak partially. [cite: 2500] Only in the Lord do I know who I am. [cite: 2501] I am one loved by God and one who has been cleansed by the blood of His Son. [cite: 2501]

Satan's attempt to condemn us through hidden, secret sins is an attempt to say 'I am a worthless being.' [cite: 2502] However, those regrettable mistakes of mine conversely prove that I was wounded, angry, and especially lonely. [cite: 2502] Satan uses this to try and stop us from going before the Lord by any means, making us doubt and hide alone, but the Lord conversely loves us more, forgives us, and has mercy on us. [cite: 2503] What I truly need and must uniquely have is His love, because He paid the price sufficiently on the cross. [cite: 2504]
The greatest gift one can give to a person is forgiveness. [cite: 2505] God gives the grace of forgiveness before opening a new history. [cite: 2505]

A person is never changed just because their mistakes were pointed out. [cite: 2506] On the contrary, true change occurs when they are forgiven. [cite: 2506] Jesus came to forgive and soaked us, who were like dry nails in His heart, with His precious blood. [cite: 2506] I can live today because there were people who accepted me, and especially because there was Jesus. [cite: 2507]

People who support slavery. Slavery refers to the barbaric prejudice of determining a person's status based only on the skin color I prefer or dislike, regardless of the person's character and the image and nature bestowed by God. [cite: 2508] If you recklessly judge a soul with prejudice, it is not much different from supporting slavery. [cite: 2508] Every soul is a life for which Jesus bore the cross. [cite: 2509]

Forgiveness. Forgiveness is not so much about being kind-hearted as it is about something I must do if I am to live. [cite: 2510] The Lord clearly said: if you do not forgive, you will not be forgiven, and with the judgment you make, you also will be judged. [cite: 2510] However, mercy will triumph over judgment and boast. [cite: 2511]

In the past, when offering sacrifices, one had to catch a cow, a sheep, or at least a goat. [cite: 2512] However, to us who lived thoroughly in darkness and could not offer any of those things, the Light has come. [cite: 2513] Not by my own unqualified strength, but only by the precious blood of Jesus... [cite: 2513]

Joseph rejects sexual temptation and instead willingly goes to prison. [cite: 2514] And he forgives all his wicked brothers who tried to kill him and made him rot as a slave and in prison for most of his life in his teens and 20s. [cite: 2515] If he had lived a life of revenge, he would have become miserable himself and made others miserable too. [cite: 2516] After being released from prison at age 30, he lived 81 more years while fulfilling God's amazing plan. [cite: 2517] That is the ability to interpret, the ability to discern the Lord's will, the ability to redeem the time, the ability to live out the end wisely, the ability to make good use of opportunities, and the ability to walk with the Lord. [cite: 2517] (Ephesians 5:15-17) [cite: 2518]

There is effectively nothing we can do about the past that has already gone by. [cite: 2519] When trying to do something with the past, it is easy for things to worsen. [cite: 2519] A believer's unique option for dealing with the past is 'forgiveness.' [cite: 2519]

Resentment comes from a victim. [cite: 2520] However, if you pray, forgiveness and blessing are possible instead of resentment. [cite: 2520] Because since the things hoped for become the substance, a victim becomes a beneficiary and further, a helper. [cite: 2520]

Unless you love and forgive yourself, you cannot lead anyone. [cite: 2521] I must accept myself as God accepted me. [cite: 2521] I hope you become people of faith who see the Lord's mercy as greater than your own deficiencies. [cite: 2521]

Please do not be anxious because of a wrong result. [cite: 2522] Rather, the Lord does not condemn but fixes the causes, wounds, anger, loneliness, and obsessions behind the wrong result. [cite: 2523] He did not come to call the righteous, but sinners. [cite: 2523] If you were healthy, why would you have needed Jesus? [cite: 2524] - Matthew 9:12 [cite: 2524]

Jesus didn't wash the disciples' feet because they were dirty. [cite: 2525] Bathing represents salvation, and washing feet represents repentance for daily sins. [cite: 2525] Someone who has been saved does not need to discuss salvation again. [cite: 2525] It was the last work the Lord performed. [cite: 2525] Repentance is important. [cite: 2526]

If sinners had been left as sinners, not a single person of faith in the Bible would have been saved. [cite: 2527] When people who stop blaming and take responsibility stand up, we see revival. [cite: 2527] Wounds beget wounds, and grace begets grace. [cite: 2527] There is no such thing as a perpetrator. [cite: 2527] Everyone is just a person in need of forgiveness. [cite: 2528] In acceptance and forgiveness, the miracle of amazing change that cannot be valued by worldly standards occurs. [cite: 2528]

It is an impossible thing for a sinful human to dwell in God and for that holy One to dwell in us. [cite: 2529] However, the one and only way is for me to also be nailed to the cross where He died for me. [cite: 2530] When crucified with Jesus, an impossible union occurs. [cite: 2530]

Do not condemn yourself being seized by guilt. [cite: 2531] If you condemn, you end up abusing yourself and being cut off from fellowship with the Lord, leading to even worse sins. [cite: 2531] Do not condemn, but repent. [cite: 2532] We have the possibility of sinning and also actually do sin. [cite: 2533] If we were sinning because we are sinners, it would be despair. [cite: 2533] However, we sin even though we are righteous people recognized by the Lord through the blood. [cite: 2533] That is why we rely on and confess to the Lord all the more. [cite: 2534] The condemnation of a sinner leads to death, but the repentance of a righteous person leads to life. [cite: 2534]
The love the Lord gives is truly strange. [cite: 2535] Age, preference, circumstances, situations, and understanding are so completely different, yet we love. [cite: 2535]
You have turned my shame into joyful praise. [cite: 2535]

True strength is the ability to be considerate of weak people. [cite: 2536] When winning, you must win with your best effort, and when losing, you must know how to lose. [cite: 2536] The highest level of power is the strength used to give people hope and joy, to improve and restore relationships, and to serve and establish many people. [cite: 2537]

The prodigal leaves his home and father for a better life. [cite: 2538] He probably rationalized that he could appropriately balance the freedom of deviation with a compromised faith. [cite: 2539] He realizes only after entering the pigpen. [cite: 2539] That he becomes increasingly more unhappy starting from the compromise intended for happiness; a faith that has lost holiness and its saltiness becomes emptier and more distant as much as it pursues something. [cite: 2540] The more one rationalizes, the longer the path to return becomes. [cite: 2540] The Lord does not compromise. [cite: 2540]
If it is a person God loved enough to give His only begotten Son, we have no right at all to hate them. [cite: 2541] God's grace is stronger than hate and greater than resentment. [cite: 2541]

If God were to paint our image on a canvas, He would paint it so beautifully. [cite: 2542] It's not because we have no flaws that He loved us, but because He loves us, He covers other things. [cite: 2542] I hope you lay down the self-portrait you drew and hang up the image the Lord drew. [cite: 2543] 'He has not observed iniquity in Jacob, nor has He seen wickedness in Israel. The LORD his God is with him, and the shout of a King is among them.' - Numbers 23:21 [cite: 2543] 'Come now, and let us reason together,' says the LORD, 'Though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they are red like crimson, they shall be as wool.' - Isaiah 1:18 [cite: 2543]
To the one who believes in God's will and forgives, the power to start again descends. [cite: 2544] Including for oneself as well as others.... [cite: 2544]
God so loved the world. [cite: 2545] Embracing impossible sinners and covering our shame with the Father's heart, we run to Christ and break our lives. [cite: 2545]
The reason God gives us salvation and unity, peace and rest, is not because we are good. [cite: 2546] We are not good but evil, yet it is because He is good. [cite: 2546]

One piece of good news is that the Lord does not condemn us. [cite: 2547] However, He also does not want us to continue dwelling in that sin and sickness of the soul. [cite: 2547] We must not watch like a fire across the river; we must become new. [cite: 2548] Jesus said to her, 'Neither do I condemn you; go and sin no more.' - John 8:11 [cite: 2548]
A person is not changed by threats. [cite: 2549] On the contrary, they are changed when they receive forgiveness. [cite: 2549] 'Neither do I condemn you; go and sin no more.' [cite: 2549]

The brothers tried to kill Joseph when he was perceived not as their own brother but simply as their father's son, that is, 'your son.' [cite: 2550] However, when Joseph forgave the brothers who had wounded him as family, God's salvation came to all people. [cite: 2551] The people placed by my side, fellow workers, are angel-like people God personally sent for us to love. [cite: 2552] When those people become 'my brother' instead of 'your son,' restoration, healing, and salvation occur. [cite: 2553] It is not that love comes from forgiving, but that forgiveness comes because you love. [cite: 2553] Please love the people placed by your side with all your heart. [cite: 2554] That is what God earnestly wants and requests of me right at this moment. [cite: 2555] 'But when this son of yours who has squandered your property with prostitutes comes home, you kill the fattened calf for him!' - Luke 15:30 (The brother's perception of the prodigal) [cite: 2556] 'They took the ornamented robe back to their father and said, "We found this. Examine it to see whether it is your son's robe."' - Genesis 37:32 (The brothers' perception of Joseph) [cite: 2556] 'He is not ashamed to call them brethren' - Hebrews 2:11 (Jesus' perception of us) [cite: 2556]

A repenting heart is not a shameful heart, but a heart where a good conscience seeks God. [cite: 2557] Therefore, one calls upon the name of the Lord to be baptized and receive forgiveness of sins. [cite: 2557] It is a night where I feel very much a sinner. [cite: 2557]

Confidence in restoration. Even wrong choices and mistakes, and even wounds that are hard to disclose, are surely restored and healed by God's love. [cite: 2558] Even if you walk a parched path now, I am confident that God will work so that the intercessions for you and the Gospel of the cross are not in vain. [cite: 2558] The sign of that confidence is the cross. [cite: 2559] 'For I am persuaded that neither death nor life, nor angels nor principalities nor powers, nor things present nor things to come, nor height nor depth, nor any other created thing, shall be able to separate us from the love of God which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.' - Romans 8:38-39 [cite: 2559]

Often people like to take sides. [cite: 2560] My side and the enemy, good people and problematic people. [cite: 2560] However, such a thought is wrong from the start. [cite: 2561] The people Jesus accepted and was friends with were people with serious problems in character and personality, and whose occupations were not welcomed. [cite: 2561] Among them, the fact is that 'I' am the chief of sinners, the most wicked. [cite: 2562] If I do not see myself as a sinner, I have not passed through the cross. [cite: 2563]

After hating someone to death and losing all faith and grace, and finally recovering after a long time, you realize that the cause was in me, not that person. [cite: 2564] The reason for hating to death was that Satan made you hate to death. [cite: 2564] Do not be deceived. [cite: 2564]

The reason I get hurt is not because that person is malicious, but because of my selfishness. [cite: 2565] Selfishness is self-deception and delusion seeking satisfaction through a fantasy rather than truth to protect oneself. [cite: 2566] When you know the Father's heart, you choose healing over wounds. [cite: 2566] You realize that he and she, including myself, are ultimately objects of salvation. [cite: 2566]

'Peace I leave with you, My peace I give to you; not as the world gives do I give to you' (John 14:27). [cite: 2567] The only one who can give fundamental peace is Jesus. [cite: 2567] This is because only Jesus washes away sin with His precious blood and reconciles us with God. [cite: 2568] Someone who does not fear God and is not reconciled should naturally be anxious. [cite: 2568] A disease with no self-perceived symptoms is not called a blessing. [cite: 2569] One should pray that a life that has left God can never sleep with their legs stretched out. [cite: 2569]

When a landlord gets angry, they tell you to move out. [cite: 2570] If God were truly angry, He would just take away the 'breath' and a person would be gone. [cite: 2571] God rejects sin, but that doesn't mean He rejects the person. [cite: 2571] On the contrary, He loves them so much. [cite: 2571] Our conscience testifies to our wrong actions, but the devil highlights and accuses me of being a wrong and worthless human. [cite: 2572] When Cain felt rejection, he became envious of Abel and committed murder. [cite: 2572] We have not been rejected but rather accepted. [cite: 2573] 'For You meet him with the blessings of goodness; You set a crown of pure gold upon his head.' - Psalm 21:3 [cite: 2573]

Even if the heart hurts due to a sense of rejection and wounds, and is upset due to lack and deficiency, so I cannot accept or forgive others, that cannot dilute the Lord's forgiveness. [cite: 2574] God has already forgiven that person entirely. [cite: 2575] Now only I need to lay it down. All of it~ [cite: 2575]

A person who truly cannot be forgiven and becomes hated is not a wicked person, but a pitiable person. [cite: 2576] If you cannot respect them, loving them unconditionally is correct, and if it's hard to love them, pitying them while praying is the right way. [cite: 2576]

God forgives through the cross and gives boundless grace through the precious blood. [cite: 2577] There is no condemnation under the precious blood. [cite: 2577] The Lord accepts you just as you are. [cite: 2577]

Even after succeeding in prayer and worship, anxiety can still overwhelm you upon returning home. [cite: 2578] That is perfectly natural and a normal process of moving toward sanctification. [cite: 2578] You might be shaken, but you will not return to the past. [cite: 2579] Because you have achieved peace with God and have been changed, we will never collapse. If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves, and pray and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin and heal their land. [cite: 2579] God, let hidden sins be confessed, and let us humble ourselves and be heard by the Lord through prayer. [cite: 2579]

1 Corinthians 13:11 - If a relationship with another person is twisted, that means you are that much more distant from God. [cite: 2580] Forgiveness and acceptance are not done only for the other person. [cite: 2580] The greatest beneficiary is oneself. [cite: 2580]

If you hold onto a past that cannot be changed, you reproach yourself, become depressed, and cannot control your emotions. [cite: 2581] The Lord has never once pressed us. [cite: 2582] Because it is not a fault we can handle. [cite: 2582] He understands our immaturity, weakness, and loneliness better than anyone. [cite: 2583] 'Dear XX, it's not your fault. You desperately need Jesus in your life, and I bore the cross for you.' [cite: 2583]

The reason the ugly duckling does not take revenge on the ducks who bullied it is that it has already become a swan. [cite: 2584] It is said that when you love your enemies and conversely pray for them, you are called children of God (Matthew 5:45). [cite: 2584] The swan no longer needs to deal with the ducks. [cite: 2585] I hope you fly higher. [cite: 2585]

If you do not forgive someone, you cannot avoid judgment. [cite: 2586] Because the Lord also does not forgive. [cite: 2586] Now, please forgive your friends who owe you 100 denarii. [cite: 2586] Because we have been forgiven ten thousand talents. [cite: 2586]
